import { useUser } from '@auth0/nextjs-auth0/client';
import Link from 'next/link';

export default function Home() {
  const { user, error, isLoading } = useUser();

  if (isLoading) return <div>Loading...</div>;
  if (error) return <div>{error.message}</div>;

  return (
    <main className="flex min-h-screen flex-col items-center justify-between p-24">
      <div className="z-10 max-w-5xl w-full items-center justify-between font-mono text-sm lg:flex">
        <p className="fixed left-0 top-0 flex w-full justify-center border-b border-gray-300 bg-gradient-to-b from-zinc-200 pb-6 pt-8 backdrop-blur-2xl dark:border-neutral-800 dark:bg-zinc-800/30 dark:from-inherit lg:static lg:w-auto  lg:rounded-xl lg:border lg:bg-gray-200 lg:p-4 lg:dark:bg-zinc-800/30">
          Welcome, {user?.name}!
        </p>
        <div className="fixed bottom-0 left-0 flex h-48 w-full items-end justify-center bg-gradient-to-t from-white via-white dark:from-black dark:via-black lg:static lg:h-auto lg:w-auto lg:bg-none">
          <a
            className="pointer-events-none flex place-items-center gap-2 p-8 lg:pointer-events-auto lg:p-0"
            href="/api/auth/logout"
          >
            Logout
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="mb-32 grid text-center lg:max-w-5xl lg:w-full lg:mb-0 lg:grid-cols-4 lg:text-left">

import { useState } from "react";
import { useRouter } from "next/navigation";
import Link from "next/link";
import { Search, Sparkles, ArrowRight, Zap, Scale, ShoppingBag, Star, Check } from "lucide-react";

export default function Home() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const [query, setQuery] = useState("");

  const handleSearch = (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (query.trim()) {
      router.push(`/search?q=${encodeURIComponent(query)}`);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-white flex flex-col">
      {/* Hero Section */}
      <div className="relative overflow-hidden pt-16 pb-24 lg:pt-32 lg:pb-40">
        <div className="relative max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 flex flex-col items-center text-center">
          
          {/* Badge */}
          <div className="inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-blue-100 bg-blue-50 px-3 py-1 text-sm font-medium text-blue-600 mb-8">
            <Sparkles className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
            <span>New: AI-Powered Price Comparison</span>
          </div>

          <h1 className="text-5xl md:text-7xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-gray-900 mb-6">
            Your Personal <br className="hidden md:block" />
            <span className="text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600">
              AI Shopping Assistant
            </span>
          </h1>
          
          <p className="max-w-2xl text-xl text-gray-500 mb-10">
            Stop searching through endless tabs. Just ask our AI to find, compare, and track the best products for your specific needs.
          </p>

          {/* Omnibar */}
          <div className="w-full max-w-3xl relative group">
            <div className="absolute -inset-1 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 rounded-2xl blur opacity-25 group-hover:opacity-50 transition duration-200"></div>
            <form onSubmit={handleSearch} className="relative bg-white rounded-xl shadow-2xl p-2 flex items-center">
              <div className="pl-4 pr-2 text-gray-400">
                <Search className="h-6 w-6" />
              </div>
              <input
                type="text"
                className="flex-grow p-4 text-lg text-gray-900 placeholder-gray-400 focus:outline-none bg-transparent"
                placeholder="Ask anything... 'Best gaming laptop under $1200' or 'Compare iPhone 15 vs Pixel 8'"
                value={query}
                onChange={(e) => setQuery(e.target.value)}
              />
              <button 
                type="submit"
                className="bg-blue-600 text-white p-3 rounded-lg hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors flex items-center gap-2 font-medium"
              >
                <span>Search</span>
                <ArrowRight className="h-5 w-5" />
              </button>
            </form>
            
            {/* Quick Prompts */}
            <div className="mt-4 flex flex-wrap justify-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-500">
              <span className="mr-2">Try asking:</span>
              <button onClick={() => setQuery("Best noise cancelling headphones")} className="hover:text-blue-600 hover:underline">"Best noise cancelling headphones"</button>
              <span className="text-gray-300">•</span>
              <button onClick={() => setQuery("Compare MacBook Air M2 vs M3")} className="hover:text-blue-600 hover:underline">"Compare MacBook Air M2 vs M3"</button>
              <span className="text-gray-300">•</span>
              <button onClick={() => setQuery("Cheap 4k monitors for coding")} className="hover:text-blue-600 hover:underline">"Cheap 4k monitors for coding"</button>
            </div>
          </div>

        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Features Grid */}
      <div className="bg-gray-50 py-24">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
          <div className="text-center mb-16">
            <h2 className="text-base font-semibold text-blue-600 tracking-wide uppercase">Features</h2>
            <p className="mt-2 text-3xl leading-8 font-extrabold tracking-tight text-gray-900 sm:text-4xl">
              Everything you need to buy smarter
            </p>

            {/* Feature 1 */}

              <div className="h-12 w-12 bg-blue-100 text-blue-600 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center mb-6">
                <Zap className="h-6 w-6" />

import { useState } from "react";
import { useRouter } from "next/navigation";
import Link from "next/link";
import { Search, Sparkles, ArrowRight, Zap, Scale, ShoppingBag, Star, Check } from "lucide-react";

export default function Home() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const [query, setQuery] = useState("");

  const handleSearch = (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (query.trim()) {
      router.push(`/search?q=${encodeURIComponent(query)}`);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-white flex flex-col">
      {/* Hero Section */}
      <div className="relative overflow-hidden pt-16 pb-24 lg:pt-32 lg:pb-40">
        <div className="relative max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 flex flex-col items-center text-center">
          
          {/* Badge */}
          <div className="inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-blue-100 bg-blue-50 px-3 py-1 text-sm font-medium text-blue-600 mb-8">
            <Sparkles className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
            <span>New: AI-Powered Price Comparison</span>
          </div>

          <h1 className="text-5xl md:text-7xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-gray-900 mb-6">
            Your Personal <br className="hidden md:block" />
            <span className="text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-linear-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600">
              AI Shopping Assistant
            </span>
          </h1>
          
          <p className="max-w-2xl text-xl text-gray-500 mb-10">
            Stop searching through endless tabs. Just ask our AI to find, compare, and track the best products for your specific needs.
          </p>

          {/* Omnibar */}
          <div className="w-full max-w-3xl relative group">
            <div className="absolute -inset-1 bg-linear-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 rounded-2xl blur opacity-25 group-hover:opacity-50 transition duration-200"></div>
            <form onSubmit={handleSearch} className="relative bg-white rounded-xl shadow-2xl p-2 flex items-center">
              <div className="pl-4 pr-2 text-gray-400">
                <Search className="h-6 w-6" />
              </div>
              <input
                type="text"
                className="grow p-4 text-lg text-gray-900 placeholder-gray-400 focus:outline-none bg-transparent"
                placeholder="Ask anything... 'Best gaming laptop under $1200' or 'Compare iPhone 15 vs Pixel 8'"
                value={query}
                onChange={(e) => setQuery(e.target.value)}
              />

              <button onClick={() => setQuery("Best noise cancelling headphones")} className="hover:text-blue-600 hover:underline">"Best noise cancelling headphones"</button>
              <span className="text-gray-300">•</span>
              <button onClick={() => setQuery("Compare MacBook Air M2 vs M3")} className="hover:text-blue-600 hover:underline">"Compare MacBook Air M2 vs M3"</button>
              <span className="text-gray-300">•</span>
              <button onClick={() => setQuery("Cheap 4k monitors for coding")} className="hover:text-blue-600 hover:underline">"Cheap 4k monitors for coding"</button>
            </div>
          </div>

        </div>
      </div>

import { useState } from "react";
import { useRouter } from "next/navigation";
import { Search, Sparkles, ArrowRight, Zap, Scale, ShoppingBag } from "lucide-react";
import { motion } from "framer-motion";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import { Card, CardContent } from "@/components/ui/card";

export default function Home() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const [query, setQuery] = useState("");

  const handleSearch = (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (query.trim()) {
      router.push(`/search?q=${encodeURIComponent(query)}`);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-white flex flex-col">
      {/* Hero Section */}
      <div className="relative overflow-hidden pt-16 pb-24 lg:pt-32 lg:pb-40">
        <div className="relative max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 flex flex-col items-center text-center">
          
          {/* Badge */}
          <div className="inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-blue-100 bg-blue-50 px-3 py-1 text-sm font-medium text-blue-600 mb-8">
            <Sparkles className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
            <span>New: AI-Powered Price Comparison</span>
          </div>

          <h1 className="text-5xl md:text-7xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-gray-900 mb-6">
            Your Personal <br className="hidden md:block" />
            <span className="text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-linear-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600">
              AI Shopping Assistant
            </span>
          </h1>
          
          <p className="max-w-2xl text-xl text-gray-500 mb-10">
            Stop searching through endless tabs. Just ask our AI to find, compare, and track the best products for your specific needs.
          </p>

          {/* Omnibar */}
          <div className="w-full max-w-3xl relative group">
            <div className="absolute -inset-1 bg-linear-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 rounded-2xl blur opacity-25 group-hover:opacity-50 transition duration-200"></div>
            <form onSubmit={handleSearch} className="relative bg-white rounded-xl shadow-2xl p-2 flex items-center">
              <div className="pl-4 pr-2 text-gray-400">
                <Search className="h-6 w-6" />
              </div>
              <input
                type="text"
                className="grow p-4 text-lg text-gray-900 placeholder-gray-400 focus:outline-none bg-transparent"
                placeholder="Ask anything... 'Best gaming laptop under $1200' or 'Compare iPhone 15 vs Pixel 8'"
                value={query}
                onChange={(e) => setQuery(e.target.value)}
              />
              <button 
                type="submit"
                className="bg-blue-600 text-white p-3 rounded-lg hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors flex items-center gap-2 font-medium"
              >
                <span>Search</span>
                <ArrowRight className="h-5 w-5" />
              </button>
            </form>
            
            {/* Quick Prompts */}
            <div className="mt-4 flex flex-wrap justify-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-500">
              <span className="mr-2">Try asking:</span>
              <button onClick={() => setQuery("Best noise cancelling headphones")} className="hover:text-blue-600 hover:underline">"Best noise cancelling headphones"</button>
              <span className="text-gray-300">•</span>
              <button onClick={() => setQuery("Compare MacBook Air M2 vs M3")} className="hover:text-blue-600 hover:underline">"Compare MacBook Air M2 vs M3"</button>
              <span className="text-gray-300">•</span>
              <button onClick={() => setQuery("Cheap 4k monitors for coding")} className="hover:text-blue-600 hover:underline">"Cheap 4k monitors for coding"</button>
            </div>
          </div>

        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Features Grid */}

import { useState } from "react";
import { useRouter } from "next/navigation";
import { Search, Sparkles, ArrowRight, Zap, Scale, ShoppingBag } from "lucide-react";
import { motion } from "framer-motion";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import { Card, CardContent } from "@/components/ui/card";

export default function Home() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const [query, setQuery] = useState("");

  const handleSearch = (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (query.trim()) {
      router.push(`/search?q=${encodeURIComponent(query)}`);
    }
  };

  const container = {
    hidden: { opacity: 0 },
    show: {
      opacity: 1,
      transition: {
        staggerChildren: 0.1
      }
    }
  };

  const item = {
    hidden: { opacity: 0, y: 20 },
    show: { opacity: 1, y: 0 }
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-background flex flex-col">
      {/* Hero Section */}
      <div className="relative overflow-hidden pt-16 pb-24 lg:pt-32 lg:pb-40">
        <motion.div 
          variants={container}
          initial="hidden"
          animate="show"
          className="relative max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 flex flex-col items-center text-center"
        >
          
          {/* Badge */}
          <motion.div variants={item} className="inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-primary/20 bg-primary/5 px-3 py-1 text-sm font-medium text-primary mb-8">
            <Sparkles className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
            <span>New: AI-Powered Price Comparison</span>
          </motion.div>

          <motion.h1 variants={item} className="text-5xl md:text-7xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-foreground mb-6">
            Your Personal <br className="hidden md:block" />
            <span className="text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-linear-to-r from-primary to-purple-600">
              AI Shopping Assistant
            </span>
          </motion.h1>
          
          <motion.p variants={item} className="max-w-2xl text-xl text-muted-foreground mb-10">
            Stop searching through endless tabs. Just ask our AI to find, compare, and track the best products for your specific needs.
          </motion.p>

          {/* Omnibar */}
          <motion.div variants={item} className="w-full max-w-3xl relative group">
            <div className="absolute -inset-1 bg-linear-to-r from-primary to-purple-600 rounded-2xl blur opacity-25 group-hover:opacity-50 transition duration-200"></div>
            <form onSubmit={handleSearch} className="relative bg-card rounded-xl shadow-2xl p-2 flex items-center gap-2">
              <div className="pl-4 pr-2 text-muted-foreground">
                <Search className="h-6 w-6" />

                type="text"
                className="grow border-0 shadow-none focus-visible:ring-0 text-lg h-14 bg-transparent"
                placeholder="Ask anything... 'Best gaming laptop under $1200'"
                value={query}
                onChange={(e) => setQuery(e.target.value)}
              />
              <Button 
                type="submit"
                size="lg"
                className="gap-2"
              >
                <span>Search</span>
                <ArrowRight className="h-5 w-5" />

export default async function BookingPage() {
  const supabase = await createClient()

                <h2 className="text-xl font-bold mb-2">Unable to load services</h2>
                <p>Please try again later or contact support.</p>

        {/* Header/Logo could go here */}
        <BookingWizard services={services || []} />

                                  service.color === 'blue' ? 'bg-blue-50 text-blue-600' :
                                  service.color === 'green' ? 'bg-green-50 text-green-600' :
                                  service.color === 'purple' ? 'bg-purple-50 text-purple-600' :
                                  'bg-pink-50 text-pink-600';
              
               return (
                <Link key={service.id} href={service.href} className="group cursor-pointer">
                  <div className="bg-white rounded-[2rem] p-8 h-full shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 border border-gray-100 relative overflow-hidden">
                    <div className="flex items-center mb-6">
                      <div className={`p-3 rounded-2xl ${colorClass} mr-4 transition-transform group-hover:scale-110`}>
                        <Icon className="w-8 h-8" />
                      </div>
                      <h3 className="text-xl font-semibold text-gray-900 group-hover:text-blue-600 transition-colors">
                        {t(service.titleKey)}
                      </h3>
                    </div>
                    
                    <p className="text-gray-600 mb-6 line-clamp-3">
                      {t(service.descriptionKey)}
                    </p>
                    
                    <div className="flex items-center text-blue-600 font-medium group-hover:translate-x-1 transition-transform">
                      {t('common.readMore')}
                      <svg className="w-4 h-4 ml-2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                        <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M9 5l7 7-7 7" />
                      </svg>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </Link>
               );
            })}
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* Casos d'Èxit Section */}
      <CasosSection />

      {/* Testimonials */}
      <section className="py-24 bg-white overflow-hidden">
         <TestimonialSlider />
      </section>

      {/* FAQ Section */}
      <FAQ />

    </>
  );
}

        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-8">
          <div className="text-center mb-16 space-y-4">
            <span className="text-blue-600 font-medium tracking-widest text-sm uppercase">
              {t('services.ourServices')}
            </span>

            <h2 className="text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-light text-gray-900">
              {t('services.therapiesFor')}{' '}
              <span className="block mt-2 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-purple-600 bg-clip-text text-transparent font-medium">
                {t('services.integralWellbeing')}
              </span>
            </h2>

            <p className="text-xl text-gray-500 max-w-2xl mx-auto font-light">
              {t('services.personalizedTreatments')}
            </p>
          </div>

          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
            {SERVICES_DATA.slice(0, 3).map((service, idx) => (
               <motion.div
                 key={service.id}
                 initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
                 whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
                 viewport={{ once: true }}
                 transition={{ delay: idx * 0.1 }}
               >
                 <ServiceCard service={service} />
               </motion.div>
            ))}
          </div>

          <div className="mt-16 text-center">
             <Link href="/services">
                <Button variant="outline" className="border-gray-200 text-gray-600 hover:text-blue-600 hover:border-blue-200 px-8 py-3 rounded-xl bg-gray-50">
                   View All Services
                </Button>
             </Link>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* Casos d'Èxit Section */}
      <CasosSection />

      {/* Testimonials */}
      <section className="py-24 bg-gray-50 overflow-hidden">
         <TestimonialSlider />
      </section>

      {/* FAQ Section */}
      <FAQ />

    </>
  );
}

import { Service } from '@/types/database';
import { BookingModal } from '@/components/BookingModal';
import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import Image from 'next/image';

export const revalidate = 0;

async function getServices() {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  
  // Try fetching from anon_services first
  let { data, error } = await supabase
    .from('anon_services')
    .select('*')
    .eq('is_active', true);

  // Fallback to services if table missing
  if (error && error.code === '42P01') {
    const res = await supabase
      .from('services')
      .select('*')
      .eq('is_active', true);
    data = res.data;
    error = res.error;
  }

  if (error) {
    console.error('Error fetching services:', error);
    return [];
  }

  return data as Service[];
}

export default async function Home() {
  const services = await getServices();

  return (
    <main className="min-h-screen bg-background">
      <header className="bg-card shadow-sm border-b">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto py-6 px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">

        <div className="px-4 py-6 sm:px-0">
          <div className="mb-8">
            <h2 className="text-2xl font-semibold text-foreground mb-4">Available Services</h2>
            {services && services.length > 0 ? (
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
                {services.map((service) => (
                  <Card key={service.id} className="overflow-hidden">
                    {service.image_url && (
                      <div className="relative h-48 w-full">
                        <Image className="object-cover" src={service.image_url} alt={service.name} fill />
                      </div>
                    )}
                    <CardHeader>
                      <CardTitle>{service.name}</CardTitle>
                      <CardDescription>
                        {service.description}
                        {(service.location || service.version) && (
                          <div className="mt-2 flex gap-2 text-xs text-gray-500">
                            {service.location && (
                              <span className="inline-flex items-center px-2 py-1 rounded-full bg-gray-100">
                                📍 {service.location}
                              </span>
                            )}
                            {service.version && (
                              <span className="inline-flex items-center px-2 py-1 rounded-full bg-blue-50 text-blue-700">

                    </CardHeader>

                      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                        <span className="text-xl font-bold text-indigo-600">${service.price}</span>
                        <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">{service.duration} mins</span>
                      </div>

\n\n=======================\n\nFOUND GOOD FILE: C:\\Users\\Mykola\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\History\-33694bfa\dJBV.tsx\nimport { createClient } from '@/lib/supabaseClient';
import { Service } from '@/types/database';
import { BookingModal } from '@/components/BookingModal';
import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import Image from 'next/image';

export const revalidate = 0;

async function getServices() {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  
  // 1. Try fetching from 'anon_services' (preferred for public view if exists)
  let { data: anonData, error: anonError } = await supabase
    .from('anon_services')
    .select('*')
    .eq('is_active', true);

  if (!anonError && anonData && anonData.length > 0) {
    return anonData as Service[];
  }

  // 2. Fallback to 'service' (singular, from SUPABASE_BOOKING_SCHEMA.sql)
  // Note: Schema uses 'active', not 'is_active'
  let { data: serviceData, error: serviceError } = await supabase
    .from('service')
    .select('*')
    .eq('active', true);

  if (!serviceError && serviceData && serviceData.length > 0) {
    return serviceData.map(s => ({ ...s, is_active: s.active })) as Service[];
  }

  // 3. Fallback to 'services' (plural, legacy/alternative)
  let { data: servicesData, error: servicesError } = await supabase
    .from('services')
    .select('*')
    .eq('is_active', true);

  if (!servicesError && servicesData && servicesData.length > 0) {
    return servicesData as Service[];
  }

  console.error('Failed to fetch services. Errors:', { anonError, serviceError, servicesError });
  return [];
}

  const services = await getServices();

  return (
    <main className="min-h-screen bg-background">

        </div>
      </header>
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto py-6 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
        <div className="px-4 py-6 sm:px-0">
          <div className="mb-8">
            <h2 className="text-2xl font-semibold text-foreground mb-4">Available Services</h2>
            {services && services.length > 0 ? (
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
                {services.map((service) => (
                  <Card key={service.id} className="overflow-hidden">
                    {service.image_url && (
                      <div className="relative h-48 w-full">
                        <Image className="object-cover" src={service.image_url} alt={service.name} fill />
                      </div>
                    )}
                    <CardHeader>
                      <CardTitle>{service.name}</CardTitle>
                      <CardDescription>
                        {service.description}
                        {(service.location || service.version) && (
                          <div className="mt-2 flex gap-2 text-xs text-gray-500">
                            {service.location && (
                              <span className="inline-flex items-center px-2 py-1 rounded-full bg-gray-100">
                                📍 {service.location}
                              </span>
                            )}
                            {service.version && (
                              <span className="inline-flex items-center px-2 py-1 rounded-full bg-blue-50 text-blue-700">
                                🏷️ {service.version}
                              </span>

                          </div>
                        )}
                      </CardDescription>
                    </CardHeader>
                    <CardContent>
                      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                        <span className="text-xl font-bold text-indigo-600">${service.price}</span>
                        <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">{service.duration} mins</span>
                      </div>
                    </CardContent>

                      <BookingModal service={service} />

import { Service } from '@/types/database';
import { BookingModal } from '@/components/BookingModal';
import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import Image from 'next/image';

export const revalidate = 0;

async function getServices() {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  
  // Fetch from 'service' table (singular, from SUPABASE_BOOKING_SCHEMA.sql)
  const { data, error } = await supabase
    .from('service')
    .select('*')
    .eq('active', true);

  if (error) {
    console.error('Error fetching services:', error);
    return [];
  }

  // Map 'active' to 'is_active' for compatibility if needed
  return (data || []).map(s => ({ ...s, is_active: s.active })) as Service[];
}

behavior\ttime\r\n64.\t🏦\tInvestment Loops\tWhen users invest themselves, they're more likely to come back\ttime\r\n65.\t🕯\tLoss Aversion\tPeople prefer to avoid losses more than earning equivalent gains\ttime\r\n66.\t👞\tCommitment & Consistency\tUsers tend to be consistent with their previous actions\ttime\r\n67.\t🏝\tSunk Cost Effect\tUsers are reluctant to pull out of something they're invested in.\ttime\r\n68.\t🌛\tDecision Fatigue\tMaking a lot of decisions lowers users' ability to make rational ones\ttime\r\n69.\t🌋\tReactance\tUsers are less likely to adopt a behavior when they feel forced\ttime\r\n70.\t🥽\tObserver-Expectancy Effect\tWhen researchers' biases influence the participants of an experiment\ttime\r\n71.\t🌱\tWeber's Law\tUsers adapt better to small incremental changes\ttime\r\n72.\t🔨\tLaw of the Instrument\tIf all you have is a hammer, everything looks like a nail\ttime\r\n73.\t🍭\tTemptation Bundling\tHard tasks are less scary when coupled with something users desire\ttime\r\n74.\t🎈\tParkinson’s Law\tThe time required to complete a task will take as much time as allowed\ttime\r\n75.\t🎩\tDunning-Kruger Effect\tPeople tend to overestimate their skills when they don't know much\ttime\r\n76.\t🌤\tAffect Heuristic\tPeople's current emotions cloud and influence their judgment\ttime\r\n77.\t📉\tHyperbolic Discounting\tPeople tend to prioritize immediate benefits over bigger future gains\ttime\r\n78.\t⌚️\tChronoception\tPeople's perception of time is subjective\ttime\r\n79.\t💳\tCashless Effect\tPeople spend more when they can't actually see the money\ttime\r\n80.\t🌚\tSelf-serving bias\tPeople take credits for positive events and blame others if negative\ttime\r\n81.\t🥬\tPareto Principle\tRoughly 80% of the effects come from 20% of the causes\ttime\r\n82.\t🔍\tDiscoverability\tThe ease with which users can discover your features\ttime\r\n83.\t🔫\tBackfire Effect\tWhen people's convictions are challenged, their beliefs get stronger\ttime\r\n84.\t🌈\tFalse Consensus Effect\tPeople overestimate how much other people agree with them\ttime\r\n85.\t🚋\tBandwagon Effect\tUsers tend to adopt beliefs in proportion of others who have already done so\ttime\r\n86.\t🐍\tSecond-Order Effect\tThe consequences of the consequences of actions\ttime\r\n87.\t🧙‍♂️\tBarnum-Forer Effect\tWhen you believe generic personality descriptions apply specifically to you.\ttime\r\n88.\t🛋\tIKEA Effect\tWhen user partially create something, they value it way more\ttime\r\n89.\t🧚‍♂️\tPlanning Fallacy\tPeople tend to underestimate how much time a task will take\ttime\r\n90.\t🏕\tProvide Exit Points\tInvite users to leave your app at the right moment\tmemory\r\n91.\t🎢\tPeak-End Rule\tPeople judge an experience by its peak and how it ends.\tmemory\r\n92.\t👅\tSensory Appeal\tUsers engage more with things appealing to multiple senses\tmemory\r\n93.\t🧩\tZeigarnik Effect\tPeople remember incomplete tasks better than completed ones\tmemory\r\n94.\t🧤\tEndowment Effect\tUsers value something more if they feel it's theirs\tmemory\r\n95.\t🛍\tChunking\tPeople remember grouped information better\tmemory\r\n96.\t📸\tPicture Superiority Effect\tPeople remember pictures better than words\tmemory\r\n97.\t📌\tMethod of Loci\tPeople remember things more when they're associated with a location\tmemory\r\n98.\t🧭\tShaping\tIncrementally reinforcing actions to get closer to a target behavior\tmemory\r\n99.\t💚\tDelighters\tPeople remember more unexpected and playful pleasures\tmemory\r\n100.\t💛\tInternal Trigger\tWhen users are prompted to take action based on a memory\tmemory\r\n101.\t💾\tRecognition Over Recall\tIt's easier to recognize things than recall them from memory\tmemory\r\n102.\t🏰\tStorytelling Effect\tPeople remember stories better than facts alone\tmemory\r\n103.\t👹\tNegativity Bias\tUsers recall negative events more than positive export default async function Home() {
  const allProducts = await ProductService.getAllProducts();

import * as React from 'react';
import { slides } from '../data/slides';
import { ProgressBar, ProgressCircle } from '../components/ui/progress';
import { Button } from '../components/ui/button';

export default function Home() {
  const [index, setIndex] = React.useState(0);
  const total = slides.length;
  const progress = ((index + 1) / total) * 100;

  React.useEffect(() => {
    const handler = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
      if (e.key === 'ArrowRight' || e.key === 'PageDown') {
        setIndex(i => Math.min(i + 1, total - 1));
      } else if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft' || e.key === 'PageUp') {
        setIndex(i => Math.max(i - 1, 0));
      } else if (e.key === 'Home') {
        setIndex(0);
      } else if (e.key === 'End') {
        setIndex(total - 1);
      }
    };
    window.addEventListener('keydown', handler);
    return () => window.removeEventListener('keydown', handler);
  }, [total]);

  const current = slides[index];

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen w-full flex flex-col bg-neutral-50 dark:bg-black text-neutral-900 dark:text-neutral-100">
      <header className="flex items-center justify-between px-6 py-3 border-b border-neutral-200 dark:border-neutral-800 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur dark:bg-neutral-900/70">
        <h1 className="text-sm font-semibold tracking-wide">Економічні моделі</h1>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <ProgressCircle value={progress} />
          <div className="text-xs font-mono">{index + 1}/{total}</div>
        </div>
      </header>
      <main className="flex-1 flex flex-col items-center justify-center px-6 py-8">
        <div className="w-full max-w-4xl">
          <div className="rounded-xl border border-neutral-200 dark:border-neutral-800 bg-white dark:bg-neutral-900 p-8 shadow-sm min-h-[420px] flex flex-col">
            <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-6">{current.title}</h2>
            <div className="flex-1 prose prose-sm max-w-none dark:prose-invert">
              {current.content}
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className="mt-6 flex items-center justify-between">
            <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={() => setIndex(i => Math.max(i - 1, 0))} disabled={index === 0}>Попередній</Button>
            <ProgressBar value={progress} />
            <Button variant="default" size="sm" onClick={() => setIndex(i => Math.min(i + 1, total - 1))} disabled={index === total - 1}>Наступний</Button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </main>
      <footer className="text-center text-xs py-3 text-neutral-500 dark:text-neutral-400">© 2025 Економічні моделі • Показникові та логарифмічні функції</footer>
    </div>
  );
}

import * as React from 'react';
import { slides } from '../data/slides';
import { ProgressBar, ProgressCircle } from '../components/ui/progress';
import { Button } from '../components/ui/button';

export default function Home() {
  const [index, setIndex] = React.useState(0);
  const total = slides.length;
  const progress = ((index + 1) / total) * 100;

  React.useEffect(() => {
    const handler = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
      if (e.key === 'ArrowRight' || e.key === 'PageDown') {
        setIndex(i => Math.min(i + 1, total - 1));
      } else if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft' || e.key === 'PageUp') {
        setIndex(i => Math.max(i - 1, 0));
      } else if (e.key === 'Home') {
        setIndex(0);
      } else if (e.key === 'End') {
        setIndex(total - 1);
      }
    };
    window.addEventListener('keydown', handler);
    return () => window.removeEventListener('keydown', handler);
  }, [total]);

  const current = slides[index];

  React.useEffect(() => {
    const saved = localStorage.getItem('theme');
    if (saved === 'dark') document.documentElement.classList.add('dark');
  }, []);

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen w-full flex flex-col bg-neutral-50 dark:bg-black text-neutral-900 dark:text-neutral-100">
      <header className="flex items-center justify-between px-6 py-3 border-b border-neutral-200 dark:border-neutral-800 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur dark:bg-neutral-900/70">
        <h1 className="text-sm font-semibold tracking-wide">Економічні моделі</h1>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
          <button
            onClick={() => {
              const root = document.documentElement;
              const isDark = root.classList.toggle('dark');
              localStorage.setItem('theme', isDark ? 'dark' : 'light');
            }}
            className="text-xs px-3 py-1 rounded border border-neutral-300 dark:border-neutral-700 bg-neutral-100 dark:bg-neutral-800 hover:bg-neutral-200 dark:hover:bg-neutral-700 transition"
            aria-label="Перемикач теми"
          >Тема</button>
          <ProgressCircle value={progress} />
          <div className="text-xs font-mono">{index + 1}/{total}</div>
        </div>
      </header>
      <main className="flex-1 flex flex-col items-center justify-center px-6 py-8">
        <div className="w-full max-w-4xl">
          <div className="rounded-xl border border-neutral-200 dark:border-neutral-800 bg-white dark:bg-neutral-900 p-8 shadow-sm min-h-[420px] flex flex-col">
            <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-6">{current.title}</h2>
            <div className="flex-1 prose prose-sm max-w-none dark:prose-invert">
              {current.content}
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className="mt-6 flex items-center justify-between">
            <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={() => setIndex(i => Math.max(i - 1, 0))} disabled={index === 0}>Попередній</Button>
            <ProgressBar value={progress} />
            <Button variant="default" size="sm" onClick={() => setIndex(i => Math.min(i + 1, total - 1))} disabled={index === total - 1}>Наступний</Button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </main>
      <footer className="text-center text-xs py-3 text-neutral-500 dark:text-neutral-400">© 2025 Економічні моделі • Показникові та логарифмічні функції</footer>
    </div>
  );
}

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useAuth } from '@/context/auth-context';
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { getMainSiteUrl } from '@/lib/navigation';

export default function Home() {
  const [email, setEmail] = useState('');
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [message, setMessage] = useState<{ type: 'success' | 'error', text: string } | null>(null);
  const { signInWithEmail } = useAuth();
  const router = useRouter();
  const [mainSiteUrl, setMainSiteUrl] = useState('#');

  useEffect(() => {
    setMainSiteUrl(getMainSiteUrl());
  }, []);

  const handleLogin = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setLoading(true);
    setMessage(null);

    const { error } = await signInWithEmail(email);

    if (error) {
      setMessage({ type: 'error', text: error.message });
    } else {
      setMessage({ type: 'success', text: 'Check your email for the login link!' });
    }
    setLoading(false);
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center">
      <div className="bg-surface p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-xl max-w-md w-full text-center">
        <h1 className="text-3xl font-display font-bold mb-4">Kucherov Studio</h1>
        <p className="text-secondary mb-8">Intranet Access Portal</p>
        
        {message && (
          <div className={`mb-6 p-4 rounded-lg text-sm ${message.type === 'error' ? 'bg-red-50 text-red-600' : 'bg-green-50 text-green-600'}`}>
            {message.text}
          </div>
        )}

        <form onSubmit={handleLogin} className="space-y-4 text-left">
          <div>
            <label htmlFor="email" className="block text-sm font-medium text-secondary mb-1">Email Address</label>
            <input
              id="email"
              type="email"
              value={email}
              onChange={(e) => setEmail(e.target.value)}
              className="w-full px-4 py-3 bg-surface-container border-0 rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 outline-none"
              placeholder="name@kucherovstudio.com"
              required
            />
          </div>

          <button 
            type="submit"
            disabled={loading}
            className="block w-full py-3 px-4 bg-primary text-white rounded-xl font-medium hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity disabled:opacity-50"
          >
            {loading ? 'Sending link...' : 'Send Magic Link'}
          </button>
        </form>
          
        <div className="mt-8 text-sm text-secondary">
          <Link href={mainSiteUrl} className="hover:text-primary">
            &larr; Back to Main Site
          </Link>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

import Link from 'next/link'
import { motion } from 'framer-motion'
import { useSimpleAuth } from '@/hooks/use-simple-auth'
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'
import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card'
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge'
import { Separator } from '@/components/ui/separator'
import { Sparkles, Heart, Shield, Zap, Brain, Users, BookOpen, TrendingUp, Calendar, MessageSquare, Target, Award } from 'lucide-react'
import { FeatureGrid } from '@/components/landing/feature-card'

import dynamic from 'next/dynamic'
import { PageContainer } from '@/components/eka/page-container'

import { HeroSection } from '@/components/landing/hero-section'
const MedicalDisclaimer = dynamic(() => import('@/components/medical-disclaimer'), { ssr: false })

export default function HomePage() {
  const { isAuthenticated, user } = useSimpleAuth()
  const router = useRouter()

  // Auto-redirect authenticated users to home/dashboard
  useEffect(() => {
    if (isAuthenticated && user) {
      // Check if user has completed onboarding
      if (!user.personalizationCompleted) {
        router.push('/onboarding')
      } else {
        // Use auth-dispatch to handle role-based routing
        router.push('/auth-dispatch')
      }
    }
  }, [isAuthenticated, user, router])

  if (isAuthenticated) {
    return (
      <PageContainer>
        <SurfacePanel className="flex items-center justify-center">
          <div className="text-center space-y-4">
            <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-12 w-12 border-b-2 border-primary mx-auto"></div>

        </SurfacePanel>

              description: 'Book sessions, manage appointments, and communicate with licensed therapists seamlessly.',

  const router = useRouter()

  // Auto-redirect authenticated users to home/dashboard
  useEffect(() => {
    if (isAuthenticated && user) {
      // Check if user has completed onboarding
      if (!user.personalizationCompleted) {
        router.push('/onboarding')
      } else {
        // Use auth-dispatch to handle role-based routing
        router.push('/auth-dispatch')
      }
    }

These phrases serve to clarify situations, untangle entanglements, and restore the healthy flow of energy within family systems[1]. The phrases are short, concentrated, and powerful tools that touch and mobilize deep psychological processes when spoken from the constellation field[2].\r\n\r\nHealing phrases (also called resolving or permissive phrases) do not mean \"permission to act\" but rather \"release from burden\" – they serve to restore order and harmony in the family system[3]. The effectiveness of these phrases lies in their precision and timing within the constellation process.\r\n\r\n## Categories of Healing Phrases\r\n\r\n### 1. Phrases That Name the Order\r\n\r\nThese phrases establish or acknowledge the natural hierarchy and relationships within the family system.\r\n\r\n\\begin{itemize}\r\n\\item \"I am your mother\" / \"Я - твоя мама\"\r\n\\item \"You are my father\" / \"Ты мой отец\"\r\n\\item \"You are my older daughter\" / \"Ты моя старшая дочь\"\r\n\\item \"I am your wife, and you are my husband\" / \"Я – твоя жена, а ты – мой муж\"\r\n\\item \"You are my son, and I am your mother\" / \"Ты – мой сын, а я – твоя мать\"\r\n\\item \"You are my son, and I am your father\" / \"Ты мой сын, а я – твой отец\"\r\n\\item \"You are the first wife; she is the second\" / \"Ты первая жена; она вторая\"\r\n\\item \"You came first\" / \"Ты пришел первым\"\r\n\\item \"You are only a child\" / \"Ты всего лишь ребенок\"\r\n\\end{itemize}\r\n\r\n### 2. Phrases That Establish Place and Belonging\r\n\r\nThese phrases help individuals find their rightful place within the system.\r\n\r\n\\begin{itemize}\r\n\\item \"You have a place with us\" / \"У тебя есть место среди нас\"\r\n\\item \"I give you a place in my heart\" / \"Я даю тебе место в моем сердце\"\r\n\\item \"Now I will stand in my place\" / \"Сейчас я встану на свое место\"\r\n\\item \"I will now stand with my brothers and sisters\" / \"Я сейчас встану к своим братьям и сестрам\"\r\n\\item \"Now I will stand next to you, as your wife\" / \"Теперь я встану рядом с тобой, как твоя жена\"\r\n\\item \"I am the little one and you are the big one\" / \"Я маленький, а ты большой\"\r\n\\end{itemize}\r\n\r\n### 3. Phrases About Giving and Taking\r\n\r\nThese phrases restore the balance of exchange in relationships.\r\n\r\n\\begin{itemize}\r\n\\item \"I am the little one and you are the big one. You give and I take\" / \"Я маленький, а ты большой. Ты даешь, а я беру\"\r\n\\item \"I take you as my parents and you may have me as your child\" / \"Я принимаю вас как моих родителей, и вы можете иметь меня как своего ребенка\"\r\n\\item \"I take this life even at the price it has cost you\" / \"Я принимаю эту жизнь, даже если она стоила тебе такой цены\"\r\n\\item \"I take this life with everything it entails\" / \"Я принимаю эту жизнь со всем, что она влечет за собой\"\r\n\\item \"What I couldn't get from you, I will take from others\" / \"То, что я не смог получить от тебя, я возьму у других\"\r\n\\item \"Your loss was my gain\" / \"Твоя потеря была моей выгодой\"\r\n\\end{itemize}\r\n\r\n### 4. Phrases About Responsibility and Boundaries\r\n\r\nThese phrases clarify who carries what burden and establish healthy boundaries.\r\n\r\n\\begin{itemize}\r\n\\item \"I am responsible for my part, and I leave your part with you\" / \"Я несу ответственность за свою часть, а твою часть оставляю тебе\"\r\n\\item \"It is your burden to carry, not mine and I let go of it now\" / \"Это твое бремя нести, не мое, и я отпускаю его сейчас\"\r\n\\item \"I leave it with you, with love\" / \"Я оставляю это с тобой, с любовью\"\r\n\\item \"What happens between us as your parents, it's our business and we will take care of it\" / \"То, что происходит между нами как твоими родителями, это наше дело, и мы позаботимся об этом\"\r\n\\item \"There has to be a price for what you did, and you must pay it\" / \"За то, что ты сделал, должна быть цена, и ты должен заплатить ее\"\r\n\\end{itemize}\r\n\r\n### 5. Phrases About Honoring and Respect\r\n\r\nThese phrases acknowledge fate, sacrifice, and the dignity of each person.\r\n\r\n\\begin{itemize}\r\n\\item \"I honor you and your fate\" / \"Я уважаю тебя и твою судьбу\"\r\n\\item \"I respect your pain and your love\" / \"Я уважаю твою боль и твою любовь\"\r\n\\item \"I honor your choice\" / \"Я уважаю твой выбор\"\r\n\\item \"It's all right\" / \"Все в порядке\"\r\n\\end{itemize}\r\n\r\n### 6. Phrases About Entanglements and Substitution\r\n\r\nThese phrases address when one person takes on another's fate or suffering.\r\n\r\n\\begin{itemize}\r\n\\item \"I suffer in your place\" / \"Я страдаю вместо тебя\"\r\n\\item \"I do it for you\" / \"Я делаю это для тебя\"\r\n\\item \"Better me than you\" / \"Лучше я, чем ты\"\r\n\\item \"I follow you\" / \"Я следую за тобой\"\r\n\\item \"I would have died to protect your wife and children\" / \"Я бы умер, чтобы защитить твою жену и детей\"\r\n\\end{itemize}\r\n\r\n### 7. Phrases for Parents to Children\r\n\r\nThese phrases restore the proper flow from parent to child.\r\n\r\n\\begin{itemize}\r\n\\item \"You are my child, I am your parent\" / \"Ты мой ребенок, я твой родитель\"\r\n\\item \"I am big, you are small\" / \"Я большой, ты маленький\"\r\n\\item \"I give, you receive\" / \"Я даю, ты получаешь\"\r\n\\item \"Your time is now, mine is over\" / \"Твое время сейчас, мое прошло\"\r\n\\item \"Please be kind to me and look friendly on me\" / \"Пожалуйста, будь добр ко мне и смотри на меня дружелюбно\"\r\n\\item \"Mother, please be friendly with me if I stand with my father\" / \"Мама, пожалуйста, будь дружелюбна со мной, если я встану с отцом\"\r\n\\end{itemize}\r\n\r\n### 8. Phrases for Aborted or Lost Children\r\n\r\nSpecial phrases addressing the pain of abortion, miscarriage, or early death.\r\n\r\n\\begin{itemize}\r\n\\item \"You are my first child, and I had an abortion. This is my responsibility and my pain\" / \"Ты мой первый ребенок, и я сделала аборт. Это моя ответственность и моя боль\"\r\n\\item \"I didn't want to look at you. Now I see you. In my heart there is a good place for you as my child\" / \"Я не хотела смотреть на тебя. Теперь я тебя вижу. В моем сердце есть хорошее место для тебя как для моего ребенка\"\r\n\\item \"There is something of a murderer in me\" (after multiple abortions) / \"Во мне есть что-то от убийцы\" (после нескольких абортов)\r\n\\item \"I wasn't ready to give you life then. Your sister was small. I killed you. I'm so sorry\" / \"Я не была готова дать тебе жизнь тогда. Твоя сестра была маленькой. Я убила тебя. Мне так жаль\"\r\n\\item \"I wanted to give you life, but you left. I respect your choice\" / \"Я хотела дать тебе жизнь, но ты ушел. Я уважаю твой выбор\"\r\n\\item \"Son, the woman always has the final word\" / \"Сынок, за женщиной всегда последнее слово\"\r\n\\item \"I made this decision, and I carry it\" / \"Я приняла это решение, и я несу это\"\r\n\\item \"I didn't want you\" / \"Я тебя не хотела\"\r\n\\item \"I killed you\" / \"Я убила тебя\"\r\n\\item \"When you came, it was impossible. I regret it\" / \"Когда ты приходил, это было невозможно. Я сожалею\"\r\n\\item \"I thought it would be better this way. I'm sorry\" / \"Я думал(а), что так будет лучше. Мне жаль\"\r\n\\end{itemize}\r\n\r\n### 9. Phrases About Death and Life\r\n\r\nThese phrases help individuals reconcile with death and embrace life.\r\n\r\n\\begin{itemize}\r\n\\item \"I lived and you died\" / \"Я жил, а ты умер\"\r\n\\item \"Your time is over\" / \"Твое время закончилось\"\r\n\\item \"I stay, you go\" / \"Я остаюсь, ты уходишь\"\r\n\\item \"You go, I stay a little longer\" / \"Ты уходишь, я остаюсь еще немного\"\r\n\\item \"I take life, even at this price\" / \"Я принимаю жизнь, даже по этой цене\"\r\n\\item \"Life has its price, and I am willing to pay it\" / \"Жизнь имеет свою цену, и я готов заплатить ее\"\r\n\\end{itemize}\r\n\r\n### 10. Phrases About Forgiveness and Release\r\n\r\nThese phrases facilitate letting go and moving forward.\r\n\r\n\\begin{itemize}\r\n\\item \"I release you\" / \"Я отпускаю тебя\"\r\n\\item \"I let you go with love\" / \"Я отпускаю тебя с любовью\"\r\n\\item \"You are free\" / \"Ты свободен\"\r\n\\item \"I am free\" / \"Я свободен\"\r\n\\item \"Now I can let you go\" / \"Теперь я могу отпустить тебя\"\r\n\\end{itemize}\r\n\r\n### 11. Phrases About Partnership and Marriage\r\n\r\nThese phrases address couple dynamics and loyalty.\r\n\r\n\\begin{itemize}\r\n\\item \"You are the right husband for me\" / \"Ты правильный муж для меня\"\r\n\\item \"You are the right wife for me\" / \"Ты правильная жена для меня\"\r\n\\item \"You are the right father for me\" (even if abusive) / \"Ты правильный отец для меня\" (даже если был жестоким)\r\n\\item \"I choose you\" / \"Я выбираю тебя\"\r\n\\item \"We belong together\" / \"Мы принадлежим друг другу\"\r\n\\end{itemize}\r\n\r\n### 12. Phrases for Excluded Family Members\r\n\r\nThese phrases reintegrate those who were forgotten or rejected.\r\n\r\n\\begin{itemize}\r\n\\item \"We remember you\" / \"Мы помним тебя\"\r\n\\item \"You belong to us\" / \"Ты принадлежишь нам\"\r\n\\item \"We see you now\" / \"Мы видим тебя сейчас\"\r\n\\item \"You have a right to belong\" / \"Ты имеешь право принадлежать\"\r\n\\end{itemize}\r\n\r\n### 13. Phrases About Ancestors and Lineage\r\n\r\nThese phrases honor those who came before and acknowledge their gifts.\r\n\r\n\\begin{itemize}\r\n\\item \"I bow before those who came before me\" / \"Я кланяюсь тем, кто был до меня\"\r\n\\item \"I take what you have given me\" / \"Я принимаю то, что вы мне дали\"\r\n\\item \"Thank you for my life\" / \"Спасибо за мою жизнь\"\r\n\\item \"I carry your legacy forward\" / \"Я несу ваше наследие вперед\"\r\n\\item \"Through me, you continue\" / \"Через меня вы продолжаетесь\"\r\n\\end{itemize}\r\n\r\n### 14. Phrases About Guilt and Innocence\r\n\r\nThese phrases address perpetrators, victims, and systemic justice.\r\n\r\n\\begin{itemize}\r\n\\item \"I acknowledge what I have done\" / \"Я признаю то, что я сделал\"\r\n\\item \"I take responsibility for my actions\" / \"Я беру ответственность за свои действия\"\r\n\\item \"The innocent may remain innocent\" / \"Невиновный может оставаться невиновным\"\r\n\\item \"The guilty must face the consequences\" / \"Виновный должен столкнуться с последствиями\"\r\n\\item \"I was a victim, and now I am free\" / \"Я был жертвой, и теперь я свободен\"\r\n\\end{itemize}\r\n\r\n### 15. Phrases About Belonging to Different Systems\r\n\r\nThese phrases address divided loyalties and multiple systems.\r\n\r\n\\begin{itemize}\r\n\\item \"I belong to both\" / \"Я принадлежу обоим\"\r\n\\item \"I honor both sides\" / \"Я уважаю обе стороны\"\r\n\\item \"I take from both my mother and my father\" / \"Я беру от матери и от отца\"\r\n\\item \"Both countries are in me\" / \"Обе страны во мне\"\r\n\\end{itemize}\r\n\r\n### 16. Phrases for Children to Parents\r\n\r\nThese phrases restore respect and proper order from child to parent.\r\n\r\n\\begin{itemize}\r\n\\item \"You are my mother, exactly as you are\" / \"Ты моя мать, именно такая, какая ты есть\"\r\n\\item \"You are my father, exactly as you are\" / \"Ты мой отец, именно такой, какой ты есть\"\r\n\\item \"I take you as you are\" / \"Я принимаю тебя таким, какой ты есть\"\r\n\\item \"You are enough for me\" / \"Ты достаточна для меня\"\r\n\\item \"I take everything you have given me\" / \"Я принимаю все, что ты мне дал\"\r\n\\item \"Now I will do something with it\" / \"Теперь я сделаю с этим что-то свое\"\r\n\\end{itemize}\r\n\r\n### 17. Phrases About Victim and Perpetrator\r\n\r\nThese phrases address violence, trauma, and their systemic effects.\r\n\r\n\\begin{itemize}\r\n\\item \"You were the perpetrator, I was the victim\" / \"Ты был преступником, я был жертвой\"\r\n\\item \"What you did was wrong\" / \"То, что ты сделал, было неправильно\"\r\n\\item \"I see what happened\" / \"Я вижу, что произошло\"\r\n\\item \"You must carry the consequences\" / \"Ты должен нести последствия\"\r\n\\item \"I leave the guilt with you\" / \"Я оставляю вину тебе\"\r\n\\end{itemize}\r\n\r\n### 18. Phrases About Illness and Health\r\n\r\nThese phrases address psychosomatic symptoms and systemic illness.\r\n\r\n\\begin{itemize}\r\n\\item \"I choose life\" / \"Я выбираю жизнь\"\r\n\\item \"I have a right to be healthy\" / \"Я имею право быть здоровым\"\r\n\\item \"This illness is not mine to carry\" / \"Эта болезнь не моя ноша\"\r\n\\item \"I give back what is not mine\" / \"Я возвращаю то, что не мое\"\r\n\\end{itemize}\r\n\r\n### 19. Phrases About War, Violence, and Historical Trauma\r\n\r\nThese phrases address collective trauma and historical wounds.\r\n\r\n\\begin{itemize}\r\n\\item \"I honor those who died in the war\" / \"Я чту тех, кто погиб на войне\"\r\n\\item \"I remember the victims\" / \"Я помню жертв\"\r\n\\item \"I acknowledge what happened\" / \"Я признаю то, что произошло\"\r\n\\item \"The dead have their place, the living have theirs\" / \"У мертвых свое место, у живых свое\"\r\n\\end{itemize}\r\n\r\n### 20. Phrases About Adoption and Foster Care\r\n\r\nThese phrases help adopted children integrate both families.\r\n\r\n\\begin{itemize}\r\n\\item \"You are my birth mother, she is my adoptive mother\" / \"Ты моя биологическая мать, она моя приемная мать\"\r\n\\item \"I take life from you, I take love from them\" / \"Я принимаю жизнь от тебя, я принимаю любовь от них\"\r\n\\item \"Both families have a place in my heart\" / \"Обе семьи имеют место в моем сердце\"\r\n\\item \"Thank you for giving me life\" / \"Спасибо, что дала мне жизнь\"\r\n\\item \"Thank you for raising me\" / \"Спасибо, что вырастили меня\"\r\n\\end{itemize}\r\n\r\n### 21. Phrases About Money and Inheritance\r\n\r\nThese phrases address financial entanglements and material legacy.\r\n\r\n\\begin{itemize}\r\n\\item \"I take what is rightfully mine\" / \"Я беру то, что по праву мое\"\r\n\\item \"I give back what is not mine\" / \"Я возвращаю то, что не мое\"\r\n\\item \"Your wealth cost you dearly\" / \"Твое богатство дорого тебе обошлось\"\r\n\\item \"I honor the price that was paid\" / \"Я чту цену, которая была заплачена\"\r\n\\end{itemize}\r\n\r\n### 22. Phrases About Siblings\r\n\r\nThese phrases restore order and connection among brothers and sisters.\r\n\r\n\\begin{itemize}\r\n\\item \"You are my older brother/sister\" / \"Ты мой старший брат/сестра\"\r\n\\item \"You came before me\" / \"Ты пришел до меня\"\r\n\\item \"I respect your place\" / \"Я уважаю твое место\"\r\n\\item \"We are equals as siblings\" / \"Мы равны как братья и сестры\"\r\n\\item \"I stand with you\" / \"Я стою с тобой\"\r\n\\end{itemize}\r\n\r\n### 23. Phrases About Sexual Abuse and Incest\r\n\r\nThese phrases address profound violations within the family system.\r\n\r\n\\begin{itemize}\r\n\\item \"What you did was wrong\" / \"То, что ты сделал, было неправильно\"\r\n\\item \"I was the child, you were the adult\" / \"Я был ребенком, ты был взрослым\"\r\n\\item \"The responsibility is yours, not mine\" / \"Ответственность твоя, не моя\"\r\n\\item \"I leave the guilt with you\" / \"Я оставляю вину с тобой\"\r\n\\item \"I am free from what you did\" / \"Я свободен от того, что ты сделал\"\r\n\\end{itemize}\r\n\r\n### 24. Phrases About Profession and Calling\r\n\r\nThese phrases address work, mission, and life purpose.\r\n\r\n\\begin{itemize}\r\n\\item \"I do this work in your honor\" / \"Я делаю эту работу в твою честь\"\r\n\\item \"I carry on what you began\" / \"Я продолжаю то, что ты начал\"\r\n\\item \"I find my own way\" / \"Я нахожу свой собственный путь\"\r\n\\item \"I serve something greater than myself\" / \"Я служу чему-то большему, чем я сам\"\r\n\\end{itemize}\r\n\r\n### 25. Universal Healing Phrases\r\n\r\nThese phrases have broad application across many constellation situations.\r\n\r\n\\begin{itemize}\r\n\\item \"I see you\" / \"Я вижу тебя\"\r\n\\item \"You matter\" / \"Ты важен\"\r\n\\item \"I am here now\" / \"Я здесь сейчас\"\r\n\\item \"It is what it is\" / \"Это то, что есть\"\r\n\\item \"I agree\" / \"Я согласен\"\r\n\\item \"Yes to what is\" / \"Да тому, что есть\"\r\n\\item \"I bow to the greater force\" / \"Я склоняюсь перед большей силой\"\r\n\\item \"I trust the process\" / \"Я доверяю процессу\"\r\n\\end{itemize}\r\n\r\n## Classical Resolving Phrases by Bert Hellinger\r\n\r\nThe following phrases represent core healing statements developed by Bert Hellinger and widely used in constellation work[4].\r\n\r\n\\begin{itemize}\r\n\\item \"I take you as my mother/father, and you may have me as your son/daughter\"\r\n\\item \"I honor you and your fate\"\r\n\\item \"I leave it with you, with love\"\r\n\\item \"You are the big one, I am the small one\"\r\n\\item \"Better me than you\" (in cases of blind love and entanglement)\r\n\\item \"I do it for you\" (revealing hidden entanglement)\r\n\\item \"Please look kindly upon me\"\r\n\\item \"I am only the child, you are the parent\"\r\n\\item \"What happened between you is your business\"\r\n\\item \"Now I take my life, even at the price it cost you\"\r\n\\end{itemize}\r\n\r\n## Principles for Using Healing Phrases\r\n\r\nSystemic constellation practitioners emphasize several key principles when working with healing phrases[5]:\r\n\r\n\\begin{enumerate}\r\n\\item \\textbf{Brevity and precision:} Phrases should be short, concentrated, and to the point\r\n\\item \\textbf{Timing:} Phrases must emerge from the constellation field at the right moment\r\n\\item \\textbf{Resonance:} The correct phrase creates physical and emotional resonance in representatives\r\n\\item \\textbf{Dignity:} Good phrases preserve the dignity of all involved\r\n\\item \\textbf{Context-specific:} Phrases must be adapted to the specific situation\r\n\\item \\textbf{Field-derived:} Practitioners \"read\" the appropriate phrase from the constellation field\r\n\\item \\textbf{Simplicity:} Shorter and more precise phrases are generally more effective\r\n\\end{enumerate}\r\n\r\n## How Healing Phrases Work\r\n\r\nThe primary function of healing phrases is to clarify situations and untangle entanglements through therapeutic intervention that restores healthy energy flow in the system[6]. Under the influence of healing phrases, existing negative feelings weaken, and the situation transforms to a different level. When phrases are chosen correctly, the energy of the constellation transforms the situation, bringing it closer to resolution.\r\n\r\nHealing phrases can serve two main purposes:\r\n\r\n\\begin{enumerate}\r\n\\item \\textbf{Testing:} Used to verify hypotheses about system dynamics (e.g., \"Are you my father? No. Are you my grandfather? Yes.\")\r\n\\item \\textbf{Healing instrument:} Used to reinforce and anchor therapeutic processes occurring within the client\r\n\\end{enumerate}\r\n\r\nThe phrases help energy release by respectfully acknowledging traumatic events. In some cases, appropriate ritual actions accompany the healing words. The combination of phrase and ritual creates powerful therapeutic impact when delivered with proper timing and sensitivity[7].\r\n\r\n## Conclusion\r\n\r\nThis collection represents healing sentences drawn from classical systemic constellation work as practiced by Bert Hellinger and subsequent practitioners. These phrases serve as tools for releasing entanglements, restoring order, and facilitating healing within family systems. They are most effective when spoken with awareness, respect, and sensitivity to the specific constellation context.\r\n\r\nPractitioners emphasize that no single phrase works universally – each must be adapted to the unique situation and spoken at the precise moment when the field is ready to receive it. The power of these phrases lies not in their literal meaning alone, but in their capacity to shift energetic patterns and restore flow within blocked family systems.\r\n\r\n## References\r\n\r\n[1] Rasstanovki.by.         </main>
