import { createClient } from "@/utils/supabase/server";
import { Book, Library, Search, Import } from "lucide-react";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from "@/components/ui/tabs";
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import { Card, CardContent } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
import { Progress } from "@/components/ui/progress";

export default async function LibraryPage() {
  const supabase = await createClient();

  // Fetch all user books with canonical book data and authors
  const { data: rawUserBooks } = await supabase
    .from('user_books')
    .select(`
      id,
      status,
      progress,
      rating,
      book_id,
      books (
        id,
        title,
        cover_url,
        published_year,
        book_authors (
          author_id,
          authors (
            id,
            name
          )
        )
      )
    `)
    .order('updated_at', { ascending: false });

  // Map to a friendlier format
  const userBooks = (rawUserBooks || []).map((ub: any) => ({
    id: ub.id,
    bookId: ub.books?.id,
    title: ub.books?.title || "Unknown Title",
    coverUrl: ub.books?.cover_url,
    publishedYear: ub.books?.published_year,
    authors: ub.books?.book_authors?.map((ba: any) => ba.authors?.name).filter(Boolean) || [],
    status: ub.status,
    progress: ub.progress,
    rating: ub.rating,
  }));

  const reading = userBooks.filter(b => b.status === 'reading');
  const toRead = userBooks.filter(b => b.status === 'toread');
  const finished = userBooks.filter(b => b.status === 'finished');

  const LibraryGrid = ({ items }: { items: typeof userBooks }) => {
    if (items.length === 0) {
      return (
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-24 text-center">
          <Book className="w-12 h-12 text-gray-300 mb-4" />
          <h3 className="text-xl font-medium text-gray-900 mb-2">No books found</h3>
          <p className="text-gray-500 mb-6">Your shelf is looking a bit empty.</p>
          <Button asChild variant="outline">
            <Link href="/connections">Connect a source to import</Link>
          </Button>
        </div>
      );
    }

    return (
      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-5 xl:grid-cols-6 gap-6 pt-4">
        {items.map((b) => (
          <Link href={`/book/${b.bookId}`} key={b.id} className="group flex flex-col h-full">
            <div className="relative aspect-[2/3] bg-gray-100 rounded-lg shadow-sm border border-gray-200 overflow-hidden mb-3 group-hover:shadow-md transition-all">
              {b.coverUrl ? (
                <img 
                  src={b.coverUrl} 
                  alt={b.title}
                  className="w-full h-full object-cover group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-300"
                />
              ) : (
                <div className="w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center bg-gray-50 text-gray-400">
                  <Book className="w-8 h-8 opacity-20" />
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
            
            <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col">
              <h3 className="font-semibold text-sm leading-tight text-gray-900 group-hover:text-blue-600 transition-colors line-clamp-2 mb-1" title={b.title}>
                {b.title}
              </h3>
              <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 line-clamp-1 mb-2">
                {b.authors.join(', ') || 'Unknown Author'}
              </p>
              
              <div className="mt-auto pt-2 flex items-center gap-2">
                 {b.status === 'reading' ? (
                   <div className="w-full">
                     <Progress value={b.progress > 0 ? b.progress : 5} className="h-1.5 w-full bg-blue-100" />
                     <span className="text-[10px] text-gray-400 mt-1 block">{b.progress}% completed</span>
                   </div>
                 ) : (
                   <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0 font-normal capitalize bg-gray-100 text-gray-600">
                     {b.status}
                   </Badge>
                 )}
              </div>
            </div>
          </Link>
        ))}
      </div>
    );
  };

  return (
    <main className="p-4 md:p-8 max-w-7xl mx-auto space-y-8">
      <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between gap-4">
         <div>
           <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 tracking-tight">Your Library</h1>
           <p className="text-gray-500 text-sm mt-1">Manage and read your connected books.</p>
         </div>
         
         <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
           <div className="relative">
             <Search className="absolute left-2.5 top-2.5 h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
             <Input 
               type="search" 
               placeholder="Search library..." 
               className="pl-9 w-[250px] bg-white"
             />
           </div>
           <Button variant="outline" asChild>
              <Link href="/connections"><Import className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" /> Import</Link>
           </Button>
         </div>
      </div>

      <Tabs defaultValue="all" className="w-full">
        <TabsList className="mb-4">
          <TabsTrigger value="all">All Books ({userBooks.length})</TabsTrigger>
          <TabsTrigger value="reading">Reading ({reading.length})</TabsTrigger>
          <TabsTrigger value="toread">To Read ({toRead.length})</TabsTrigger>
          <TabsTrigger value="finished">Finished ({finished.length})</TabsTrigger>
        </TabsList>
        
        <TabsContent value="all" className="mt-0">
          <LibraryGrid items={userBooks} />
        </TabsContent>
        <TabsContent value="reading" className="mt-0">
          <LibraryGrid items={reading} />
        </TabsContent>
        <TabsContent value="toread" className="mt-0">
          <LibraryGrid items={toRead} />
        </TabsContent>
        <TabsContent value="finished" className="mt-0">
          <LibraryGrid items={finished} />
        </TabsContent>
      </Tabs>
    </main>
  );
}
\n\n=======================\n\nFOUND GOOD FILE: C:\\Users\\Mykola\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\History\-c154689\gNIe.tsx\nimport Link from "next/link";
import { createClient } from "@/utils/supabase/server";
import { Book, Search, Import, FilterX, Star } from "lucide-react";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
import { Progress } from "@/components/ui/progress";

type SearchParamValue = string | string[] | undefined;

const getSingleParam = (value: SearchParamValue): string => {
  if (!value) return "";
  return Array.isArray(value) ? value[0] ?? "" : value;
};

const getNumberParam = (value: SearchParamValue): number | undefined => {
  const resolved = getSingleParam(value);
  if (!resolved) return undefined;
  const parsed = Number(resolved);
  return Number.isFinite(parsed) ? parsed : undefined;
};

const normalizeStatus = (status: string | null | undefined): "toread" | "reading" | "finished" | "abandoned" => {
  if (!status) return "toread";
  if (status === "plan_to_read") return "toread";
  if (status === "dropped") return "abandoned";
  if (status === "toread" || status === "reading" || status === "finished" || status === "abandoned") {
    return status;
  }
  return "toread";
};

interface LibraryBookItem {
  id: string;
  bookId: string | undefined;
  title: string;
  coverUrl: string | null | undefined;
  publishedYear: number | null | undefined;
  authors: string[];
  status: "toread" | "reading" | "finished" | "abandoned";
  progress: number;
  rating: number | null | undefined;
  hasLocation: boolean;
  hasSeries: boolean;
  hasFile: boolean;
  updatedAt: string | null | undefined;
  aliasMatches: string[];
}

interface RawBookAuthorLink {
  authors?: { name?: string | null } | null;
}

interface RawBookDetails {
  id?: string;
  title?: string;
  cover_url?: string | null;
  published_year?: number | null;
  book_series?: Array<{ series_id?: string }>;
  book_files?: Array<{ id?: string }>;
  book_authors?: RawBookAuthorLink[];
}

interface RawUserBookRow {
  id: string;
  books?: RawBookDetails | null;
  status?: string | null;
  reading_state?: string | null;
  progress?: number | null;
  rating?: number | null;
  reading_location?: string | null;
  updated_at?: string | null;
}

function LibraryGrid({ items }: { items: LibraryBookItem[] }) {
  if (items.length === 0) {
    return (
      <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-24 text-center">
        <Book className="w-12 h-12 text-muted-foreground mb-4" />
        <h3 className="text-xl font-medium text-foreground mb-2">No books found</h3>
        <p className="text-muted-foreground mb-6">Your shelf is looking a bit empty.</p>
        <Button asChild variant="outline">
          <Link href="/connections">Connect a source to import</Link>
        </Button>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-5 xl:grid-cols-6 gap-6 pt-4">
      {items.map((b) => (
        <div key={b.id} className="group  hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer rounded-xl p-1 flex flex-col h-full">
          <Link href={`/book/${b.bookId}`} className="block">
            <div className="relative aspect-[2/3] bg-card border border-border/50 text-card-foreground shadow-sm rounded-lg shadow-sm overflow-hidden mb-3">
              {b.coverUrl ? (
                <img
                  src={b.coverUrl}
                  alt={b.title}
                  className="w-full h-full object-cover "
                />
              ) : (
                <div className="w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center bg-muted text-muted-foreground">
                  <Book className="w-8 h-8 opacity-20" />
                </div>
              )}

              {b.rating ? (
                <div className="absolute top-2 left-2 inline-flex items-center gap-1 bg-card border border-border/50 text-card-foreground shadow-sm text-foreground text-[10px] px-2 py-1 rounded-full">
                  <Star className="w-3 h-3 fill-primary text-primary" />
                  {b.rating.toFixed(1)}
                </div>
              ) : null}
            </div>
          </Link>

          <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col">
            <Link href={`/book/${b.bookId}`}>
              <h3 className=" font-semibold text-sm leading-tight text-foreground group-hover:text-primary line-clamp-2 mb-1" title={b.title}>
                {b.title}
              </h3>
            </Link>
            <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground line-clamp-1 mb-2">
              {b.authors.join(', ') || 'Unknown Author'}
            </p>

            <div className="mt-auto pt-2 flex items-center gap-2">
              {b.status === 'reading' ? (
                <div className="w-full">
                  <Progress value={b.progress > 0 ? b.progress : 5} className="h-1.5 w-full bg-primary" />
                  <span className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground mt-1 block">{b.progress}% completed</span>
                </div>
              ) : (
                <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0 font-normal capitalize">
                  {b.status}
                </Badge>
              )}
            </div>

            {b.status === "reading" && (
              <Button variant="outline" size="sm" className="mt-2 h-7 text-xs" asChild>
                <Link href={`/read/${b.bookId}`}>
                  {b.hasLocation ? "Continue reading" : "Start reading"}
                </Link>
              </Button>
            )}

            {b.aliasMatches.length > 0 && (
              <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground mt-1">
                Alias match: {b.aliasMatches[0]}
              </p>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}

export default async function LibraryPage({
  searchParams,
}: {
  searchParams?: Promise<Record<string, SearchParamValue>>;
}) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const resolvedSearchParams = searchParams ? await searchParams : {};

  const query = getSingleParam(resolvedSearchParams.q).trim();
  const statusFilter = getSingleParam(resolvedSearchParams.status) || "all";
  const sortBy = getSingleParam(resolvedSearchParams.sort) || "updated";
  const coverFilter = getSingleParam(resolvedSearchParams.cover) || "any";
  const seriesFilter = getSingleParam(resolvedSearchParams.series) || "any";
  const fileFilter = getSingleParam(resolvedSearchParams.file) || "any";
  const completedOnly = getSingleParam(resolvedSearchParams.completed) === "1";
  const minRating = Math.min(5, Math.max(0, getNumberParam(resolvedSearchParams.min_rating) || 0));
  const minProgress = Math.min(100, Math.max(0, getNumberParam(resolvedSearchParams.min_progress) || 0));
  const yearFrom = getNumberParam(resolvedSearchParams.year_from);
  const yearTo = getNumberParam(resolvedSearchParams.year_to);

  // Fetch all user books with canonical book data and authors
  const { data: rawUserBooks } = await supabase
    .from('user_books')
    .select(`
      *,
      books (
        id,
        title,
        cover_url,
        published_year,
        book_series (
          series_id
        ),
        book_files (
          id
        ),
        book_authors (
          author_id,
          authors (
            id,
            name
          )
        )
      )
    `)
    .order('updated_at', { ascending: false });

  // Map to a friendlier format
  const typedRawUserBooks = (rawUserBooks || []) as RawUserBookRow[];
  const userBooks: LibraryBookItem[] = typedRawUserBooks.map((ub) => ({
    id: ub.id,
    bookId: ub.books?.id,
    title: ub.books?.title || "Unknown Title",
    coverUrl: ub.books?.cover_url,
    publishedYear: ub.books?.published_year,
    authors: ub.books?.book_authors?.map((ba) => ba.authors?.name).filter(Boolean) as string[] || [],
    status: normalizeStatus(ub.status || ub.reading_state),
    progress: ub.progress || 0,
    rating: ub.rating,
    hasLocation: Boolean(ub.reading_location),
    hasSeries: Boolean(ub.books?.book_series?.length),
    hasFile: Boolean(ub.books?.book_files?.length),
    updatedAt: ub.updated_at,
    aliasMatches: [],
  }));

  const totals = {
    all: userBooks.length,
    reading: userBooks.filter((b) => b.status === "reading").length,
    toread: userBooks.filter((b) => b.status === "toread").length,
    finished: userBooks.filter((b) => b.status === "finished").length,
    abandoned: userBooks.filter((b) => b.status === "abandoned").length,
  };

  const lowerQuery = query.toLowerCase();
  const aliasMatchesByBook = new Map<string, string[]>();

  if (lowerQuery) {
    const aliasRows = await supabase
      .from("book_aliases")
      .select("canonical_book_id, alias_title")
      .eq("status", "approved")
      .ilike("alias_title", `%${query}%`)
      .limit(200);

    for (const row of aliasRows.data || []) {
      const canonicalBookId = row.canonical_book_id as string;
      const aliasTitle = row.alias_title as string;
      if (!aliasMatchesByBook.has(canonicalBookId)) {
        aliasMatchesByBook.set(canonicalBookId, []);
      }
      aliasMatchesByBook.get(canonicalBookId)?.push(aliasTitle);
    }
  }

  let filteredBooks = userBooks.filter((book) => {
    if (!lowerQuery) return true;
    const haystack = `${book.title} ${book.authors.join(" ")}`.toLowerCase();
    if (haystack.includes(lowerQuery)) return true;
    if (!book.bookId) return false;
    return aliasMatchesByBook.has(book.bookId);
  });

  filteredBooks = filteredBooks.map((book) => ({
    ...book,
    aliasMatches: book.bookId ? aliasMatchesByBook.get(book.bookId) || [] : [],
  }));

  if (statusFilter !== "all") {
    filteredBooks = filteredBooks.filter((book) => book.status === statusFilter);
  }

  if (completedOnly) {
    filteredBooks = filteredBooks.filter((book) => book.status === "finished");
  }

  if (coverFilter === "with") {
    filteredBooks = filteredBooks.filter((book) => Boolean(book.coverUrl));
  } else if (coverFilter === "without") {
    filteredBooks = filteredBooks.filter((book) => !book.coverUrl);
  }

  if (seriesFilter === "with") {
    filteredBooks = filteredBooks.filter((book) => book.hasSeries);
  } else if (seriesFilter === "without") {
    filteredBooks = filteredBooks.filter((book) => !book.hasSeries);
  }

  if (fileFilter === "with") {
    filteredBooks = filteredBooks.filter((book) => book.hasFile);
  } else if (fileFilter === "without") {
    filteredBooks = filteredBooks.filter((book) => !book.hasFile);
  }

  if (minRating > 0) {
    filteredBooks = filteredBooks.filter((book) => (book.rating || 0) >= minRating);
  }

  if (minProgress > 0) {
    filteredBooks = filteredBooks.filter((book) => (book.progress || 0) >= minProgress);
  }

  if (yearFrom) {
    filteredBooks = filteredBooks.filter((book) => (book.publishedYear || 0) >= yearFrom);
  }

  if (yearTo) {
    filteredBooks = filteredBooks.filter((book) => (book.publishedYear || 9999) <= yearTo);
  }

  if (sortBy === "title") {
    filteredBooks = filteredBooks.sort((a, b) => a.title.localeCompare(b.title));
  } else if (sortBy === "progress") {
    filteredBooks = filteredBooks.sort((a, b) => b.progress - a.progress);
  } else if (sortBy === "rating") {
    filteredBooks = filteredBooks.sort((a, b) => (b.rating || 0) - (a.rating || 0));
  } else if (sortBy === "published_desc") {
    filteredBooks = filteredBooks.sort((a, b) => (b.publishedYear || 0) - (a.publishedYear || 0));
  } else if (sortBy === "published_asc") {
    filteredBooks = filteredBooks.sort((a, b) => (a.publishedYear || 0) - (b.publishedYear || 0));
  } else {
    filteredBooks = filteredBooks.sort((a, b) => {
      const aTime = a.updatedAt ? new Date(a.updatedAt).getTime() : 0;
      const bTime = b.updatedAt ? new Date(b.updatedAt).getTime() : 0;
      return bTime - aTime;
    });
  }

  const buildQuery = (overrides: Record<string, string | undefined>) => {
    const params = new URLSearchParams();
    const baseState = {
      q: query || undefined,
      status: statusFilter !== "all" ? statusFilter : undefined,
      sort: sortBy !== "updated" ? sortBy : undefined,
      cover: coverFilter !== "any" ? coverFilter : undefined,
      series: seriesFilter !== "any" ? seriesFilter : undefined,
      file: fileFilter !== "any" ? fileFilter : undefined,
      min_rating: minRating > 0 ? `${minRating}` : undefined,
      min_progress: minProgress > 0 ? `${minProgress}` : undefined,
      year_from: yearFrom ? `${yearFrom}` : undefined,
      year_to: yearTo ? `${yearTo}` : undefined,
      completed: completedOnly ? "1" : undefined,
    };

    Object.entries({ ...baseState, ...overrides }).forEach(([key, value]) => {
      if (value) {
        params.set(key, value);
      }
    });

    const queryString = params.toString();
    return queryString ? `/?${queryString}` : "/";
  };

  const statuses = [
    { id: "all", label: "All", count: totals.all },
    { id: "reading", label: "Reading", count: totals.reading },
    { id: "toread", label: "To Read", count: totals.toread },
    { id: "finished", label: "Finished", count: totals.finished },
    { id: "abandoned", label: "Dropped", count: totals.abandoned },
  ];

  return (
    <main className="p-4 md:p-8 max-w-7xl mx-auto space-y-8">
      <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between gap-4">
        <div>
          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-foreground tracking-tight">Your Library</h1>
          <p className="text-sm mt-1 text-muted-foreground">Search, filter, and continue your current reads faster.</p>
        </div>

        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
          <div className="flex bg-muted p-1 rounded-lg">
             <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" asChild className="h-8">
               <Link href="/connections"><Import className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" /> Connect</Link>
             </Button>
             <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-8">
               <Import className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" /> Local File
             </Button>
             <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-8">
               <Import className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" /> Link/API
             </Button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <form method="get" className="bg-card border border-border/50 text-card-foreground shadow-sm p-4 md:p-5 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-6 gap-3">
        <div className="md:col-span-2 relative">
          <Search className="absolute left-2.5 top-2.5 h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground" />
          <Input
            type="search"
            name="q"
            defaultValue={query}
            placeholder="Search title or author..."
            className="pl-9"
          />
        </div>

        <select
          name="status"
          defaultValue={statusFilter}
          className=" h-10 rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm"
        >
          <option value="all">All statuses</option>
          <option value="reading">Reading</option>
          <option value="toread">To Read</option>
          <option value="finished">Completed</option>
          <option value="abandoned">Dropped</option>
        </select>

        <select
          name="sort"
          defaultValue={sortBy}
          className=" h-10 rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm"
        >
          <option value="updated">Sort: Recently updated</option>
          <option value="published_desc">Sort: Newest published</option>
          <option value="published_asc">Sort: Oldest published</option>
          <option value="title">Sort: A-Z title</option>
          <option value="progress">Sort: Highest progress</option>
          <option value="rating">Sort: Highest rating</option>
        </select>

        <select
          name="cover"
          defaultValue={coverFilter}
          className=" h-10 rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm"
        >
          <option value="any">Any covers</option>
          <option value="with">With cover</option>
          <option value="without">Without cover</option>
        </select>

        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
          <label className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-foreground whitespace-nowrap">
            <input
              type="checkbox"
              name="completed"
              value="1"
              defaultChecked={completedOnly}
              className="rounded border-border"
            />
            Completed only
          </label>
          <Button type="submit" size="sm">Apply</Button>
        </div>

        <select
          name="series"
          defaultValue={seriesFilter}
          className=" h-10 rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm"
        >
          <option value="any">Any series state</option>
          <option value="with">With series</option>
          <option value="without">Standalone only</option>
        </select>

        <select
          name="file"
          defaultValue={fileFilter}
          className=" h-10 rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm"
        >
          <option value="any">Any file state</option>
          <option value="with">Readable file available</option>
          <option value="without">No local file</option>
        </select>

        <Input
          type="number"
          name="min_rating"
          min={0}
          max={5}
          step={1}
          defaultValue={minRating > 0 ? minRating : ""}
          placeholder="Min rating (1-5)"
          className=""
        />

        <Input
          type="number"
          name="min_progress"
          min={0}
          max={100}
          step={5}
          defaultValue={minProgress > 0 ? minProgress : ""}
          placeholder="Min progress %"
          className=""
        />

        <Input
          type="number"
          name="year_from"
          min={0}
          max={new Date().getFullYear()}
          defaultValue={yearFrom || ""}
          placeholder="Year from"
          className=""
        />

        <Input
          type="number"
          name="year_to"
          min={0}
          max={new Date().getFullYear()}
          defaultValue={yearTo || ""}
          placeholder="Year to"
          className=""
        />
      </form>

      <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
        {statuses.map((status) => (
          <Button
            key={status.id}
            variant={statusFilter === status.id ? "default" : "outline"}
            size="sm"
            asChild
          >
            <Link href={buildQuery({ status: status.id === "all" ? undefined : status.id })}>
              {status.label} ({status.count})
            </Link>
          </Button>
        ))}
        <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" asChild>
          <Link href="/">
            <FilterX className="w-3.5 h-3.5 mr-1.5" />
            Reset filters
          </Link>
        </Button>
        <span className="ml-auto text-sm text-muted-foreground num-tabular">
          {filteredBooks.length} result{filteredBooks.length === 1 ? "" : "s"}
        </span>
      </div>

      <LibraryGrid items={filteredBooks} />
    </main>
  );
}

import { Service } from '@/types/database';
import { BookingModal } from '@/components/BookingModal';
import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import Image from 'next/image';

export const revalidate = 0;

async function getServices() {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  
  // Try fetching from anon_services first
  let { data, error } = await supabase
    .from('anon_services')
    .select('*')
    .eq('is_active', true);

  // Fallback to services if table missing
  if (error && error.code === '42P01') {
    const res = await supabase
      .from('services')
      .select('*')
      .eq('is_active', true);
    data = res.data;
    error = res.error;
  }

  if (error) {
    console.error('Error fetching services:', error);
    return [];
  }

  return data as Service[];
}

export default async function Home() {
  const services = await getServices();

  return (
    <main className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
      <header className="bg-white shadow">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto py-6 px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900">Eka Booking</h1>
        </div>
      </header>
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto py-6 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
        <div className="px-4 py-6 sm:px-0">
          <div className="mb-8">
            <h2 className="text-2xl font-semibold text-gray-800 mb-4">Available Services</h2>
            {services && services.length > 0 ? (
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
                {services.map((service) => (
                  <Card key={service.id} className="overflow-hidden">
                    {service.image_url && (
                      <div className="relative h-48 w-full">
                        <Image className="object-cover" src={service.image_url} alt={service.name} fill />
                      </div>
                    )}
                    <CardHeader>
                      <CardTitle>{service.name}</CardTitle>
                      <CardDescription>
                        {service.description}
                        {(service.location || service.version) && (
                          <div className="mt-2 flex gap-2 text-xs text-gray-500">
                            {service.location && (
                              <span className="inline-flex items-center px-2 py-1 rounded-full bg-gray-100">
                                📍 {service.location}
                              </span>
                            )}
                            {service.version && (
                              <span className="inline-flex items-center px-2 py-1 rounded-full bg-blue-50 text-blue-700">
                                🏷️ {service.version}
                              </span>
                            )}
                          </div>
                        )}
                      </CardDescription>
                    </CardHeader>
                    <CardContent>
                      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                        <span className="text-xl font-bold text-indigo-600">${service.price}</span>
                        <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">{service.duration} mins</span>
                      </div>
                    </CardContent>
                    <CardFooter>
                      <BookingModal service={service} />
                    </CardFooter>
                  </Card>
                ))}
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="text-center py-12 bg-white rounded-lg shadow">
                <p className="text-gray-500">No services found. Please check your connection or add services to the database.</p>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-400 mt-2">Make sure you have set up your .env.local file with Supabase credentials.</p>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </main>
  );
}

Isolate them in actions.ts per feature.\r\nService Layer: Business logic MUST live in packages/core-services or server/services, NOT in UI components or route handlers.\r\nState Management\r\n\r\nServer State: Use TanStack Query (React Query) for all fetch data. Do not use useEffect for data fetching.\r\nLocal State: useState / useReducer for interaction state.\r\nGlobal State: Zustand ONLY for cross-feature session data (e.g., User Session, Shopping Cart). Avoid putting API data in global stores.\r\nForbidden Patterns\r\n\r\nNo \"utils\" folders: Name files by what they do (date-formatter.ts, currency.ts), not a dumping ground named utils/.\r\nNo Props Drilling: Use Composition or Context for >2 levels of depth.\r\nNo Component Logic: UI components must be \"dumb\". Logic goes to Custom Hooks or Server Actions.\r\nSo Ture: No \"any\" types. Strict mode enabled.\r\nRebuild Spec v1.0\r\n1) Executive Summary\r\nThe App: EKA is a holistic wellness platform integrating therapy booking, educational content (Academy), and personal progress tracking into a single \"Bento-style\" dashboard.\r\nWho it’s for: Individuals seeking wellness (Clients), Mental Health Professionals (Therapists), and Content Creators (Educators).\r\nPrimary Value: Semantic integration of \"Doing\" (Booking/Tasks) and \"Learning\" (Academy) in one cohesive, gamified profile, removing the friction between therapy sessions and homework.\r\nSuccess Metrics:\r\nTime-to-booking < 60 seconds.\r\n80% task completion rate on \"Morphing Task Manager\".\r\n<200ms API latency on dashboard load.\r\n2) Personas & Roles\r\nRole: Client (Patient)\r\nGoals: Improve mental health, easily book sessions, consume assigned content.\r\nPermissions: Read own profile, Create bookings, Read public directory, Purchase credits.\r\nData Access: Own records, own medical notes (if shared), public provider profiles.\r\nTop 5 Tasks:\r\nCheck \"Next Session\" status.\r\nBook a new therapy appointment.\r\nComplete a \"Wellness Task\" (e.g., Journaling).\r\nWatch an Academy lesson.\r\nTop up Wallet.\r\nRole: Therapist (Provider)\r\nGoals: Manage schedule efficiency, document sessions (SOAP notes), get paid.\r\nPermissions: Read/Write all client notes (assigned to them), Manage availability, Issue invoices.\r\nData Access: All assigned client PII, Session history, Financial reports (own).\r\nTop 5 Tasks:\r\nReview \"Daily Briefing\" roster.\r\nWrite/Edit Session Notes.\r\nSet weekly availability slots.\r\nAssign Academy content to clients.\r\nWithdraw earnings.\r\nRole: Admin\r\nGoals: Platform health, dispute resolution, user management.\r\nPermissions: Root access.\r\nData Access: Global.\r\nTop 5 Tasks:\r\nApprove/Verify new Therapist applications.\r\nManage CMS content (Marketing).\r\nView Global Financial Health.\r\nResolve support tickets.\r\nManage Feature Flags.\r\n3) Core Jobs-To-Be-Done (Prioritized)\r\nClient\r\n\r\nP0: When I log in, I want to see my next appointment immediately, so I don't miss my session.\r\nP0: When I browse the directory, I want to filter by specialty, so I find a relevant therapist.\r\nP1: When I finish a session, I want to see a summary task list, so I know what to practice.\r\nP1: When I pay, I want to use a credit balance, so I don't enter card details every time.\r\nTherapist\r\n\r\nP0: When I access a client profile, I want to see their homework progress, so I can discuss it in session.\r\nP0: When I end a session, I want to quickly draft notes from a template, so I save admin time.\r\nP1: When I have a cancellation, I want to be notified, so I can open the slot.\r\nAdmin\r\n\r\nP0: When a therapist signs up, I want to review their credentials, so I can approve them safely.\r\n4) Information Architecture\r\nGlobal Nav (Responsive)\r\n\r\nClient: Dashboard (Home) | Booking | Academy | Progress | Wallet | Profile\r\nTherapist: Dashboard | Clients | Calendar | Notes | Finance | Settings\r\nAdmin: Overview | Users | CMS | Finance | System\r\nUI Patterns\r\n\r\nDashboard: \"Bento Grid\" layout (Modular cards: Status, Task, Calendar, Stats).\r\nLists: Virtualized infinite scroll for efficiency.\r\nLoading: Skeleton screens matching the Bento layout (no spinners).\r\nFeedback: \"Morphing Buttons\" for all commit actions (Idle -> Loading -> Success checkmark).\r\n5) User Flows (P0)\r\nFlow: Booking a Session\r\n\r\nEntry: Client clicks \"Book Session\" on Dashboard or \"Booking\" tab.\r\nStep 1: Filter/Search Therapist List (Specialty, Price, Availability).\r\nStep 2: Select Therapist -> View Availability Calendar.\r\nStep 3: Select Time Slot -> Confirm Details.\r\nStep 4: Payment (Wallet Deduction or Stripe Checkout).\r\nSuccess: \"Morphing\" confirmation -> Redirect to Dashboard with updated \"Next Session\" card.\r\nFailure: \"Slot taken\" toast -> Refresh calendar.\r\nFlow: Writing Session Notes\r\n\r\nEntry: Therapist Sidebar \"Session Notes\" or Dashboard \"Recent Sessions\".\r\nStep 1: Select Client from Roster.\r\nStep 2: Click \"New Note\" -> Select Template (SOAP/Free text).\r\nStep 3: Write Content (Auto-save every 30s).\r\nStep 4: Toggle \"Share with Client\" (Optional).\r\nStep 5: Click \"Finalize & Sign\".\r\nSuccess: Note moves to Read-Only history.\r\n6) Feature List\r\nFeature Name\tDescription\tPriority\tRoles\tDependencies\tAcceptance Criteria\r\nSmart Dashboard\tBento grid with dynamic \"Next Session\" and \"Task\" cards.\tP0\tAll\tAuth, Calendar\t- Shows next session countdown.<br>- Shows top 3 pending tasks.<br>- Welcomes user by name + time of day.\r\nBooking Engine\tCalendar view, slot selection, conflict checks.\tP0\tClient\tStripe, DB\t- Prevents double booking.<br>- Displays therapist timezone correctly.<br>- Confirms via email.\r\nDigital Wallet\tPrepaid credit system (buy credits, spend credits).\tP1\tClient\tStripe\t- Top-up via Stripe.<br>- Deduct credits for booking.<br>- View transaction history.\r\nSession Notes\tStandardized clinical note-taking with templates.\tP0\tTherapist\tNone\t- Supports SOAP format.<br>- Auto-saves drafts.<br>- Secure permissions (Therapist only unless shared).\r\nAcademy Player\tVideo/Text lesson viewer with meaningful progress tracking.\tP1\tClient\tExternal Video\t- Embeds video (YouTube/Vimeo).<br>- Mark as \"Complete\" button.<br>- Progress bar updates.\r\nTherapist Roster\tSearchable directory of clients for providers.\tP1\tTherapist\tNone\t- Search by name.<br>- Click to view Profile/History.\r\nAdmin CMS\tEditor for marketing pages/blogs.\tP2\tAdmin\tNone\t- Edit H1/Body text of landing page.<br>- Publish/Unpublish toggle.\r\n7) Detailed Module Specs\r\nModule: Booking\r\n\r\nPurpose: Connect supply (slots) with demand (clients).\r\nScreens: ServiceCatalog, TherapistProfile, SlotPicker, Checkout.\r\nState: selectedService, selectedDate, selectedSlot.\r\nEdge Cases: Slot taken while paying; Card declined; Timezone confusion.\r\nTelemetry: booking_started, slot_selected, payment_success, booking_completed.\r\nModule: Academy\r\n\r\nPurpose: Deliver educational value.\r\nScreens: CourseLibrary, LessonView, CourseDetail.\r\nComponents: VideoPlayerWrapper, ProgressBar, NextLessonButton.\r\nEdge Cases: Video deleted at source; Offline network status.\r\n8) Data Model (Canonical)\r\nEntities\r\n\r\nUser: id (UUID), email, role (enum), profile (JSONB).\r\nService: id, name, duration_min, price_cents, therapist_id (FK).\r\nBooking: id, client_id (FK), service_id (FK), start_time (ISO), status (confirmed/cancelled/completed), meeting_url.\r\nNote: id, booking_id (FK), content (searchable text), is_shared (bool), template_type.\r\nWalletTransaction: id, user_id, amount_credits, type (credit/debit), reference_id.\r\nTask: id, user_id, title, due_date, status (pending/done).\r\nRelationships\r\n\r\nUser (Therapist) 1 : N Services\r\nUser (Client) 1 : N Bookings\r\nBooking 1 : 1 Note\r\n9) API/Backend Contract\r\nEndpoints\r\n\r\nPOST /auth/login (Supabase handled)\r\nGET /api/v1/dashboard/summary - Aggregated user status.\r\nGET /api/v1/services - List with filters (offset/limit pagination).\r\nPOST /api/v1/bookings - Create booking (Idempotency Key required).\r\nGET /api/v1/bookings/upcoming - Filtered list.\r\nPOST /api/v1/wallet/topup - Initiate Stripe intent.\r\nConventions\r\n\r\nResponses: { data: T | null, error: { code: string, message: string } | null }\r\nDates: UTC ISO 8601 strings.\r\nRate Limit: 100 req/min/IP.\r\n10) Permissions & Security Model\r\nRBAC:\r\nRow Level Security (RLS) in Supabase is the enforcement layer.\r\nbookings: Clients see OWN; Therapists see ASSIGNED; Admins see ALL.\r\nnotes: Therapists see OWN created; Clients see ONLY is_shared = true.\r\nAudit: Log all DELETE operations and wallet transactions to audit_logs table (immutable).\r\nSensitive Data: PII (Notes) encrypted at rest (Postgres default).\r\n11) Notifications & Messaging\r\nTriggers:\r\nBooking Confirmed -> Email + In-App.\r\n15 min before Session -> Push + Telegram (if linked).\r\nNote Shared -> In-App.\r\nFrequency Caps: Max 1 marketing push per week. Transactional emails unlimited.\r\n12) Search, Filters, Sorting\r\nTherapist Search: Full-text search on Name, Bio. Filter by Tags (CBT, EMDR).\r\nNotes Search: Full-text search on content (Therapist only).\r\nSort: Date (Desc default), Price (Asc/Desc).\r\n13) Offline/Sync\r\nStrategy: \"Network-First, Cache-Fallback\".\r\nDashboard: Show last cached state if offline (using React Query/Persist).\r\nActions: Disable write actions (Booking/Payment) when offline.\r\n14) Performance & Scalability Targets\r\nDashboard LCP: < 1.5s on 4G.\r\nAPI Response: < 200ms p95.\r\nConcurrency: Support 1000 concurrent bookings.\r\n15) UX/UI Spec Rules\r\nDesign System: shadcn/ui + Tailwind.\r\nTypography: Sans-serif (Inter/Geist). Readable size (base 16px).\r\nAccessibility: WCAG AA. Keyboard navigable.\r\nAnimation: \"Enter\" animations (Framer Motion) on page load. \"Morph\" on actions.\r\n16) Logging, Analytics, Observability\r\nEvents: user_signup, booking_funnel_stepX, task_completed.\r\nError Reporting: Capture unhandled exceptions with Sentry.\r\nConsole Logs: Forbidden in production.\r\n17) File Storage & Media\r\nProvider: Supabase Storage.\r\nBuckets: avatars (public), notes_attachments (private, authenticated URL).\r\nLimits: Max 5MB per upload. Images/PDFs only.\r\n18) Payments & Billing\r\nGateway: Stripe.\r\nModel: Pre-paid \"Credits\" (stored as integer in DB) OR Direct Pay.\r\nFailure: Webhook listener updates status to payment_failed. import { Service } from '@/types/database';
import { BookingModal } from '@/components/BookingModal';
import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import Image from 'next/image';

export const revalidate = 0;

async function getServices() {
  const { data, error } = await listServices();

  if (error) {
    console.error('Error fetching services:', error);
    return [];
  }

  // Map 'active' to 'is_active' for compatibility if needed
  return (data || []).map(s => ({ ...s, is_active: s.active })) as Service[];
}

export default async function Home() {
  const services = await getServices();

  return (
    <main className="min-h-screen bg-background">
      <header className="bg-card shadow-sm border-b">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto py-6 px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-foreground">Eka Booking</h1>
        </div>
      </header>
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto py-6 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
        <div className="px-4 py-6 sm:px-0">
          <div className="mb-8">
            <h2 className="text-2xl font-semibold text-foreground mb-4">Available Services</h2>
            {services && services.length > 0 ? (
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
                {services.map((service) => (
                  <Card key={service.id} className="overflow-hidden">
                    {service.image_url && (
                      <div className="relative h-48 w-full">
                        <Image className="object-cover" src={service.image_url} alt={service.name} fill />
                      </div>
                    )}
                    <CardHeader>
                      <CardTitle>{service.name}</CardTitle>
                      <CardDescription>
                        {service.description}
                        {(service.location || service.version) && (
                          <div className="mt-2 flex gap-2 text-xs text-gray-500">
                            {service.location && (
                              <span className="inline-flex items-center px-2 py-1 rounded-full bg-gray-100">
                                📍 {service.location}
                              </span>
                            )}
                            {service.version && (
                              <span className="inline-flex items-center px-2 py-1 rounded-full bg-blue-50 text-blue-700">
                                🏷️ {service.version}
                              </span>
                            )}
                          </div>
                        )}
                      </CardDescription>
                    </CardHeader>
                    <CardContent>
                      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                        <span className="text-xl font-bold text-indigo-600">${service.price}</span>
                        <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">{service.duration} mins</span>
                      </div>
                    </CardContent>
                    <CardFooter>
                      <BookingModal service={service} />
                    </CardFooter>
                  </Card>
                ))}
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="text-center py-12 bg-white rounded-lg shadow">
                <p className="text-gray-500">No services found. Please check your connection or add services to the database.</p>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-400 mt-2">Make sure you have set up your .env.local file with Supabase credentials.</p>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </main>
  );
}

export default async function Home() {
  const services = await getServices();

  return (
    <main className="min-h-screen bg-background flex flex-col">
      <header className="bg-card shadow-sm border-b sticky top-0 z-10">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto py-4 px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 flex justify-between items-center">
          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-primary">Eka Booking</h1>
          <nav>
            <Button variant="ghost">Sign In</Button>
          </nav>
        </div>
      </header>

      <section className="bg-primary/5 py-20">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 text-center">
          <h2 className="text-4xl font-extrabold text-foreground sm:text-5xl sm:tracking-tight lg:text-6xl">
            Book Your Next Session
          </h2>
          <p className="mt-5 max-w-xl mx-auto text-xl text-muted-foreground">
            Professional services at your fingertips. Schedule your appointment today with our easy-to-use booking system.
          </p>
        </div>
      </section>

      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto py-12 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 flex-grow w-full">
        <div className="px-4 sm:px-0">
          <div className="mb-8">
            <h3 className="text-2xl font-semibold text-foreground mb-6">Available Services</h3>
            {services && services.length > 0 ? (
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
                {services.map((service) => (
                  <Card key={service.id} className="overflow-hidden flex flex-col h-full hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow duration-200">
                    {service.image_url && (
                      <div className="relative h-48 w-full">
                        <Image className="object-cover" src={service.image_url} alt={service.name} fill />
                      </div>
                    )}
                    <CardHeader>
                      <div className="flex justify-between items-start">
                        <CardTitle className="text-xl">{service.name}</CardTitle>
                        <span className="text-lg font-bold text-primary">${service.price}</span>
                      </div>
                      <CardDescription className="line-clamp-3">
                        {service.description}
                      </CardDescription>
                      {(service.location || service.version) && (
                        <div className="mt-2 flex gap-2 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                          {service.location && (
                            <span className="inline-flex items-center px-2 py-1 rounded-full bg-secondary">
                              📍 {service.location}
                            </span>
                          )}
                          {service.version && (
                            <span className="inline-flex items-center px-2 py-1 rounded-full bg-accent text-accent-foreground">
                              🏷️ {service.version}
                            </span>
                          )}
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </CardHeader>
                    <CardContent className="flex-grow">
                      <div className="flex items-center text-sm text-muted-foreground">
                        <span className="mr-2">⏱️</span>
                        <span>{service.duration} mins</span>
                      </div>
                    </CardContent>
                    <CardFooter className="mt-auto">
                      <BookingModal service={service} />
                    </CardFooter>
                  </Card>
                ))}
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="text-center py-16 bg-muted/30 rounded-lg border border-dashed">
                <p className="text-muted-foreground text-lg">No services found.</p>
                <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mt-2">Please check back later or contact support.</p>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <Footer />
    </main>
  );
}

async function getServices() {
  const { data, error } = await listServices();

  if (error) {
    console.error('Error fetching services:', error);
    return [];
  }

  return (data || []) as Service[];
}

import { Service } from '@/types/database';
import { PrototypeServiceCard } from '@/components/booking/PrototypeServiceCard';

export const revalidate = 0;

async function getServices() {
  const { data, error } = await listServices();

  if (error) {
    console.error('Error fetching services:', error);
    return [];
  }

  return (data || []) as Service[];
}

export default async function Home() {
  const services = await getServices();

  return (
    <div className="relative flex h-auto min-h-screen w-full flex-col bg-background-dark text-slate-200 overflow-x-hidden font-display">

            <div className="size-10 flex items-center justify-center text-primary rounded-full bg-surface-highlight border border-border-subtle">
              <Flower className="w-6 h-6" />

              <Link className="text-slate-400 text-sm font-medium hover:text-primary transition-colors" href="#booking">Services</Link>

              <span className="truncate">Book Now</span>
            </Link>
          </div>
        </header>
      </div>

      {/* Hero Section */}
      <div className="flex flex-col">
        <div className="px-4 py-8 md:px-10 lg:px-20 xl:px-40 flex flex-1 justify-center">
          <div className="layout-content-container flex flex-col max-w-270 flex-1">

import { Service } from '@/types/database';
import { ServiceCard } from '@/components/booking/ServiceCard';
import { Flower } from "lucide-react";

// Revalidate every 60 seconds - good balance of freshness and performance
export const revalidate = 60;

// Generate static params for common services
export const dynamic = 'force-static';
export const dynamicParams = true;

async function getServices(): Promise<Service[]> {
  const { data, error } = await listServices();

  if (error) {
    console.error('Error fetching services:', error);
    return [];
  }

  return (data || []) as Service[];
}

export default async function Home() {
  const services = await getServices();

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-background-dark text-slate-200 font-display p-6 md:p-12 flex flex-col items-center">
      <div className="w-full max-w-6xl flex flex-col gap-12">
        
        {/* Simple Header */}
        <header className="flex flex-col items-center gap-4 text-center">
          <div className="size-16 flex items-center justify-center text-primary rounded-full bg-surface-highlight border border-border-subtle">
            <Flower className="w-8 h-8" />
          </div>
          <h1 className="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-serif text-primary">Select a Service</h1>
          <p className="text-slate-400 max-w-lg">
            Choose a service below to start your booking process.
          </p>
        </header>

        {/* Service Grid */}
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
          {services.length > 0 ? (
            services.map((service) => (
              <ServiceCard key={service.id} service={service} />
            ))
          ) : (
            <div className="col-span-full text-center py-12 text-slate-500">
              No services available at the moment.
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

\n\n=======================\n\nFOUND GOOD FILE: C:\\Users\\Mykola\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\History\1dba8103\XvwE.tsx\n﻿import { listServices } from '@/server/booking/service';
import { getWallet, getUpcomingBookings, getTherapistDailySchedule } from '@/server/dashboard/service';
import { Service } from '@/types/database';
import { ServiceCard } from '@/components/booking/ServiceCard';
import { Flower } from "lucide-react";
import { createClient } from '@/lib/supabase/server';
import { ClientDashboard } from '@/components/dashboard/ClientDashboard';
import { TherapistDashboard } from '@/components/dashboard/TherapistDashboard';

// Dynamic because we check auth
export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';

async function getServices(): Promise<Service[]> {
  const { data, error } = await listServices();
  if (error) return [];
  return (data || []) as Service[];
}

export default async function Home() {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  let profile = null;
  if (user) {
    const { data } = await supabase
      .from('profiles')
      .select('*')
      .eq('auth_id', user.id)
      .single();
    profile = data;
  }

  // 1. Therapist View
  if (profile?.role === 'therapist' || profile?.role === 'admin') {
     const todaySchedule = await getTherapistDailySchedule(profile.id); // Assuming profile.id links correctly
     return <TherapistDashboard schedule={todaySchedule} />;
  }

  // 2. Client View (Authenticated)
  if (profile?.role === 'client') {
      const wallet = await getWallet(profile.id);
      const nextBooking = await getUpcomingBookings(profile.id);
      
      // If client has NO history and NO Onboarding, maybe show onboarding nudge?
      // For now, standard dashboard.
      return <ClientDashboard profile={profile} wallet={wallet} nextBooking={nextBooking} />;
  }

  // 3. Guest View (Service List)
  const services = await getServices();

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-background text-foreground font-display p-6 md:p-12 flex flex-col items-center">
      <div className="w-full max-w-6xl flex flex-col gap-12">
        
        {/* Simple Header */}
        <header className="flex flex-col items-center gap-4 text-center mt-12">
          <div className="size-20 flex items-center justify-center text-primary rounded-full bg-primary/10 border border-primary/20 shadow-lg backdrop-blur-sm">
            <Flower className="w-10 h-10" />
          </div>
          <h1 className="text-4xl md:text-5xl font-serif text-foreground tracking-tight">Elena V. Bodywork</h1>
          <p className="text-muted-foreground text-lg max-w-lg leading-relaxed">
            Restoring balance through structural integration and intuitive therapy.
          </p>
        </header>

        {/* Service Grid */}
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
          {services.length > 0 ? (
            services.map((service) => (
              <ServiceCard key={service.id} service={service} />
            ))
          ) : (
            <div className="col-span-full text-center py-20 text-muted-foreground bg-muted/20 rounded-3xl">
              No services available at the moment.
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

   return <ClientDashboard profile={profile} wallet={wallet} nextBooking={nextBooking} />;

   </div>

export default async function Home() {
 const supabase = await createClient();
 const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

 let profile = null;
 if (user) {
  const { data } = await supabase
   .from('profiles')
   .select('*')
   .eq('auth_id', user.id)
   .single();
  profile = data;
 }

 // 1. Therapist View
 if (profile?.role === 'therapist' || profile?.role === 'admin') {
   const todaySchedule = await getTherapistDailySchedule(profile.id);
   return <TherapistDashboard schedule={todaySchedule} />;
 }

   const wallet = await getWallet(profile.id);
   const nextBookings = await getUpcomingBookings(profile.id);
   // Assuming getUpcomingBookings returns an array, pick the first one
   const nextBooking = Array.isArray(nextBookings) ? nextBookings[0] : nextBookings;
   return <ClientDashboard profile={profile} wallet={wallet} nextBooking={nextBooking} />;
 }

 // 3. Redirect unauthenticated users to the main website
 redirect('http://localhost:9002');
}

 let profile = null;
 if (user) {

   .from('profiles')

   .eq('auth_id', user.id)
   .single();
  profile = data;

 }

   const wallet = await getWallet(profile.id);
   const nextBookings = await getUpcomingBookings(profile.id);
   const singleTherapist = await getSingleActiveTherapist();
   const exerciseStats = await getClientExerciseStats(profile.id);

   // Assuming getUpcomingBookings returns an array, pick the first one
   const nextBooking = Array.isArray(nextBookings) ? nextBookings[0] : nextBookings;

export default function BookingAppFeatures() {
  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold">Booking Application Features</h1>
      <p className="text-lg text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-300">
        The Booking Application (`apps/booking-app`) is a specialized micro-app designed to handle the complex logic of scheduling, payments, and service management.
        It follows a Service Layer pattern to separate business logic from API routes.
      </p>

      <section>
        <h2 className="text-2xl font-semibold mb-4">Architecture</h2>
        <div className="p-4 border rounded-lg bg-gray-50 dark:bg-zinc-900 border-gray-200 dark:border-zinc-800">
          <h3 className="text-xl font-medium mb-2">Layered Design</h3>
          <ul className="list-disc list-inside space-y-2 text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400">
            <li><strong>API Routes (`app/api/*`)</strong>: Minimal request parsing and response shaping.</li>
            <li><strong>Service Layer (`server/booking/*`)</strong>: Core business logic and database interactions.</li>
            <li><strong>Infrastructure (`lib/*`)</strong>: Clients, token management, and configuration.</li>
            <li><strong>Data Schema</strong>: Supabase SQL schema as the source of truth.</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </section>

      <section>
        <h2 className="text-2xl font-semibold mb-4">Core Features</h2>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
          <FeatureCard
            title="Booking Management"
            description="Full lifecycle management: Pending -> Captured -> Managed -> Completed/Canceled."
          />
          <FeatureCard
            title="Availability Engine"
            description="Dynamic slot generation based on staff schedules, buffers, and blackout windows."
          />
          <FeatureCard
            title="Payments"
            description="Integrated checkout flows with Stripe and Square, including refund handling."
          />
          <FeatureCard
            title="Service Catalog"
            description="Management of services, pricing, and variants."
          />
        </div>
      </section>

      <section>
        <h2 className="text-2xl font-semibold mb-4">Integrations</h2>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
          <FeatureCard
            title="Telegram"
            description="Integration for notifications or bot interactions."
          />
          <FeatureCard
            title="Stripe Webhooks"
            description="Real-time updates for payment status and subscription events."
          />
        </div>
      </section>

      <section>
        <h2 className="text-2xl font-semibold mb-4">Security & Performance</h2>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">

          />

      </section>
    </div>
  );
}

\n\n=======================\n\nFOUND GOOD FILE: C:\\Users\\Mykola\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\History\2ec348c7\dtPs.tsx\n'use client';

import { useState } from 'react';
import { useAuth } from '@/context/auth-context';
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
import Link from 'next/link';

export default function Home() {
  const [email, setEmail] = useState('');
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [message, setMessage] = useState<{ type: 'success' | 'error', text: string } | null>(null);
  const { signInWithEmail } = useAuth();
  const router = useRouter();

  const handleLogin = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setLoading(true);
    setMessage(null);

    const { error } = await signInWithEmail(email);

    if (error) {
      setMessage({ type: 'error', text: error.message });
    } else {
      setMessage({ type: 'success', text: 'Check your email for the login link!' });
    }
    setLoading(false);
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center">
      <div className="bg-surface p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-xl max-w-md w-full text-center">
        <h1 className="text-3xl font-display font-bold mb-4">Kucherov Studio</h1>
        <p className="text-secondary mb-8">Intranet Access Portal</p>
        
        {message && (
          <div className={`mb-6 p-4 rounded-lg text-sm ${message.type === 'error' ? 'bg-red-50 text-red-600' : 'bg-green-50 text-green-600'}`}>
            {message.text}
          </div>
        )}

        <form onSubmit={handleLogin} className="space-y-4 text-left">
          <div>
            <label htmlFor="email" className="block text-sm font-medium text-secondary mb-1">Email Address</label>
            <input
              id="email"
              type="email"
              value={email}
              onChange={(e) => setEmail(e.target.value)}
              className="w-full px-4 py-3 bg-surface-container border-0 rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 outline-none"
              placeholder="name@kucherovstudio.com"
              required
            />
          </div>

          <button 
            type="submit"
            disabled={loading}
            className="block w-full py-3 px-4 bg-primary text-white rounded-xl font-medium hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity disabled:opacity-50"
          >
            {loading ? 'Sending link...' : 'Send Magic Link'}
          </button>
        </form>
          
        <div className="mt-8 text-sm text-secondary">
          <Link href="https://kucherovstudio.com" className="hover:text-primary">
            &larr; Back to Main Site
          </Link>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

                  borderRadius: '999px',
                  backgroundColor: status.connected ? '#dcfce7' : '#fee2e2',
                  color: status.connected ? '#166534' : '#991b1b'

                  {status.connected ? 'Connected' : 'Disconnected'}
                </span>

                {status.description}
              </p>
              <div style={{ fontSize: '0.8rem', color: '#666' }}>
                <div>Provider: {status.provider}</div>
                {status.details && Object.keys(status.details).length > 0 && (
                  <div style={{ marginTop: '0.5rem', paddingTop: '0.5rem', borderTop: '1px solid #eee' }}>
                    {Object.entries(status.details).map(([key, value]) => (

                        <span>{key}:</span>
                        <span>{String(value)}</span>
                      </div>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </main>
    </div>
  );

export default function HomePage() {
  const { isAuthenticated, user } = useSimpleAuth()
  const router = useRouter()

  // Auto-redirect authenticated users to home/dashboard
  useEffect(() => {
    if (isAuthenticated && user) {
      // Check if user has completed onboarding
      if (!user.personalizationCompleted) {
        router.push('/onboarding')
      } else {
        // Use auth-dispatch to handle role-based routing
        router.push('/auth-dispatch')
      }
    }
  }, [isAuthenticated, user, router])

  if (isAuthenticated) {
    return (
      <PageContainer>
        <SurfacePanel className="flex items-center justify-center">
          <div className="text-center space-y-4">
            <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-12 w-12 border-b-2 border-primary mx-auto"></div>

import { Sparkles, Heart, Shield, Zap, Brain, Users, BookOpen, TrendingUp, Calendar, MessageSquare, Target, Award } from 'lucide-react'
import { FeatureGrid } from '@/components/landing/feature-card'
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation'
import { useEffect } from 'react'
import dynamic from 'next/dynamic'
import { PageContainer } from '@/components/eka/page-container'
import { SurfacePanel } from '@/components/eka/surface-panel'
import { HeroSection } from '@/components/landing/hero-section'

const MedicalDisclaimer = dynamic(() => import('@/components/medical-disclaimer'), { ssr: false })

export default function HomePage() {
  const { isAuthenticated, user } = useSimpleAuth()
  const router = useRouter()

  // Auto-redirect authenticated users to home/dashboard
  useEffect(() => {
    if (isAuthenticated && user) {
      // Check if user has completed onboarding
      if (!user.personalizationCompleted) {
        router.push('/onboarding')
      } else {
        // Use auth-dispatch to handle role-based routing
        router.push('/auth-dispatch')
      }
    }
  }, [isAuthenticated, user, router])

  if (isAuthenticated) {
    return (
      <PageContainer>
        <SurfacePanel className="flex items-center justify-center">
          <div className="text-center space-y-4">
            <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-12 w-12 border-b-2 border-primary mx-auto"></div>
            <p className="text-muted-foreground">Redirecting to your dashboard...</p>
          </div>
        </SurfacePanel>
      </PageContainer>
    )
  }

  return (
    <PageContainer>
      <SurfacePanel>
      {/* Hero Section */}
      <HeroSection />

      {/* Features Section */}
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto py-16 px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
        <motion.div
          initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
          animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
          transition={{ duration: 0.6 }}
          className="text-center mb-12"
        >
          <h2 className="text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-bold mb-4">
            Everything You Need for Wellness
          </h2>
          <p className="text-lg text-muted-foreground max-w-2xl mx-auto">
            Comprehensive tools designed to support your mental and physical health journey
          </p>
        </motion.div>
        
        <FeatureGrid
          features={[
            {
              icon: Brain,
              title: 'AI-Powered Insights',
              description: 'Get personalized recommendations and insights based on your wellness patterns and progress.',
            },
            {
              icon: Users,
              title: 'Therapist Connect',
              description: 'Book sessions, manage appointments, and communicate with licensed therapists seamlessly.',
            },
            {
              icon: Heart,
              title: 'Mood & Progress Tracking',
              description: 'Log daily moods, track wellness goals, and visualize your journey with intuitive charts.',
            },
            {
              icon: BookOpen,
              title: 'Digital Journaling',
              description: 'Private, secure journaling space to reflect on thoughts, feelings, and daily experiences.',
            },
            {
              icon: TrendingUp,
              title: 'Goal Management',
              description: 'Set wellness goals, track milestones, and celebrate achievements along your journey.',
            },
            {
              icon: Calendar,
              title: 'Session Scheduling',
              description: 'Easy appointment booking with automated reminders and calendar integration.',
            },
            {
              icon: MessageSquare,
              title: 'Secure Messaging',
              description: 'Communicate privately with your care team through encrypted messaging.',
            },
            {
              icon: Shield,
              title: 'Privacy First',
              description: 'Bank-level encryption ensures your data stays private and secure.',
            },
          ]}
          columns={{ sm: 2, md: 2, lg: 4 }}
        />
      </div>

      {/* How It Works Section */}
      <div className="bg-muted/50 py-16">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
          <motion.div
            initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
            whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
            viewport={{ once: true }}
            transition={{ duration: 0.6 }}
            className="text-center mb-12"
          >
            <h2 className="text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-bold mb-4">
              How It Works
            </h2>
            <p className="text-lg text-muted-foreground max-w-2xl mx-auto">
              Get started with your wellness journey in three simple steps
            </p>
          </motion.div>

          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
            {[
              {
                step: '1',
                title: 'Create Your Account',
                description: 'Sign up in seconds with email or social login. Complete a quick personalization survey to tailor your experience.',
                icon: Users,
              },
              {
                step: '2',
                title: 'Set Your Goals',
                description: 'Define wellness objectives, connect with therapists, and configure your tracking preferences.',
                icon: Target,
              },
              {
                step: '3',
                title: 'Track & Improve',
                description: 'Log daily moods, attend sessions, get AI insights, and watch your progress grow over time.',
                icon: Award,
              },
            ].map((item, index) => (
              <motion.div
                key={item.step}
                initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
                whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
                viewport={{ once: true }}
                transition={{ duration: 0.6, delay: index * 0.2 }}
              >
                <Card className="relative h-full">
                  <CardHeader>
                    <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
                      <div className="flex h-12 w-12 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-primary text-primary-foreground text-xl font-bold">
                        {item.step}
                      </div>
                      <div className="flex-1">
                        <CardTitle className="text-xl mb-2">{item.title}</CardTitle>
                        <CardDescription>{item.description}</CardDescription>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </CardHeader>
                  <CardContent>
                    <div className="flex justify-center">
                      <item.icon className="h-16 w-16 text-muted-foreground/20" />
                    </div>
                  </CardContent>
                </Card>
              </motion.div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* CTA Section */}
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto py-16 px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
        <motion.div
          initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
          whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
          viewport={{ once: true }}
          transition={{ duration: 0.6 }}
          className="text-center space-y-8"
        >
          <Card className="border-2 border-primary/20 bg-primary/5">
            <CardHeader className="space-y-4 pb-8 pt-12">
              <div className="inline-flex items-center justify-center">
                <Badge variant="secondary" className="px-4 py-1">
                  <Sparkles className="w-3 h-3 mr-2" />
                  Start Your Wellness Journey Today
                </Badge>
              </div>
              <CardTitle className="text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-bold">
                Ready to Transform Your Wellbeing?
              </CardTitle>
              <CardDescription className="text-lg max-w-2xl mx-auto">
                Join thousands of users already improving their mental and physical health with EKA Account
              </CardDescription>
            </CardHeader>
            <CardContent className="pb-12">

\n\n=======================\n\nFOUND GOOD FILE: C:\\Users\\Mykola\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\History\60133995\UYmw.tsx\nimport { createClient } from '@/lib/supabaseClient';
import { Service } from '@/types/database';
import { BookingModal } from '@/components/BookingModal';
import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';

export const revalidate = 0;

async function getServices() {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  
  // Try fetching from anon_services first
  let { data, error } = await supabase
    .from('anon_services')
    .select('*')
    .eq('is_active', true);

  // Fallback to services if table missing
  if (error && error.code === '42P01') {
    const res = await supabase
      .from('services')
      .select('*')
      .eq('is_active', true);
    data = res.data;
    error = res.error;
  }

  if (error) {
    console.error('Error fetching services:', error);
    return [];
  }

  return data as Service[];
}

export default async function Home() {
  const services = await getServices();

  return (
    <main className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
      <header className="bg-white shadow">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto py-6 px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900">Eka Booking</h1>
        </div>
      </header>
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto py-6 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
        <div className="px-4 py-6 sm:px-0">
          <div className="mb-8">
            <h2 className="text-2xl font-semibold text-gray-800 mb-4">Available Services</h2>
            {services && services.length > 0 ? (
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
                {services.map((service) => (
                  <Card key={service.id} className="overflow-hidden">
                    {service.image_url && (
                      <img className="h-48 w-full object-cover" src={service.image_url} alt={service.name} />
                    )}
                    <CardHeader>
                      <CardTitle>{service.name}</CardTitle>
                      <CardDescription>
                        {service.description}
                        {(service.location || service.version) && (
                          <div className="mt-2 flex gap-2 text-xs text-gray-500">
                            {service.location && (
                              <span className="inline-flex items-center px-2 py-1 rounded-full bg-gray-100">
                                📍 {service.location}
                              </span>
                            )}
                            {service.version && (
                              <span className="inline-flex items-center px-2 py-1 rounded-full bg-blue-50 text-blue-700">
                                🏷️ {service.version}
                              </span>
                            )}
                          </div>
                        )}
                      </CardDescription>
                    </CardHeader>
                    <CardContent>
                      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                        <span className="text-xl font-bold text-indigo-600">${service.price}</span>

                        {(service.location || service.version) && (
                          <div className="mt-2 flex gap-2 text-xs text-gray-500">
                            {service.location && (
                              <span className="inline-flex items-center px-2 py-1 rounded-full bg-gray-100">
                                📍 {service.location}
                              </span>
                            )}
                            {service.version && (
                              <span className="inline-flex items-center px-2 py-1 rounded-full bg-blue-50 text-blue-700">
                                🏷️ {service.version}
                              </span>
                            )}
                          </div>
                        )}
                      </CardDescription>
                    </CardHeader>
                    <CardContent>
                      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                        <span className="text-xl font-bold text-indigo-600">${service.price}</span>
                        <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">{service.duration} mins</span>
                      </div>
                    </CardContent>
                    <CardFooter>
                      <BookingModal service={service} />
                    </CardFooter>
                  </Card>
                ))}
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="text-center py-12 bg-white rounded-lg shadow">
                <p className="text-gray-500">No services found. Please check your connection or add services to the database.</p>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-400 mt-2">Make sure you have set up your .env.local file with Supabase credentials.</p>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </main>
  );
}

        </div>
      </section>

      {/* Featured Services Section */}
      <section className="py-24 bg-gray-50">
        <div className="section-container">
          <div className="text-center max-w-3xl mx-auto mb-16">
            <h2 className="text-3xl sm:text-5xl font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-6 tracking-tight">
              {t('services.featuredTitle')}
            </h2>
            <p className="text-lg text-gray-600 leading-relaxed max-w-2xl mx-auto">
              {t('services.featuredSubtitle')}
            </p>
          </div>

          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
            {SERVICES_DATA.slice(0, 3).map((service, index) => (
              <motion.div
                key={service.id}
                initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
                whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
                viewport={{ once: true }}
                transition={{ delay: index * 0.1 }}
                className="h-full"
              >
                <ServiceCard service={service} />
              </motion.div>
            ))}
          </div>

          <div className="mt-12 text-center">
            <Link href="/services">
              <Button variant="apple" className="px-8 py-3 text-white transition-all hover:scale-105">
                {t('services.viewAll')}
              </Button>
            </Link>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* Casos Section */}
      <CasosSection />

      {/* FAQ Section */}
      <FAQ />

      <CTASection />
    </>
  );
}

import { motion } from 'motion/react'
import { XIcon } from 'lucide-react'
import { Spotlight } from '@/components/ui/spotlight'
import { Magnetic } from '@/components/ui/magnetic'
import {
  MorphingDialog,
  MorphingDialogTrigger,
  MorphingDialogContent,
  MorphingDialogClose,
  MorphingDialogContainer,
} from '@/components/ui/morphing-dialog'
import { HeroHighlight, Highlight } from '@/components/ui/hero-highlight'
import Link from 'next/link'
import { AnimatedBackground } from '@/components/ui/animated-background'

  PROJECTS,
  WORK_EXPERIENCE,

  EMAIL,
  SOCIAL_LINKS,
