const VARIANTS_CONTAINER = {
  hidden: { opacity: 0 },
  visible: {
    opacity: 1,
    transition: {
      staggerChildren: 0.15,
    },
  },
}

const VARIANTS_SECTION = {
  hidden: { opacity: 0, y: 20, filter: 'blur(8px)' },
  visible: { opacity: 1, y: 0, filter: 'blur(0px)' },
}

const TRANSITION_SECTION = {
  duration: 0.3,
}

type ProjectVideoProps = {
  src: string
}

function ProjectVideo({ src }: ProjectVideoProps) {
  return (
    <MorphingDialog
      transition={{
        type: 'spring',
        bounce: 0,
        duration: 0.3,
      }}
    >
      <MorphingDialogTrigger>
        <video
          src={src}
          autoPlay
          loop
          muted
          className="aspect-video w-full cursor-zoom-in rounded-xl"
        />
      </MorphingDialogTrigger>
      <MorphingDialogContainer>
        <MorphingDialogContent className="relative aspect-video rounded-2xl bg-zinc-50 p-1 ring-1 ring-zinc-200/50 ring-inset dark:bg-zinc-950 dark:ring-zinc-800/50">
          <video
            src={src}
            autoPlay
            loop
            muted
            className="aspect-video h-[50vh] w-full rounded-xl md:h-[70vh]"
          />
        </MorphingDialogContent>
        <MorphingDialogClose
          className="fixed top-6 right-6 h-fit w-fit rounded-full bg-white p-1"
          variants={{
            initial: { opacity: 0 },
            animate: {
              opacity: 1,
              transition: { delay: 0.3, duration: 0.1 },
            },
            exit: { opacity: 0, transition: { duration: 0 } },
          }}
        >
          <XIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-zinc-500" />
        </MorphingDialogClose>
      </MorphingDialogContainer>
    </MorphingDialog>
  )
}

}) {

      >
        {children}
        <svg
          width="15"
          height="15"
          viewBox="0 0 15 15"
          fill="none"
          xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
          className="h-3 w-3"
        >
          <path
            d="M3.64645 11.3536C3.45118 11.1583 3.45118 10.8417 3.64645 10.6465L10.2929 4L6 4C5.72386 4 5.5 3.77614 5.5 3.5C5.5 3.22386 5.72386 3 6 3L11.5 3C11.6326 3 11.7598 3.05268 11.8536 3.14645C11.9473 3.24022 12 3.36739 12 3.5L12 9.00001C12 9.27615 11.7761 9.50001 11.5 9.50001C11.2239 9.50001 11 9.27615 11 9.00001V4.70711L4.35355 11.3536C4.15829 11.5488 3.84171 11.5488 3.64645 11.3536Z"
            fill="currentColor"
            fillRule="evenodd"
            clipRule="evenodd"

import { Magnetic } from '@/components/ui/magnetic'
import {
  MorphingDialog,
  MorphingDialogTrigger,
  MorphingDialogContent,
  MorphingDialogClose,
  MorphingDialogContainer,
} from '@/components/ui/morphing-dialog'
import { HeroHighlight, Highlight } from '@/components/ui/hero-highlight'
import { BentoGrid, BentoGridItem } from "@/components/ui/bento-grid";
import Link from 'next/link'
import { AnimatedBackground } from '@/components/ui/animated-background'
import {
  PROJECTS,
  WORK_EXPERIENCE,
  BLOG_POSTS,
  EMAIL,
  SOCIAL_LINKS,
} from './data'

const VARIANTS_CONTAINER = {
  hidden: { opacity: 0 },
  visible: {
    opacity: 1,
    transition: {
      staggerChildren: 0.15,
    },
  },
}

const VARIANTS_SECTION = {
  hidden: { opacity: 0, y: 20, filter: 'blur(8px)' },
  visible: { opacity: 1, y: 0, filter: 'blur(0px)' },
}

const TRANSITION_SECTION = {
  duration: 0.3,
}

type ProjectVideoProps = {
  src: string
}

function ProjectVideo({ src }: ProjectVideoProps) {
  return (
    <MorphingDialog
      transition={{
        type: 'spring',
        bounce: 0,
        duration: 0.3,
      }}
    >
      <MorphingDialogTrigger>
        <video
          src={src}
          autoPlay
          loop
          muted
          className="aspect-video w-full cursor-zoom-in rounded-xl"
        />
      </MorphingDialogTrigger>
      <MorphingDialogContainer>
        <MorphingDialogContent className="relative aspect-video rounded-2xl bg-zinc-50 p-1 ring-1 ring-zinc-200/50 ring-inset dark:bg-zinc-950 dark:ring-zinc-800/50">
          <video
            src={src}
            autoPlay
            loop
            muted
            className="aspect-video h-[50vh] w-full rounded-xl md:h-[70vh]"
          />
        </MorphingDialogContent>
        <MorphingDialogClose
          className="fixed top-6 right-6 h-fit w-fit rounded-full bg-white p-1"
          variants={{
            initial: { opacity: 0 },
            animate: {
              opacity: 1,
              transition: { delay: 0.3, duration: 0.1 },
            },
            exit: { opacity: 0, transition: { duration: 0 } },
          }}
        >
          <XIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-zinc-500" />
        </MorphingDialogClose>
      </MorphingDialogContainer>
    </MorphingDialog>
  )
}

function MagneticSocialLink({
  children,
  link,
}: {
  children: React.ReactNode
  link: string
}) {
  return (
    <Magnetic springOptions={{ bounce: 0 }} intensity={0.3}>
      <a
        href={link}
        className="group relative inline-flex shrink-0 items-center gap-[1px] rounded-full bg-zinc-100 px-2.5 py-1 text-sm text-black transition-colors duration-200 hover:bg-zinc-950 hover:text-zinc-50 dark:bg-zinc-800 dark:text-zinc-100 dark:hover:bg-zinc-700"
      >
        {children}
        <svg
          width="15"
          height="15"
          viewBox="0 0 15 15"
          fill="none"
          xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
          className="h-3 w-3"
        >
          <path
            d="M3.64645 11.3536C3.45118 11.1583 3.45118 10.8417 3.64645 10.6465L10.2929 4L6 4C5.72386 4 5.5 3.77614 5.5 3.5C5.5 3.22386 5.72386 3 6 3L11.5 3C11.6326 3 11.7598 3.05268 11.8536 3.14645C11.9473 3.24022 12 3.36739 12 3.5L12 9.00001C12 9.27615 11.7761 9.50001 11.5 9.50001C11.2239 9.50001 11 9.27615 11 9.00001V4.70711L4.35355 11.3536C4.15829 11.5488 3.84171 11.5488 3.64645 11.3536Z"
            fill="currentColor"
            fillRule="evenodd"
            clipRule="evenodd"
          ></path>
        </svg>
      </a>
    </Magnetic>
  )
}

export default function Personal() {
  return (
    <motion.main
      className="space-y-24"
      variants={VARIANTS_CONTAINER}
      initial="hidden"
      animate="visible"
    >
      <motion.section
        variants={VARIANTS_SECTION}
        transition={TRANSITION_SECTION}
      >
        <HeroHighlight containerClassName="h-auto min-h-[300px] flex items-center justify-center rounded-2xl">
          <div className="flex-1 text-center px-4">
            <p className="text-zinc-600 dark:text-zinc-400 text-xl leading-relaxed max-w-2xl mx-auto">
              Focused on creating <Highlight className="text-black dark:text-white px-2 py-1 rounded-lg">intuitive and performant web experiences</Highlight>.
              Bridging the gap between design and development.
            </p>
          </div>
        </HeroHighlight>
      </motion.section>

      <motion.section
        variants={VARIANTS_SECTION}
        transition={TRANSITION_SECTION}
      >
        <h3 className="mb-5 text-lg font-medium">Selected Projects</h3>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-6 sm:grid-cols-2">
          {PROJECTS.map((project) => (
            <div key={project.name} className="space-y-2">
              <div className="relative rounded-2xl bg-zinc-50/40 p-1 ring-1 ring-zinc-200/50 ring-inset dark:bg-zinc-950/40 dark:ring-zinc-800/50">
                <ProjectVideo src={project.video} />
              </div>
              <div className="px-1">
                <a
                  className="font-base group relative inline-block font-[450] text-zinc-900 dark:text-zinc-50"
                  href={project.link}
                  target="_blank"
                >
                  {project.name}
                  <span className="absolute bottom-0.5 left-0 block h-[1px] w-full max-w-0 bg-zinc-900 dark:bg-zinc-50 transition-all duration-200 group-hover:max-w-full"></span>
                </a>
                <p className="text-base text-zinc-600 dark:text-zinc-400">
                  {project.description}
                </p>
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </motion.section>

      <motion.section
        variants={VARIANTS_SECTION}
        transition={TRANSITION_SECTION}
      >
        <h3 className="mb-5 text-lg font-medium">Work Experience</h3>
        <div className="flex flex-col space-y-2">
          {WORK_EXPERIENCE.map((job) => (
            <a
              className="relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-zinc-300/30 p-[1px] dark:bg-zinc-600/30"
              href={job.link}
              target="_blank"
              rel="noopener noreferrer"
              key={job.id}
            >
              <Spotlight
                className="from-zinc-900 via-zinc-800 to-zinc-700 blur-2xl dark:from-zinc-100 dark:via-zinc-200 dark:to-zinc-50"
                size={64}
              />
              <div className="relative h-full w-full rounded-[15px] bg-white p-4 dark:bg-zinc-950">
                <div className="relative flex w-full flex-row justify-between">
                  <div>
                    <h4 className="font-normal dark:text-zinc-100">
                      {job.title}
                    </h4>
                    <p className="text-zinc-500 dark:text-zinc-400">
                      {job.company}
                    </p>
                  </div>
                  <p className="text-zinc-600 dark:text-zinc-400">
                    {job.start} - {job.end}
                  </p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </a>
          ))}
        </div>
      </motion.section>

      <motion.section
        variants={VARIANTS_SECTION}
        transition={TRANSITION_SECTION}
      >
        <h3 className="mb-3 text-lg font-medium">Blog</h3>
        <div className="flex flex-col space-y-0">
          <AnimatedBackground
            enableHover
            className="h-full w-full rounded-lg bg-zinc-100 dark:bg-zinc-900/80"
            transition={{
              type: 'spring',
              bounce: 0,
              duration: 0.2,
            }}
          >
            {BLOG_POSTS.map((post) => (
              <Link
                key={post.uid}
                className="-mx-3 rounded-xl px-3 py-3"
                href={post.link}
                data-id={post.uid}
              >
                <div className="flex flex-col space-y-1">
                  <h4 className="font-normal dark:text-zinc-100">
                    {post.title}
                  </h4>
                  <p className="text-zinc-500 dark:text-zinc-400">
                    {post.description}
                  </p>
                </div>
              </Link>
            ))}
          </AnimatedBackground>
        </div>
      </motion.section>

      <motion.section
        variants={VARIANTS_SECTION}
        transition={TRANSITION_SECTION}
      >
        <h3 className="mb-5 text-lg font-medium">Connect</h3>
        <p className="mb-5 text-zinc-600 dark:text-zinc-400">
          Feel free to contact me at{' '}
          <a className="underline dark:text-zinc-300" href={`mailto:${EMAIL}`}>
            {EMAIL}
          </a>
        </p>
        <div className="flex items-center justify-start space-x-3">
          {SOCIAL_LINKS.map((link) => (
            <MagneticSocialLink key={link.label} link={link.link}>
              {link.label}
            </MagneticSocialLink>
          ))}
        </div>
      </motion.section>
    </motion.main>
  )
}

export default function Personal() {
  const words = [
    {
      text: "Developer.",
      className: "text-blue-500 dark:text-blue-500",
    },
    {
      text: "Designer.",
      className: "text-blue-500 dark:text-blue-500",
    },
    {
      text: "Problem",
      className: "text-blue-500 dark:text-blue-500",
    },
    {
      text: "Solver.",
      className: "text-blue-500 dark:text-blue-500",
    },
  ];

  const timelineData = WORK_EXPERIENCE.map((job) => ({
    title: `${job.start} - ${job.end}`,
    content: (
      <div>
        <h4 className="text-lg font-bold text-neutral-800 dark:text-neutral-200">
          {job.title} @ {job.company}
        </h4>
        <p className="text-neutral-600 dark:text-neutral-400 text-sm mt-2">
          Building digital experiences and solving complex problems.
        </p>
      </div>
    ),
  }));

  return (
    <motion.main
      className="space-y-24"
      variants={VARIANTS_CONTAINER}
      initial="hidden"
      animate="visible"
    >
      <motion.section
        variants={VARIANTS_SECTION}
        transition={TRANSITION_SECTION}
      >
        <HeroHighlight containerClassName="h-auto min-h-[300px] flex flex-col items-center justify-center rounded-2xl">
          <div className="flex-1 text-center px-4">

import { motion } from 'motion/react'
import { XIcon } from 'lucide-react'
import { Spotlight } from '@/components/ui/spotlight'
import { Magnetic } from '@/components/ui/magnetic'
import {
  MorphingDialog,
  MorphingDialogTrigger,
  MorphingDialogContent,
  MorphingDialogClose,
  MorphingDialogContainer,
} from '@/components/ui/morphing-dialog'
import { HeroHighlight, Highlight } from '@/components/ui/hero-highlight'
import { BentoGrid, BentoGridItem } from "@/components/ui/bento-grid";
import { TextEffect } from "@/components/motion-primitives/text-effect";
import { AnimatedGroup } from "@/components/motion-primitives/animated-group";
import { Timeline } from "@/components/ui/timeline";

import { BackgroundBeams } from "@/components/ui/background-beams";
import Link from 'next/link'

import {
  PROJECTS,
  WORK_EXPERIENCE,
  BLOG_POSTS,
  EMAIL,
  SOCIAL_LINKS,
  SERVICES,
  SKILLS,
} from './data'

const VARIANTS_CONTAINER = {
  hidden: { opacity: 0 },
  visible: {
    opacity: 1,
    transition: {
      staggerChildren: 0.15,
    },
  },
}

const VARIANTS_SECTION = {
  hidden: { opacity: 0, y: 20, filter: 'blur(8px)' },
  visible: { opacity: 1, y: 0, filter: 'blur(0px)' },
}

const TRANSITION_SECTION = {
  duration: 0.3,
}

type ProjectVideoProps = {
  src: string
}

function ProjectVideo({ src }: ProjectVideoProps) {
  return (
    <MorphingDialog
      transition={{
        type: 'spring',
        bounce: 0,
        duration: 0.3,
      }}
    >
      <MorphingDialogTrigger>
        <video
          src={src}
          autoPlay
          loop
          muted
          className="aspect-video w-full cursor-zoom-in rounded-xl"
        />
      </MorphingDialogTrigger>
      <MorphingDialogContainer>
        <MorphingDialogContent className="relative aspect-video rounded-2xl bg-zinc-50 p-1 ring-1 ring-zinc-200/50 ring-inset dark:bg-zinc-950 dark:ring-zinc-800/50">
          <video
            src={src}
            autoPlay
            loop
            muted
            className="aspect-video h-[50vh] w-full rounded-xl md:h-[70vh]"
          />
        </MorphingDialogContent>
        <MorphingDialogClose
          className="fixed top-6 right-6 h-fit w-fit rounded-full bg-white p-1"
          variants={{
            initial: { opacity: 0 },
            animate: {
              opacity: 1,
              transition: { delay: 0.3, duration: 0.1 },
            },
            exit: { opacity: 0, transition: { duration: 0 } },
          }}
        >
          <XIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-zinc-500" />
        </MorphingDialogClose>
      </MorphingDialogContainer>
    </MorphingDialog>
  )
}

function MagneticSocialLink({
  children,
  link,
}: {
  children: React.ReactNode
  link: string
}) {
  return (
    <Magnetic springOptions={{ bounce: 0 }} intensity={0.3}>
      <a
        href={link}
        className="group relative inline-flex shrink-0 items-center gap-[1px] rounded-full bg-zinc-100 px-2.5 py-1 text-sm text-black transition-colors duration-200 hover:bg-zinc-950 hover:text-zinc-50 dark:bg-zinc-800 dark:text-zinc-100 dark:hover:bg-zinc-700"
      >
        {children}
        <svg
          width="15"
          height="15"
          viewBox="0 0 15 15"
          fill="none"
          xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
          className="h-3 w-3"
        >
          <path
            d="M3.64645 11.3536C3.45118 11.1583 3.45118 10.8417 3.64645 10.6465L10.2929 4L6 4C5.72386 4 5.5 3.77614 5.5 3.5C5.5 3.22386 5.72386 3 6 3L11.5 3C11.6326 3 11.7598 3.05268 11.8536 3.14645C11.9473 3.24022 12 3.36739 12 3.5L12 9.00001C12 9.27615 11.7761 9.50001 11.5 9.50001C11.2239 9.50001 11 9.27615 11 9.00001V4.70711L4.35355 11.3536C4.15829 11.5488 3.84171 11.5488 3.64645 11.3536Z"
            fill="currentColor"
            fillRule="evenodd"
            clipRule="evenodd"
          ></path>
        </svg>
      </a>
    </Magnetic>
  )
}

  MorphingDialogContainer,
} from '@/components/ui/morphing-dialog'
import { HeroHighlight, Highlight } from '@/components/ui/hero-highlight'
import { BentoGrid, BentoGridItem } from "@/components/ui/bento-grid";
import { TextEffect } from "@/components/motion-primitives/text-effect";
import { AnimatedGroup } from "@/components/motion-primitives/animated-group";
import { Timeline } from "@/components/ui/timeline";
import { HoverEffect } from "@/components/ui/card-hover-effect";
import { BackgroundBeams } from "@/components/ui/background-beams";
import Link from 'next/link'
import { AnimatedBackground } from '@/components/ui/animated-background'
import {
  PROJECTS,
  WORK_EXPERIENCE,
  BLOG_POSTS,
  EMAIL,
  SOCIAL_LINKS,
  SERVICES,
  SKILLS,
} from './data'

const VARIANTS_CONTAINER = {
  hidden: { opacity: 0 },
  visible: {
    opacity: 1,
    transition: {
      staggerChildren: 0.15,
    },
  },
}

const VARIANTS_SECTION = {
  hidden: { opacity: 0, y: 20, filter: 'blur(8px)' },
  visible: { opacity: 1, y: 0, filter: 'blur(0px)' },
}

const TRANSITION_SECTION = {
  duration: 0.3,
}

type ProjectVideoProps = {
  src: string
}

function ProjectVideo({ src }: ProjectVideoProps) {
  return (
    <MorphingDialog
      transition={{
        type: 'spring',
        bounce: 0,
        duration: 0.3,
      }}
    >
      <MorphingDialogTrigger>
        <video
          src={src}
          autoPlay
          loop
          muted
          className="aspect-video w-full cursor-zoom-in rounded-xl"
        />
      </MorphingDialogTrigger>
      <MorphingDialogContainer>
        <MorphingDialogContent className="relative aspect-video rounded-2xl bg-zinc-50 p-1 ring-1 ring-zinc-200/50 ring-inset dark:bg-zinc-950 dark:ring-zinc-800/50">
          <video
            src={src}
            autoPlay
            loop
            muted
            className="aspect-video h-[50vh] w-full rounded-xl md:h-[70vh]"
          />
        </MorphingDialogContent>
        <MorphingDialogClose
          className="fixed top-6 right-6 h-fit w-fit rounded-full bg-white p-1"
          variants={{
            initial: { opacity: 0 },
            animate: {
              opacity: 1,
              transition: { delay: 0.3, duration: 0.1 },
            },
            exit: { opacity: 0, transition: { duration: 0 } },
          }}
        >
          <XIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-zinc-500" />
        </MorphingDialogClose>
      </MorphingDialogContainer>
    </MorphingDialog>
  )
}

function MagneticSocialLink({
  children,
  link,
}: {
  children: React.ReactNode
  link: string
}) {
  return (
    <Magnetic springOptions={{ bounce: 0 }} intensity={0.3}>
      <a
        href={link}
        className="group relative inline-flex shrink-0 items-center gap-[1px] rounded-full bg-zinc-100 px-2.5 py-1 text-sm text-black transition-colors duration-200 hover:bg-zinc-950 hover:text-zinc-50 dark:bg-zinc-800 dark:text-zinc-100 dark:hover:bg-zinc-700"
      >
        {children}
        <svg
          width="15"
          height="15"
          viewBox="0 0 15 15"
          fill="none"
          xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
          className="h-3 w-3"
        >
          <path
            d="M3.64645 11.3536C3.45118 11.1583 3.45118 10.8417 3.64645 10.6465L10.2929 4L6 4C5.72386 4 5.5 3.77614 5.5 3.5C5.5 3.22386 5.72386 3 6 3L11.5 3C11.6326 3 11.7598 3.05268 11.8536 3.14645C11.9473 3.24022 12 3.36739 12 3.5L12 9.00001C12 9.27615 11.7761 9.50001 11.5 9.50001C11.2239 9.50001 11 9.27615 11 9.00001V4.70711L4.35355 11.3536C4.15829 11.5488 3.84171 11.5488 3.64645 11.3536Z"
            fill="currentColor"
            fillRule="evenodd"
            clipRule="evenodd"
          ></path>
        </svg>
      </a>
    </Magnetic>
  )
}

export default function Personal() {
  const timelineData = WORK_EXPERIENCE.map((job) => ({
    title: `${job.start} - ${job.end}`,
    content: (
      <div>
        <h4 className="text-lg font-bold text-neutral-800 dark:text-neutral-200">
          {job.title} @ {job.company}
        </h4>
        <p className="text-neutral-600 dark:text-neutral-400 text-sm mt-2">
          Building digital experiences and solving complex problems.
        </p>
      </div>
    ),
  }));

  return (
    <motion.main
      className="space-y-24"
      variants={VARIANTS_CONTAINER}
      initial="hidden"
      animate="visible"
    >
      <motion.section
        variants={VARIANTS_SECTION}
        transition={TRANSITION_SECTION}
      >
        <HeroHighlight containerClassName="h-auto min-h-[300px] flex flex-col items-center justify-center rounded-2xl">
          <div className="flex-1 text-center px-4">
            <TextEffect per='char' preset='fade' className="text-base sm:text-xl md:text-3xl lg:text-5xl font-bold text-center text-blue-500 dark:text-blue-500">
              Developer. Designer. Problem Solver.
            </TextEffect>
            <p className="text-zinc-600 dark:text-zinc-400 text-xl leading-relaxed max-w-2xl mx-auto mt-4">
              Focused on creating <Highlight className="text-black dark:text-white px-2 py-1 rounded-lg">intuitive and performant web experiences</Highlight>.
              Bridging the gap between design and development.
            </p>
          </div>
        </HeroHighlight>
      </motion.section>

      <motion.section
        variants={VARIANTS_SECTION}
        transition={TRANSITION_SECTION}
      >
        <h3 className="mb-5 text-2xl font-bold text-center">Services</h3>
        <HoverEffect items={SERVICES} />
      </motion.section>

      <motion.section
        variants={VARIANTS_SECTION}
        transition={TRANSITION_SECTION}
      >
        <h3 className="mb-5 text-2xl font-bold text-center">Skills</h3>
        <HoverEffect items={SKILLS} />
      </motion.section>

      <motion.section
        variants={VARIANTS_SECTION}
        transition={TRANSITION_SECTION}
      >
        <h3 className="mb-5 text-2xl font-bold text-center">Selected Projects</h3>
        <AnimatedGroup
          className="mx-auto grid max-w-4xl grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:auto-rows-[18rem] md:grid-cols-3"
          preset="scale"
        >
          {PROJECTS.map((project, i) => (
            <BentoGridItem
              key={project.name}
              title={project.name}
              description={project.description}
              header={<ProjectVideo src={project.video} />}
              className={i === 3 || i === 6 ? "md:col-span-2" : ""}
              href={project.link}
            />
          ))}
        </AnimatedGroup>
      </motion.section>

      <motion.section
        variants={VARIANTS_SECTION}
        transition={TRANSITION_SECTION}
      >
        <h3 className="mb-5 text-2xl font-bold text-center">My Journey</h3>
        <div className="w-full">
          <Timeline data={timelineData} />
        </div>
      </motion.section>

      <motion.section
        variants={VARIANTS_SECTION}
        transition={TRANSITION_SECTION}
      >
        <h3 className="mb-3 text-lg font-medium">Blog</h3>
        <div className="flex flex-col space-y-0">
          <AnimatedBackground
            enableHover
            className="h-full w-full rounded-lg bg-zinc-100 dark:bg-zinc-900/80"
            transition={{
              type: 'spring',
              bounce: 0,
              duration: 0.2,
            }}
          >
            {BLOG_POSTS.map((post) => (
              <Link
                key={post.uid}
                className="-mx-3 rounded-xl px-3 py-3"
                href={post.link}
                data-id={post.uid}
              >
                <div className="flex flex-col space-y-1">
                  <h4 className="font-normal dark:text-zinc-100">
                    {post.title}
                  </h4>
                  <p className="text-zinc-500 dark:text-zinc-400">
                    {post.description}
                  </p>
                </div>
              </Link>
            ))}
          </AnimatedBackground>
        </div>
      </motion.section>

      <motion.section
        variants={VARIANTS_SECTION}
        transition={TRANSITION_SECTION}
        className="relative h-[40rem] w-full rounded-md bg-neutral-950 antialiased flex flex-col items-center justify-center overflow-hidden"
      >
        <div className="max-w-2xl mx-auto p-4 relative z-10">
          <h1 className="relative z-10 text-lg md:text-7xl  bg-clip-text text-transparent bg-gradient-to-b from-neutral-200 to-neutral-600  text-center font-sans font-bold">
            Let's Build Something Amazing
          </h1>
          <p className="text-neutral-500 max-w-lg mx-auto my-2 text-sm text-center relative z-10">
            Ready to turn your ideas into reality? Contact me to discuss your project.
          </p>
          <div className="flex justify-center mt-8">
             <a href={`mailto:${EMAIL}`} className="px-8 py-2 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-b from-blue-500 to-blue-600 text-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-400 hover:shadow-xl transition duration-200">
                Contact Me
             </a>
          </div>
        </div>
        <BackgroundBeams />
      </motion.section>
    </motion.main>
  )
}

  Dialog,

  DialogContent,
  DialogClose,
  DialogContainer,
} from '@/components/motion-primitives/dialog'

const VARIANTS_CONTAINER = {
  hidden: { opacity: 0 },
  visible: {
    opacity: 1,
    transition: {
      staggerChildren: 0.15,
    },
  },
}

const VARIANTS_SECTION = {
  hidden: { opacity: 0, y: 20, filter: 'blur(8px)' },
  visible: { opacity: 1, y: 0, filter: 'blur(0px)' },
}

const TRANSITION_SECTION = {
  duration: 0.3,
}

type ProjectVideoProps = {
  src: string
}

function ProjectVideo({ src }: ProjectVideoProps) {
  return (
    <Dialog
      transition={{
        type: 'spring',
        bounce: 0,
        duration: 0.3,
      }}
    >
      <DialogTrigger>
        <video
          src={src}
          autoPlay
          loop
          muted
          className="aspect-video w-full cursor-zoom-in rounded-xl"
        />
      </DialogTrigger>
      <DialogContainer>
        <DialogContent className="relative aspect-video rounded-2xl bg-zinc-50 p-1 ring-1 ring-zinc-200/50 ring-inset dark:bg-zinc-950 dark:ring-zinc-800/50">
          <video
            src={src}
            autoPlay
            loop
            muted
            className="aspect-video h-[50vh] w-full rounded-xl md:h-[70vh]"
          />
        </DialogContent>
        <DialogClose
          className="fixed top-6 right-6 h-fit w-fit rounded-full bg-white p-1"
          variants={{
            initial: { opacity: 0 },
            animate: {
              opacity: 1,
              transition: { delay: 0.3, duration: 0.1 },
            },
            exit: { opacity: 0, transition: { duration: 0 } },
          }}
        >
          <XIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-zinc-500" />
        </DialogClose>
      </DialogContainer>
    </Dialog>
  )
}

      >
        {children}
        <svg
          width="15"
          height="15"
          viewBox="0 0 15 15"
          fill="none"
          xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
          className="h-3 w-3"
        >
          <path
            d="M3.64645 11.3536C3.45118 11.1583 3.45118 10.8417 3.64645 10.6465L10.2929 4L6 4C5.72386 4 5.5 3.77614 5.5 3.5C5.5 3.22386 5.72386 3 6 3L11.5 3C11.6326 3 11.7598 3.05268 11.8536 3.14645C11.9473 3.24022 12 3.36739 12 3.5L12 9.00001C12 9.27615 11.7761 9.50001 11.5 9.50001C11.2239 9.50001 11 9.27615 11 9.00001V4.70711L4.35355 11.3536C4.15829 11.5488 3.84171 11.5488 3.64645 11.3536Z"
            fill="currentColor"

}

  duration: 0.3,
}

type ProjectVideoProps = {
  src: string
}

function ProjectVideo({ src }: ProjectVideoProps) {
  return (
    <Dialog
      transition={{
        type: 'spring',
        bounce: 0,
        duration: 0.3,
      }}
    >
      <DialogTrigger>
        <video
          src={src}
          autoPlay
          loop
          muted
          className="aspect-video w-full cursor-zoom-in rounded-xl"
        />
      </DialogTrigger>
      <DialogContent className="relative aspect-video rounded-2xl bg-zinc-50 p-1 ring-1 ring-zinc-200/50 ring-inset dark:bg-zinc-950 dark:ring-zinc-800/50">
        <video
          src={src}
          autoPlay
          loop
          muted
          className="aspect-video h-[50vh] w-full rounded-xl md:h-[70vh]"
        />
        <DialogClose
          className="fixed top-6 right-6 h-fit w-fit rounded-full bg-white p-1"
        >
          <XIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-zinc-500" />
        </DialogClose>
      </DialogContent>
    </Dialog>
  )
}

function MagneticSocialLink({
  children,
  link,
}: {
  children: React.ReactNode
  link: string
}) {
  return (
    <Magnetic springOptions={{ bounce: 0 }} intensity={0.3}>
      <a
        href={link}
        className="group relative inline-flex shrink-0 items-center gap-[1px] rounded-full bg-zinc-100 px-2.5 py-1 text-sm text-black transition-colors duration-200 hover:bg-zinc-950 hover:text-zinc-50 dark:bg-zinc-800 dark:text-zinc-100 dark:hover:bg-zinc-700"
      >
        {children}
        <svg
          width="15"
          height="15"
          viewBox="0 0 15 15"
          fill="none"
          xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
          className="h-3 w-3"
        >
          <path
            d="M3.64645 11.3536C3.45118 11.1583 3.45118 10.8417 3.64645 10.6465L10.2929 4L6 4C5.72386 4 5.5 3.77614 5.5 3.5C5.5 3.22386 5.72386 3 6 3L11.5 3C11.6326 3 11.7598 3.05268 11.8536 3.14645C11.9473 3.24022 12 3.36739 12 3.5L12 9.00001C12 9.27615 11.7761 9.50001 11.5 9.50001C11.2239 9.50001 11 9.27615 11 9.00001V4.70711L4.35355 11.3536C4.15829 11.5488 3.84171 11.5488 3.64645 11.3536Z"
            fill="currentColor"
            fillRule="evenodd"
            clipRule="evenodd"
          ></path>
        </svg>
      </a>
    </Magnetic>
  )
}

import { useState } from "react";
import { useForm } from "react-hook-form";
import { zodResolver } from "@hookform/resolvers/zod";
import * as z from "zod";

const formSchema = z.object({
  symptoms: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
  goals: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
  description: z.string().optional(),
});

export default function SmartSearchPage() {
  const [recommendations, setRecommendations] = useState<any[]>([]);
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);

  const [hasSearched, setHasSearched] = useState(false);

  const form = useForm<z.infer<typeof formSchema>>({
    resolver: zodResolver(formSchema),
    defaultValues: {
      symptoms: [],
      goals: [],
      description: "",
    },
  });

  async function onSubmit(values: z.infer<typeof formSchema>) {
    setIsLoading(true);
    setHasSearched(true);
    setRecommendations([]);

    try {
      const response = await fetch('/api/recommend', { 
        method: 'POST', 
        headers: {
            'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        },
        body: JSON.stringify(values) 
      });
      
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error("Search failed");
      
      const data = await response.json();
      setRecommendations(data);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(error);
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false);
    }
  }

  return (
    <div className="container max-w-4xl py-12 px-4 mx-auto">
      <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold mb-8 text-center">Búsqueda Inteligente de Suplementos</h1>
      
      <div className="bg-white rounded-xl shadow-lg p-8 border">
        <form onSubmit={form.handleSubmit(onSubmit)} className="space-y-8">
          <div>
            <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold mb-4">¿Qué síntomas experimentas?</h3>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 gap-3">
              {['Fatiga', 'Estrés', 'Insomnio', 'Dolor articular', 'Problemas digestivos', 'Falta de concentración'].map((symptom) => (
                <label key={symptom} className="flex items-center space-x-2 cursor-pointer p-3 border rounded hover:bg-slate-50">
                  <input 
                    type="checkbox" 
                    value={symptom} 
                    {...form.register("symptoms")}
                    className="h-4 w-4 rounded border-gray-300 text-primary focus:ring-primary"
                  />
                  <span>{symptom}</span>
                </label>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>

          <div>
            <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold mb-4">¿Cuáles son tus objetivos?</h3>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 gap-3">
              {['Mejorar inmunidad', 'Aumentar energía', 'Perder peso', 'Mejorar piel/cabello', 'Anti-edad', 'Desintoxicación'].map((goal) => (
                <label key={goal} className="flex items-center space-x-2 cursor-pointer p-3 border rounded hover:bg-slate-50">
                  <input 
                    type="checkbox" 
                    value={goal} 
                    {...form.register("goals")}
                    className="h-4 w-4 rounded border-gray-300 text-primary focus:ring-primary"
                  />
                  <span>{goal}</span>
                </label>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>

          <div>
            <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold mb-4">Descríbenos tu situación (Opcional)</h3>
            <textarea
              {...form.register("description")}
              className="w-full min-h-[100px] rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm shadow-sm placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring"
              placeholder="Ej: Me siento cansado por las tardes y tengo problemas para dormir..."
            />
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-2">Nuestra IA analizará tu descripción para encontrar los mejores productos.</p>
          </div>

          <button 
            type="submit" 
            className="w-full h-12 inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md bg-primary px-8 text-lg font-medium text-white shadow hover:bg-primary/90 transition-colors disabled:opacity-50"
            disabled={isLoading}
          >
            {isLoading ? "Analizando..." : "Encontrar Mis Suplementos"}
          </button>
        </form>
      </div>
      
      {hasSearched && (
        <div className="mt-12">
          <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-6">Recomendaciones para ti</h2>
          
          {recommendations.length > 0 ? (
            <div className="grid gap-6 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3">
                {recommendations.map((product) => (
                <div key={product.slug} className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow border overflow-hidden flex flex-col group hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow">
                    <div className="aspect-square relative p-4 bg-gray-50 flex items-center justify-center">
                        {product.images && product.images.length > 0 ? (
                            <img 
                                src={product.images[0]} 
                                alt={product.name} 
                                className="object-contain h-full w-full group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform"
                                onError={(e) => { (e.target as HTMLImageElement).src = "https://placehold.co/400x400?text=No+Image" }}
                            />
                        ) : (
                            <div className="text-gray-400">No image</div>
                        )}
                    </div>
                    <div className="p-4 flex-1 flex flex-col">
                        <h3 className="font-bold text-lg mb-2 text-gray-900">{product.name}</h3>
                        <div className="mb-3 flex flex-wrap gap-1">
                            {product.symptoms_helped?.slice(0, 2).map((s: string) => (
                                <span key={s} className="text-xs bg-red-50 text-red-600 px-2 py-1 rounded-full">{s}</span>
                            ))}
                            {product.purposes?.slice(0, 2).map((p: string) => (
                                <span key={p} className="text-xs bg-green-50 text-green-600 px-2 py-1 rounded-full">{p}</span>
                            ))}
                        </div>
                        <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 line-clamp-3 mb-4">
                            {product.benefits?.join(", ") || product.description?.substring(0, 100)}
                        </p>
                        <button className="mt-auto w-full py-2 bg-slate-900 text-white rounded hover:bg-slate-800 transition-colors">
                            Ver Detalles
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>
                ))}
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="text-center py-12 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg">
                <p className="text-lg text-gray-600">No encontramos productos que coincidan exactamente con tus criterios.</p>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-2">Intenta seleccionar menos filtros o describir tu situación de otra forma.</p>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

import { useState } from "react";
import Image from "next/image";
import { useForm } from "react-hook-form";
import { zodResolver } from "@hookform/resolvers/zod";
import * as z from "zod";

const formSchema = z.object({
  symptoms: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
  goals: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
  description: z.string().optional(),
});

export default function SmartSearchPage() {
  const [recommendations, setRecommendations] = useState<any[]>([]);
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);

  const [hasSearched, setHasSearched] = useState(false);

  const form = useForm<z.infer<typeof formSchema>>({
    resolver: zodResolver(formSchema),
    defaultValues: {
      symptoms: [],
      goals: [],
      description: "",
    },
  });

  async function onSubmit(values: z.infer<typeof formSchema>) {
    setIsLoading(true);
    setHasSearched(true);
    setRecommendations([]);

    try {
      const response = await fetch('/api/recommend', { 
        method: 'POST', 
        headers: {
            'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        },
        body: JSON.stringify(values) 
      });
      
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error("Search failed");
      
      const data = await response.json();
      setRecommendations(data);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(error);
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false);
    }
  }

  return (
    <div className="container max-w-4xl py-12 px-4 mx-auto">
      <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold mb-8 text-center">Búsqueda Inteligente de Suplementos</h1>
      
      <div className="bg-white rounded-xl shadow-lg p-8 border">
        <form onSubmit={form.handleSubmit(onSubmit)} className="space-y-8">
          <div>
            <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold mb-4">¿Qué síntomas experimentas?</h3>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 gap-3">
              {['Fatiga', 'Estrés', 'Insomnio', 'Dolor articular', 'Problemas digestivos', 'Falta de concentración'].map((symptom) => (
                <label key={symptom} className="flex items-center space-x-2 cursor-pointer p-3 border rounded hover:bg-slate-50">
                  <input 
                    type="checkbox" 
                    value={symptom} 
                    {...form.register("symptoms")}
                    className="h-4 w-4 rounded border-gray-300 text-primary focus:ring-primary"
                  />
                  <span>{symptom}</span>
                </label>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>

          <div>
            <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold mb-4">¿Cuáles son tus objetivos?</h3>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 gap-3">
              {['Mejorar inmunidad', 'Aumentar energía', 'Perder peso', 'Mejorar piel/cabello', 'Anti-edad', 'Desintoxicación'].map((goal) => (
                <label key={goal} className="flex items-center space-x-2 cursor-pointer p-3 border rounded hover:bg-slate-50">
                  <input 
                    type="checkbox" 
                    value={goal} 
                    {...form.register("goals")}
                    className="h-4 w-4 rounded border-gray-300 text-primary focus:ring-primary"
                  />
                  <span>{goal}</span>
                </label>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>

          <div>
            <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold mb-4">Descríbenos tu situación (Opcional)</h3>
            <textarea
              {...form.register("description")}
              className="w-full min-h-[100px] rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm shadow-sm placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring"
              placeholder="Ej: Me siento cansado por las tardes y tengo problemas para dormir..."
            />
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-2">Nuestra IA analizará tu descripción para encontrar los mejores productos.</p>
          </div>

          <button 
            type="submit" 
            className="w-full h-12 inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md bg-primary px-8 text-lg font-medium text-white shadow hover:bg-primary/90 transition-colors disabled:opacity-50"
            disabled={isLoading}
          >
            {isLoading ? "Analizando..." : "Encontrar Mis Suplementos"}
          </button>
        </form>
      </div>
      
      {hasSearched && (
        <div className="mt-12">
          <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-6">Recomendaciones para ti</h2>
          
          {recommendations.length > 0 ? (
            <div className="grid gap-6 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3">
                {recommendations.map((product) => (
                <div key={product.slug} className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow border overflow-hidden flex flex-col group hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow">
                    <div className="aspect-square relative p-4 bg-gray-50 flex items-center justify-center">
                        {product.images && product.images.length > 0 ? (
                            <img 
                                src={product.images[0]} 
                                alt={product.name} 
                                className="object-contain h-full w-full group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform"
                                onError={(e) => { (e.target as HTMLImageElement).src = "https://placehold.co/400x400?text=No+Image" }}
                            />
                        ) : (
                            <div className="text-gray-400">No image</div>
                        )}
                    </div>
                    <div className="p-4 flex-1 flex flex-col">
                        <h3 className="font-bold text-lg mb-2 text-gray-900">{product.name}</h3>
                        <div className="mb-3 flex flex-wrap gap-1">
                            {product.symptoms_helped?.slice(0, 2).map((s: string) => (
                                <span key={s} className="text-xs bg-red-50 text-red-600 px-2 py-1 rounded-full">{s}</span>
                            ))}
                            {product.purposes?.slice(0, 2).map((p: string) => (
                                <span key={p} className="text-xs bg-green-50 text-green-600 px-2 py-1 rounded-full">{p}</span>
                            ))}
                        </div>
                        <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 line-clamp-3 mb-4">
                            {product.benefits?.join(", ") || product.description?.substring(0, 100)}
                        </p>
                        <button className="mt-auto w-full py-2 bg-slate-900 text-white rounded hover:bg-slate-800 transition-colors">
                            Ver Detalles
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>
                ))}
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="text-center py-12 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg">
                <p className="text-lg text-gray-600">No encontramos productos que coincidan exactamente con tus criterios.</p>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-2">Intenta seleccionar menos filtros o describir tu situación de otra forma.</p>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

    resolver: zodResolver(formSchema),
    defaultValues: {

      goals: [],
      description: "",
    },
  });

    setHasSearched(true);
    setRecommendations([]);

        method: 'POST', 
        headers: {

        },

      });

                    className="h-4 w-4 rounded border-gray-300 text-primary focus:ring-primary"

              placeholder="Ej: Me siento cansado por las tardes y tengo problemas para dormir..."
            />
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-2">Nuestra IA analizará tu descripción para encontrar los mejores productos.</p>
          </div>

          <button 
            type="submit" 
            className="w-full h-12 inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md bg-primary px-8 text-lg font-medium text-white shadow hover:bg-primary/90 transition-colors disabled:opacity-50"

                                alt={product.name} 
                                fill
                                className="object-contain p-4 group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform"
                                sizes="(max-width: 768px) 100vw, (max-width: 1200px) 50vw, 33vw"
                            />
                        ) : (
                            <div className="text-gray-400">No image</div>
                        )}
                    </div>
                    <div className="p-4 flex-1 flex flex-col">
                        <h3 className="font-bold text-lg mb-2 text-gray-900">{product.name}</h3>
                        <div className="mb-3 flex flex-wrap gap-1">

                            ))}

                <p className="text-lg text-gray-600">No encontramos productos que coincidan exactamente con tus criterios.</p>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-2">Intenta seleccionar menos filtros o describir tu situación de otra forma.</p>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

      goals: [],
      description: "",
    },
  });

    setIsLoading(true);
    setHasSearched(true);

      });

                  />
                  <span>{symptom}</span>
                </label>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>

          <div>
            <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold mb-4">¿Cuáles son tus objetivos?</h3>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 gap-3">
              {['Mejorar inmunidad', 'Aumentar energía', 'Perder peso', 'Mejorar piel/cabello', 'Anti-edad', 'Desintoxicación'].map((goal) => (
                <label key={goal} className="flex items-center space-x-2 cursor-pointer p-3 border rounded hover:bg-slate-50">
                  <input 
                    type="checkbox" 
                    value={goal} 
                    {...form.register("goals")}
                    className="h-4 w-4 rounded border-gray-300 text-primary focus:ring-primary"
                  />
                  <span>{goal}</span>
                </label>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>

          <div>
            <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold mb-4">Descríbenos tu situación (Opcional)</h3>
            <textarea
              {...form.register("description")}
              className="w-full min-h-[100px] rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm shadow-sm placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring"
              placeholder="Ej: Me siento cansado por las tardes y tengo problemas para dormir..."
            />
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-2">Nuestra IA analizará tu descripción para encontrar los mejores productos.</p>
          </div>

          <button 
            type="submit" 
            className="w-full h-12 inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md bg-primary px-8 text-lg font-medium text-white shadow hover:bg-primary/90 transition-colors disabled:opacity-50"
            disabled={isLoading}
          >
            {isLoading ? "Analizando..." : "Encontrar Mis Suplementos"}
          </button>
        </form>
      </div>
      
      {hasSearched && (
        <div className="mt-12">
          <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-6">Recomendaciones para ti</h2>
          
          {recommendations.length > 0 ? (
            <div className="grid gap-6 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3">
                {recommendations.map((product) => (
                    <ProductCard key={product.slug} product={product} />
                ))}
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="text-center py-12 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg">
                <p className="text-lg text-gray-600">No encontramos productos que coincidan exactamente con tus criterios.</p>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-2">Intenta seleccionar menos filtros o describir tu situación de otra forma.</p>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}
\n\n=======================\n\nFOUND GOOD FILE: C:\\Users\\Mykola\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\History\734be903\tFxG.tsx\n"use client";

import { useState } from "react";
import { useForm } from "react-hook-form";
import { zodResolver } from "@hookform/resolvers/zod";
import * as z from "zod";
import { ProductCard } from "@/components/ProductCard";

const formSchema = z.object({
  symptoms: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
  goals: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
  description: z.string().optional(),
});

export default function SmartSearchPage() {
  const [recommendations, setRecommendations] = useState<any[]>([]);
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);

  const [hasSearched, setHasSearched] = useState(false);

  const form = useForm<z.infer<typeof formSchema>>({
    resolver: zodResolver(formSchema),
    defaultValues: {
      symptoms: [],
      goals: [],
      description: "",
    },
  });

  async function onSubmit(values: z.infer<typeof formSchema>) {
    setIsLoading(true);
    setHasSearched(true);
    try {
      const response = await fetch("/api/recommend", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify(values),
      });
      
      if (response.ok) {
        const data = await response.json();
        setRecommendations(data);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Error fetching recommendations:", error);
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false);
    }
  }

  return (
    <div className="container mx-auto py-16 px-4 md:px-6 max-w-5xl">
       <div className="max-w-2xl mx-auto text-center mb-12">
            <h1 className="text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight text-gray-900 mb-4">Búsqueda Inteligente</h1>
            <p className="text-lg text-gray-500">
                Describe tus síntomas o objetivos. Nuestra IA analizará tu perfil y te recomendará la suplementación precisa.
            </p>
       </div>

      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-12">
        <div className="md:col-span-1 space-y-8">
           <div className="bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm sticky top-24">
              <form onSubmit={form.handleSubmit(onSubmit)} className="space-y-6">
                <div>
                  <label className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 block mb-2">Descríbelo en tus propias palabras</label>
                  <textarea 
                    {...form.register("description")}
                    className="w-full min-h-[120px] p-3 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-gray-50 text-base focus:ring-2 focus:ring-black focus:border-transparent transition-all outline-none resize-none"
                    placeholder="Ej: Me siento cansado por las tardes y me cuesta concentrarme. Quiero mejorar mi energía..."
                  />
                </div>

                <div className="pt-2">
                    <button 
                        type="submit" 
                        disabled={isLoading}
                        className="w-full bg-black text-white hover:bg-gray-800 disabled:opacity-70 disabled:cursor-not-allowed h-12 rounded-xl font-medium transition-colors shadow-lg shadow-gray-200 flex items-center justify-center"
                    >
                        {isLoading ? (
                            <span className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
                                <svg className="animate-spin h-5 w-5 text-white" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                                    <circle className="opacity-25" cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="4"></circle>
                                    <path className="opacity-75" fill="currentColor" d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"></path>
                                </svg>
                                Analizando...
                            </span>
                        ) : "Buscar Recomendaciones"}
                    </button>
                </div>
              </form>
           </div>
        </div>

        <div className="md:col-span-2">
          {isLoading ? (
             <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-64 text-gray-500 space-y-4">
                <div className="w-12 h-12 border-4 border-gray-200 border-t-black rounded-full animate-spin"></div>
                <p>Consultando base de datos clínica...</p>
             </div>
          ) : recommendations.length > 0 ? (
            <div className="space-y-8 animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-4 duration-700">
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between pb-4 border-b border-gray-100">
                    <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">Resultados para ti</h2>
                    <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">{recommendations.length} coincidencias</span>
                </div>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
                    {recommendations.map((product) => (
                        <ProductCard key={product.slug} product={product} />
                    ))}
                </div>
            </div>
          ) : (
            hasSearched && (
                <div className="text-center py-24 bg-gray-50 rounded-2xl border border-dashed border-gray-200">
                    <p className="text-gray-500">No encontramos coincidencias exactas con esa descripción. Intenta ser más específico.</p>
                </div>
            )
          )}
          
          {!hasSearched && !isLoading && (
             <div className="text-center py-24 px-8 bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-50 to-white rounded-2xl border border-gray-100">
                <div className="inline-flex items-center justify-center w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-white shadow-sm mb-6 text-3xl">✨</div>
                <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">Esperando tu consulta</h3>
                <p className="text-gray-500 max-w-sm mx-auto">
                    Utilizamos modelos de lenguaje avanzados para entender contextos médicos complejos y sugerir la mejor opción.
                </p>
             </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
\n\n=======================\n\nFOUND GOOD FILE: C:\\Users\\Mykola\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\History\734be903\70w7.tsx\n"use client";

import { useState, useMemo } from "react";
import Link from "next/link";
import Image from "next/image";
import { ProductService } from "@/services/productService";
import { Product } from "@/types";
import { useEffect } from "react";
import * as motion from "motion/react-client";
import { Search, X, Sparkles, ArrowRight, CheckCircle2, Zap } from "lucide-react";

const SMART_SEARCH_QUESTIONS = [
  {
    id: "symptom",
    title: "¿Cuál es tu síntoma principal?",
    options: ["Dolor articular", "Estrés", "Digestión", "Sueño", "Inmunidad", "Memoria", "Inflamación", "Energía"],
    icon: "🏥"
  },
  {
    id: "goal",
    title: "¿Cuál es tu objetivo principal?",
    options: ["Bienestar general", "Rendimiento deportivo", "Recuperación", "Prevención", "Energía", "Longevidad"],
    icon: "🎯"
  },
  {
    id: "budget",
    title: "¿Cuál es tu rango de precio?",
    options: ["Menos de 30€", "30€ - 50€", "50€ - 100€", "Más de 100€", "Sin límite"],
    icon: "💰"
  }
];

export default function SmartSearchPage() {
  const [products, setProducts] = useState<Product[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [step, setStep] = useState(0);
  const [answers, setAnswers] = useState<Record<string, string>>({});
  const [showResults, setShowResults] = useState(false);
  const [searchText, setSearchText] = useState("");

  useEffect(() => {
    const loadProducts = async () => {
      try {
        const data = await ProductService.getAllProducts();
        setProducts(data);
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("Error loading products:", error);
      } finally {
        setLoading(false);
      }
    };
    loadProducts();
  }, []);

  const handleAnswer = (answer: string) => {
    const question = SMART_SEARCH_QUESTIONS[step];
    setAnswers(prev => ({
      ...prev,
      [question.id]: answer
    }));

    if (step < SMART_SEARCH_QUESTIONS.length - 1) {
      setStep(step + 1);
    } else {
      setShowResults(true);
    }
  };

  const filteredProducts = useMemo(() => {
    if (!showResults) return [];

    let result = [...products];

    // Filter by symptom
    if (answers.symptom) {
      result = result.filter(p => 
        p.symptoms_helped?.some(s => 
          s.toLowerCase().includes(answers.symptom.toLowerCase())
        ) || p.name.toLowerCase().includes(answers.symptom.toLowerCase())
      );
    }

    // Filter by goal
    if (answers.goal) {
      result = result.filter(p => 
        p.purposes?.some(g => 
          g.toLowerCase().includes(answers.goal.toLowerCase())
        )
      );
    }

    // Filter by budget (simplified - assumes price is a number)
    if (answers.budget) {
      if (answers.budget === "Menos de 30€") result = result.filter(p => p.price < 30);
      else if (answers.budget === "30€ - 50€") result = result.filter(p => p.price >= 30 && p.price < 50);
      else if (answers.budget === "50€ - 100€") result = result.filter(p => p.price >= 50 && p.price < 100);
      else if (answers.budget === "Más de 100€") result = result.filter(p => p.price >= 100);
    }

    // Filter by search text
    if (searchText) {
      const q = searchText.toLowerCase();
      result = result.filter(p =>
        p.name.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
        p.description.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
        p.benefits?.some(b => b.toLowerCase().includes(q)) ||
        p.tags?.some(t => t.toLowerCase().includes(q))
      );
    }

    return result;
  }, [products, answers, showResults, searchText]);

  const resetSearch = () => {
    setStep(0);
    setAnswers({});
    setShowResults(false);
    setSearchText("");
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-b from-gray-50 to-white flex items-center justify-center">
        <div className="text-center">
          <div className="inline-flex items-center justify-center w-16 h-16 bg-black/5 rounded-full mb-4 animate-pulse">
            <Sparkles className="w-8 h-8 text-black" />
          </div>
          <p className="text-gray-600 font-medium">Cargando catálogo...</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-b from-gray-50 to-white">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="border-b border-gray-100 bg-white sticky top-0 z-40 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80">
        <div className="container mx-auto px-6 py-6 flex items-center justify-between">
          <Link href="/" className="text-2xl font-bold text-black">
            Agenyz
          </Link>
          <nav className="flex items-center gap-6 text-sm">
            <Link href="/products" className="text-gray-600 hover:text-black transition-colors">
              Catálogo
            </Link>
            <Link href="/smart-search" className="font-bold text-black">
              Búsqueda Inteligente
            </Link>
          </nav>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="container mx-auto px-6 py-12 max-w-6xl">
        {!showResults ? (
          /* Smart Search Questions */
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-12 items-start">
            {/* Left: Questions */}
            <motion.div
              initial={{ opacity: 0, x: -20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
              className="space-y-8"
            >
              <div>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-2">
                  <span className="inline-flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 bg-black text-white rounded-full font-bold text-sm">
                    {step + 1}
                  </span>
                  <span className="text-sm text-gray-500 font-medium">
                    de {SMART_SEARCH_QUESTIONS.length} pasos
                  </span>
                </div>
                <h1 className="text-4xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">
                  {SMART_SEARCH_QUESTIONS[step].title}
                </h1>
                <p className="text-gray-600 text-lg leading-relaxed">
                  Responde algunas preguntas para encontrar el suplemento perfecto para ti.
                </p>
              </div>

              {/* Progress Bar */}
              <div className="space-y-3">
                <div className="flex gap-2">
                  {SMART_SEARCH_QUESTIONS.map((_, i) => (
                    <div
                      key={i}
                      className={`h-1 flex-1 rounded-full transition-all ${
                        i <= step ? "bg-black" : "bg-gray-200"
                      }`}
                    />
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Options */}
              <div className="space-y-3 pt-4">
                {SMART_SEARCH_QUESTIONS[step].options.map(option => (
                  <motion.button
                    key={option}
                    initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }}
                    animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
                    onClick={() => handleAnswer(option)}
                    className="w-full px-6 py-4 text-left rounded-2xl border-2 border-gray-200 bg-white text-gray-900 font-semibold hover:border-black hover:bg-black hover:text-white transition-all duration-300 flex items-center justify-between group"
                  >
                    <span>{option}</span>
                    <ArrowRight className="w-5 h-5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity" />
                  </motion.button>
                ))}
              </div>

              {/* Back Button */}
              {step > 0 && (
                <button
                  onClick={() => setStep(step - 1)}
                  className="text-sm text-gray-600 hover:text-black font-medium transition-colors"
                >
                  ← Atrás
                </button>
              )}
            </motion.div>

            {/* Right: Visual Guide */}
            <motion.div
              initial={{ opacity: 0, x: 20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
              className="hidden lg:block sticky top-32"
            >
              <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-black/5 to-black/2 rounded-3xl p-8 border border-gray-200">
                <div className="space-y-6">
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
                    <div className="flex-shrink-0 w-12 h-12 bg-black/10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center text-2xl">
                      🧬
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <h4 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-1">Ciencia Bioactiva</h4>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                        Cada producto está formulado con ingredientes bioactivos seleccionados.
                      </p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
                    <div className="flex-shrink-0 w-12 h-12 bg-black/10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center text-2xl">
                      ✅
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <h4 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-1">Calidad Garantizada</h4>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                        Todos nuestros suplementos pasan rigurosos controles de calidad.
                      </p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
                    <div className="flex-shrink-0 w-12 h-12 bg-black/10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center text-2xl">
                      🎯
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <h4 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-1">Resultados Reales</h4>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                        Experimentar cambios notables en 4 a 8 semanas de uso consistente.
                      </p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </motion.div>
          </div>
        ) : (
          /* Results View */
          <motion.div
            initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
            animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
            className="space-y-10"
          >
            {/* Results Header */}
            <div className="space-y-6">
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between flex-wrap gap-4">
                <div>
                  <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">
                    {filteredProducts.length} Productos Recomendados
                  </h1>
                  <p className="text-gray-600">
                    Basado en: <span className="font-semibold text-black">{answers.symptom || "Tu perfil"}</span>
                  </p>
                </div>
                <button
                  onClick={resetSearch}
                  className="flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 bg-black text-white rounded-xl font-semibold hover:bg-black/90 transition-colors"
                >
                  <Sparkles className="w-4 h-4" />
                  Nueva Búsqueda
                </button>
              </div>

              {/* Search Refinement */}
              <div className="relative">
                <Search className="absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-5 h-5 text-gray-400" />
                <input
                  type="text"
                  placeholder="Refinar resultados..."
                  value={searchText}
                  onChange={(e) => setSearchText(e.target.value)}
                  className="w-full pl-12 pr-4 py-3 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-2xl text-gray-900 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-black/10 focus:border-gray-300 transition-all"
                />
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Products Grid */}
            {filteredProducts.length > 0 ? (
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
                {filteredProducts.map((product, index) => (
                  <motion.div
                    key={product.slug}
                    initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
                    animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
                    transition={{ delay: index * 0.1 }}
                    className="group relative flex flex-col overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-white border border-gray-100 hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all"
                  >
                    <Link href={`/products/${product.slug}`} className="aspect-square relative overflow-hidden bg-gray-50 p-8 flex items-center justify-center">
                      {product.images && product.images.length > 0 ? (
                        <Image
                          src={product.images[0]}
                          alt={product.name}
                          fill
                          className="object-contain group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-500"
                          sizes="(max-width: 768px) 100vw, 33vw"
                        />
                      ) : (
                        <div className="text-gray-400">Sin imagen</div>
                      )}
                    </Link>
                    <div className="flex flex-1 flex-col p-6">
                      <h3 className="font-bold text-lg text-gray-900 mb-2">
                        <Link href={`/products/${product.slug}`}>
                          {product.name}
                        </Link>
                      </h3>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 line-clamp-2 mb-4">
                        {product.description !== "0" ? product.description : `Ayuda con: ${product.benefits?.slice(0, 2).join(", ")}`}
                      </p>

                          <span key={p} className="text-xs font-medium bg-black/5 text-black px-2.5 py-1 rounded-md">
                            {p}
                          </span>
                        ))}
                      </div>
                      <div className="mt-auto pt-4 border-t border-gray-100 flex items-center justify-between">
                        <span className="font-bold text-lg text-black">
                          {product.price ? `${product.price}€` : "Consultar"}
                        </span>
                        <Link href={`/products/${product.slug}`} className="text-black hover:bg-black hover:text-white p-2 rounded-lg transition-colors">
                          <ArrowRight className="w-5 h-5" />
                        </Link>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </motion.div>
                ))}
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="text-center py-12">
                <Zap className="w-12 h-12 text-gray-300 mx-auto mb-4" />
                <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2">No hay productos disponibles</h3>
                <p className="text-gray-600 mb-6">
                  Intenta ajustar tus criterios de búsqueda
                </p>

                  onClick={resetSearch}
                  className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 bg-black text-white rounded-xl font-semibold hover:bg-black/90 transition-colors"
                >
                  <Sparkles className="w-4 h-4" />
                  Nuevas Recomendaciones
                </button>
              </div>
            )}
          </motion.div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
