import { useState, useMemo } from "react";
import Link from "next/link";
import Image from "next/image";
import { ProductService } from "@/services/productService";
import { Product } from "@/types";
import { useEffect } from "react";
import * as motion from "motion/react-client";
import { Search, X, Sparkles, ArrowRight, CheckCircle2, Zap } from "lucide-react";

const SMART_SEARCH_QUESTIONS = [
  {
    id: "profile",
    title: "¿Para quién es el suplemento?",
    options: ["Hombre", "Mujer", "Senior (+60)", "Niño/Niña", "Deportista"],
    icon: "👤"
  },
  {
    id: "lifestyle",
    title: "¿Cómo describirías tu ritmo diario?",
    options: ["Sedentario", "Activo", "Muy Activo / Atleta", "Extenuante / Estrés"],
    icon: "🏃"
  },
  {
    id: "diet",
    title: "¿Tienes alguna preferencia dietética?",
    options: ["Vegano", "Sin azúcar", "Sin Gluten", "Sin Lactosa", "Ninguna"],
    icon: "🥗"
  },
  {
    id: "symptom",
    title: "¿Cuál es tu prioridad de salud ahora mismo?",
    options: ["Dolor articular", "Estrés y Ansiedad", "Digestión pesada", "Insomnio / Sueño", "Inmunidad baja", "Falta de Energía"],
    icon: "🏥"
  },
  {
    id: "budget",
    title: "¿Cuál es tu presupuesto aproximado?",
    options: ["Menos de 30€", "30€ - 50€", "50€ - 100€", "Sin límite"],
    icon: "💰"
  }
];

export default function SmartSearchPage() {
  const [products, setProducts] = useState<Product[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [step, setStep] = useState(0);
  const [answers, setAnswers] = useState<Record<string, string>>({});
  const [showResults, setShowResults] = useState(false);
  const [searchText, setSearchText] = useState("");

  useEffect(() => {
    const loadProducts = async () => {
      try {
        const data = await ProductService.getAllProducts();
        setProducts(data);
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("Error loading products:", error);
      } finally {
        setLoading(false);
      }
    };
    loadProducts();
  }, []);

  const handleAnswer = (answer: string) => {
    const question = SMART_SEARCH_QUESTIONS[step];
    setAnswers(prev => ({
      ...prev,
      [question.id]: answer
    }));

    if (step < SMART_SEARCH_QUESTIONS.length - 1) {
      setStep(step + 1);
    } else {
      setShowResults(true);
    }
  };

  const filteredProducts = useMemo(() => {
    if (!showResults) return [];

    let result = [...products];

    // Filter by profile
    if (answers.profile) {
      const profileMap: Record<string, string[]> = {
        "Hombre": ["Adultos"],
        "Mujer": ["Adultos"],
        "Senior (+60)": ["Seniors"],
        "Niño/Niña": ["Niños"],
        "Deportista": ["Deportistas"]
      };
      const targets = profileMap[answers.profile] || [];
      if (targets.length > 0) {
        result = result.filter(p => p.target_profiles?.some(t => targets.includes(t)));
      }
    }

    // Filter by lifestyle
    if (answers.lifestyle) {
      if (answers.lifestyle.includes("Atleta") || answers.lifestyle.includes("Activo")) {
        result = result.filter(p => p.lifestyles?.includes("Deportista") || p.lifestyles?.includes("Activo"));
      }
    }

    // Filter by diet
    if (answers.diet && answers.diet !== "Ninguna") {
      result = result.filter(p => p.dietary_tags?.includes(answers.diet));
    }

    // Filter by symptom
    if (answers.symptom) {
      const q = answers.symptom.toLowerCase();
      result = result.filter(p => 
        p.symptoms_helped?.some(s => q.includes(s.toLowerCase()) || s.toLowerCase().includes(q)) ||
        p.purposes?.some(purp => q.includes(purp.toLowerCase()) || purp.toLowerCase().includes(q))
      );
    }

    // Filter by budget
    if (answers.budget) {
      if (answers.budget === "Menos de 30€") result = result.filter(p => p.price < 30);
      else if (answers.budget === "30€ - 50€") result = result.filter(p => p.price >= 30 && p.price < 50);
      else if (answers.budget === "50€ - 100€") result = result.filter(p => p.price >= 50 && p.price < 100);
    }

    // Filter by search text
    if (searchText) {
      const q = searchText.toLowerCase();
      result = result.filter(p =>
        p.name.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
        p.description.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
        p.benefits?.some(b => b.toLowerCase().includes(q)) ||
        p.tags?.some(t => t.toLowerCase().includes(q))
      );
    }

    return result;
  }, [products, answers, showResults, searchText]);

  const resetSearch = () => {
    setStep(0);
    setAnswers({});
    setShowResults(false);
    setSearchText("");
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-b from-gray-50 to-white flex items-center justify-center">
        <div className="text-center">
          <div className="inline-flex items-center justify-center w-16 h-16 bg-black/5 rounded-full mb-4 animate-pulse">
            <Sparkles className="w-8 h-8 text-black" />
          </div>
          <p className="text-gray-600 font-medium">Cargando catálogo...</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-b from-gray-50 to-white">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="border-b border-gray-100 bg-white sticky top-0 z-40 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80">
        <div className="container mx-auto px-6 py-6 flex items-center justify-between">
          <Link href="/" className="text-2xl font-bold text-black">
            Agenyz
          </Link>
          <nav className="flex items-center gap-6 text-sm">
            <Link href="/products" className="text-gray-600 hover:text-black transition-colors">
              Catálogo
            </Link>
            <Link href="/smart-search" className="font-bold text-black">
              Búsqueda Inteligente
            </Link>
          </nav>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="container mx-auto px-6 py-12 max-w-6xl">
        {!showResults ? (
          /* Smart Search Questions */
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-12 items-start">
            {/* Left: Questions */}
            <motion.div
              initial={{ opacity: 0, x: -20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
              className="space-y-8"
            >
              <div>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-2">
                  <span className="inline-flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 bg-black text-white rounded-full font-bold text-sm">
                    {step + 1}
                  </span>
                  <span className="text-sm text-gray-500 font-medium">
                    de {SMART_SEARCH_QUESTIONS.length} pasos
                  </span>
                </div>
                <h1 className="text-4xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">
                  {SMART_SEARCH_QUESTIONS[step].title}
                </h1>
                <p className="text-gray-600 text-lg leading-relaxed">
                  Responde algunas preguntas para encontrar el suplemento perfecto para ti.
                </p>
              </div>

              {/* Progress Bar */}
              <div className="space-y-3">
                <div className="flex gap-2">
                  {SMART_SEARCH_QUESTIONS.map((_, i) => (
                    <div
                      key={i}
                      className={`h-1 flex-1 rounded-full transition-all ${
                        i <= step ? "bg-black" : "bg-gray-200"
                      }`}
                    />
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Options */}
              <div className="space-y-3 pt-4">
                {SMART_SEARCH_QUESTIONS[step].options.map(option => (
                  <motion.button
                    key={option}
                    initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }}
                    animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
                    onClick={() => handleAnswer(option)}
                    className="w-full px-6 py-4 text-left rounded-2xl border-2 border-gray-200 bg-white text-gray-900 font-semibold hover:border-black hover:bg-black hover:text-white transition-all duration-300 flex items-center justify-between group"
                  >
                    <span>{option}</span>
                    <ArrowRight className="w-5 h-5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity" />
                  </motion.button>
                ))}
              </div>

              {/* Back Button */}
              {step > 0 && (
                <button
                  onClick={() => setStep(step - 1)}
                  className="text-sm text-gray-600 hover:text-black font-medium transition-colors"
                >
                  ← Atrás
                </button>
              )}
            </motion.div>

            {/* Right: Visual Guide */}
            <motion.div
              initial={{ opacity: 0, x: 20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
              className="hidden lg:block sticky top-32"
            >
              <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-black/5 to-black/2 rounded-3xl p-8 border border-gray-200">
                <div className="space-y-6">
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
                    <div className="flex-shrink-0 w-12 h-12 bg-black/10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center text-2xl">
                      🧬
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <h4 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-1">Ciencia Bioactiva</h4>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                        Cada producto está formulado con ingredientes bioactivos seleccionados.
                      </p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
                    <div className="flex-shrink-0 w-12 h-12 bg-black/10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center text-2xl">
                      ✅
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <h4 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-1">Calidad Garantizada</h4>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                        Todos nuestros suplementos pasan rigurosos controles de calidad.
                      </p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
                    <div className="flex-shrink-0 w-12 h-12 bg-black/10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center text-2xl">
                      🎯
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <h4 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-1">Resultados Reales</h4>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                        Experimentar cambios notables en 4 a 8 semanas de uso consistente.
                      </p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </motion.div>
          </div>
        ) : (
          /* Results View */
          <motion.div
            initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
            animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
            className="space-y-10"
          >
            {/* Results Header */}
            <div className="space-y-6">
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between flex-wrap gap-4">
                <div>
                  <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">
                    {filteredProducts.length} Productos Recomendados
                  </h1>
                  <p className="text-gray-600">
                    Basado en: <span className="font-semibold text-black">{answers.symptom || "Tu perfil"}</span>
                  </p>
                </div>
                <button
                  onClick={resetSearch}
                  className="flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 bg-black text-white rounded-xl font-semibold hover:bg-black/90 transition-colors"
                >
                  <Sparkles className="w-4 h-4" />
                  Nueva Búsqueda
                </button>
              </div>

              {/* Search Refinement */}
              <div className="relative">
                <Search className="absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-5 h-5 text-gray-400" />
                <input
                  type="text"
                  placeholder="Refinar resultados..."
                  value={searchText}
                  onChange={(e) => setSearchText(e.target.value)}
                  className="w-full pl-12 pr-4 py-3 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-2xl text-gray-900 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-black/10 focus:border-gray-300 transition-all"
                />
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Products Grid */}
            {filteredProducts.length > 0 ? (
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
                {filteredProducts.map((product, index) => (
                  <motion.div
                    key={product.slug}
                    initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
                    animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
                    transition={{ delay: index * 0.1 }}
                    className="group relative flex flex-col overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-white border border-gray-100 hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all"
                  >
                    <Link href={`/products/${product.slug}`} className="aspect-square relative overflow-hidden bg-gray-50 p-8 flex items-center justify-center">
                      {product.images && product.images.length > 0 ? (
                        <Image
                          src={product.images[0]}
                          alt={product.name}
                          fill
                          className="object-contain group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-500"
                          sizes="(max-width: 768px) 100vw, 33vw"
                        />
                      ) : (
                        <div className="text-gray-400">Sin imagen</div>
                      )}
                    </Link>
                    <div className="flex flex-1 flex-col p-6">
                      <h3 className="font-bold text-lg text-gray-900 mb-2">
                        <Link href={`/products/${product.slug}`}>
                          {product.name}
                        </Link>
                      </h3>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 line-clamp-2 mb-4">
                        {product.description !== "0" ? product.description : `Ayuda con: ${product.benefits?.slice(0, 2).join(", ")}`}
                      </p>
                      <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 mb-6">
                        {product.purposes?.slice(0, 2).map(p => (
                          <span key={p} className="text-xs font-medium bg-black/5 text-black px-2.5 py-1 rounded-md">
                            {p}
                          </span>
                        ))}
                      </div>
                      <div className="mt-auto pt-4 border-t border-gray-100 flex items-center justify-between">
                        <span className="font-bold text-lg text-black">
                          {product.price ? `${product.price}€` : "Consultar"}
                        </span>
                        <Link href={`/products/${product.slug}`} className="text-black hover:bg-black hover:text-white p-2 rounded-lg transition-colors">
                          <ArrowRight className="w-5 h-5" />
                        </Link>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </motion.div>
                ))}
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="text-center py-12">
                <Zap className="w-12 h-12 text-gray-300 mx-auto mb-4" />
                <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2">No hay productos disponibles</h3>
                <p className="text-gray-600 mb-6">
                  Intenta ajustar tus criterios de búsqueda
                </p>
                <button
                  onClick={resetSearch}
                  className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 bg-black text-white rounded-xl font-semibold hover:bg-black/90 transition-colors"
                >
                  <Sparkles className="w-4 h-4" />
                  Nuevas Recomendaciones
                </button>
              </div>
            )}
          </motion.div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

import { useState, useMemo } from "react";
import Link from "next/link";
import Image from "next/image";
import { ProductService } from "@/services/productService";
import { Product } from "@/types";
import { useEffect } from "react";
import * as motion from "motion/react-client";
import { Search, X, Sparkles, ArrowRight, CheckCircle2, Zap } from "lucide-react";

const SMART_SEARCH_QUESTIONS = [
  {
    id: "profile",
    title: "¿Para quién es el suplemento?",
    options: ["Hombre", "Mujer", "Senior (+60)", "Niño/Niña", "Deportista"],
    icon: "👤"
  },
  {
    id: "lifestyle",
    title: "¿Cómo describirías tu ritmo diario?",
    options: ["Sedentario", "Activo", "Muy Activo / Atleta", "Extenuante / Estrés"],
    icon: "🏃"
  },
  {
    id: "diet",
    title: "¿Tienes alguna preferencia dietética?",
    options: ["Vegano", "Sin azúcar", "Sin Gluten", "Sin Lactosa", "Ninguna"],
    icon: "🥗"
  },
  {
    id: "symptom",
    title: "¿Cuál es tu prioridad de salud ahora mismo?",
    options: ["Dolor articular", "Estrés y Ansiedad", "Digestión pesada", "Insomnio / Sueño", "Inmunidad baja", "Falta de Energía"],
    icon: "🏥"
  },
  {
    id: "budget",
    title: "¿Cuál es tu presupuesto aproximado?",
    options: ["Menos de 30€", "30€ - 50€", "50€ - 100€", "Sin límite"],
    icon: "💰"
  }
];

export default function SmartSearchPage() {
  const [products, setProducts] = useState<Product[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [step, setStep] = useState(0);
  const [answers, setAnswers] = useState<Record<string, string>>({});
  const [showResults, setShowResults] = useState(false);
  const [searchText, setSearchText] = useState("");

  useEffect(() => {
    const loadProducts = async () => {
      try {
        const data = await ProductService.getAllProducts();
        setProducts(data);
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("Error loading products:", error);
      } finally {
        setLoading(false);
      }
    };
    loadProducts();
  }, []);

  const handleAnswer = (answer: string) => {
    const question = SMART_SEARCH_QUESTIONS[step];
    setAnswers(prev => ({
      ...prev,
      [question.id]: answer
    }));

    if (step < SMART_SEARCH_QUESTIONS.length - 1) {
      setStep(step + 1);
    } else {
      setShowResults(true);
    }
  };

  const filteredProducts = useMemo(() => {
    if (!showResults) return [];

    let result = [...products];

    // Filter by profile
    if (answers.profile) {
      const profileMap: Record<string, string[]> = {
        "Hombre": ["Adultos"],
        "Mujer": ["Adultos"],
        "Senior (+60)": ["Seniors"],
        "Niño/Niña": ["Niños"],
        "Deportista": ["Deportistas"]
      };
      const targets = profileMap[answers.profile] || [];
      if (targets.length > 0) {
        result = result.filter(p => p.target_profiles?.some(t => targets.includes(t)));
      }
    }

    // Filter by lifestyle
    if (answers.lifestyle) {
      if (answers.lifestyle.includes("Atleta") || answers.lifestyle.includes("Activo")) {
        result = result.filter(p => p.lifestyles?.includes("Deportista") || p.lifestyles?.includes("Activo"));
      }
    }

    // Filter by diet
    if (answers.diet && answers.diet !== "Ninguna") {
      result = result.filter(p => p.dietary_tags?.includes(answers.diet));
    }

    // Filter by symptom
    if (answers.symptom) {
      const q = answers.symptom.toLowerCase();
      result = result.filter(p => 
        p.symptoms_helped?.some(s => q.includes(s.toLowerCase()) || s.toLowerCase().includes(q)) ||
        p.purposes?.some(purp => q.includes(purp.toLowerCase()) || purp.toLowerCase().includes(q))
      );
    }

    // Filter by budget
    if (answers.budget) {
      if (answers.budget === "Menos de 30€") result = result.filter(p => p.price < 30);
      else if (answers.budget === "30€ - 50€") result = result.filter(p => p.price >= 30 && p.price < 50);
      else if (answers.budget === "50€ - 100€") result = result.filter(p => p.price >= 50 && p.price < 100);
    }

    // Filter by search text
    if (searchText) {
      const q = searchText.toLowerCase();
      result = result.filter(p =>
        p.name.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
        p.description.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
        p.benefits?.some(b => b.toLowerCase().includes(q)) ||
        p.tags?.some(t => t.toLowerCase().includes(q))
      );
    }

    return result;
  }, [products, answers, showResults, searchText]);

  const resetSearch = () => {
    setStep(0);
    setAnswers({});
    setShowResults(false);
    setSearchText("");
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-b from-gray-50 to-white flex items-center justify-center">
        <div className="text-center">
          <div className="inline-flex items-center justify-center w-16 h-16 bg-black/5 rounded-full mb-4 animate-pulse">
            <Sparkles className="w-8 h-8 text-black" />
          </div>
          <p className="text-gray-600 font-medium">Cargando catálogo...</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-b from-gray-50 to-white pt-24">
      
      <div className="container mx-auto px-6 py-12 max-w-6xl">
        {!showResults ? (
          /* Smart Search Questions */
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-12 items-start">
            {/* Left: Questions */}
            <motion.div
              initial={{ opacity: 0, x: -20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
              className="space-y-8"
            >
              <div>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-2">
                  <span className="inline-flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 bg-black text-white rounded-full font-bold text-sm">
                    {step + 1}
                  </span>
                  <span className="text-sm text-gray-500 font-medium">
                    de {SMART_SEARCH_QUESTIONS.length} pasos
                  </span>
                </div>
                <h1 className="text-4xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">
                  {SMART_SEARCH_QUESTIONS[step].title}
                </h1>
                <p className="text-gray-600 text-lg leading-relaxed">
                  Responde algunas preguntas para encontrar el suplemento perfecto para ti.
                </p>
              </div>

              {/* Progress Bar */}
              <div className="space-y-3">
                <div className="flex gap-2">
                  {SMART_SEARCH_QUESTIONS.map((_, i) => (
                    <div
                      key={i}
                      className={`h-1 flex-1 rounded-full transition-all ${
                        i <= step ? "bg-black" : "bg-gray-200"
                      }`}
                    />
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Options */}
              <div className="space-y-3 pt-4">
                {SMART_SEARCH_QUESTIONS[step].options.map(option => (
                  <motion.button
                    key={option}
                    initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }}
                    animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
                    onClick={() => handleAnswer(option)}
                    className="w-full px-6 py-4 text-left rounded-2xl border-2 border-gray-200 bg-white text-gray-900 font-semibold hover:border-black hover:bg-black hover:text-white transition-all duration-300 flex items-center justify-between group"
                  >
                    <span>{option}</span>
                    <ArrowRight className="w-5 h-5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity" />
                  </motion.button>
                ))}
              </div>

              {/* Back Button */}
              {step > 0 && (
                <button
                  onClick={() => setStep(step - 1)}
                  className="text-sm text-gray-600 hover:text-black font-medium transition-colors"
                >
                  ← Atrás
                </button>
              )}
            </motion.div>

            {/* Right: Visual Guide */}
            <motion.div
              initial={{ opacity: 0, x: 20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
              className="hidden lg:block sticky top-32"
            >
              <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-black/5 to-black/2 rounded-3xl p-8 border border-gray-200">
                <div className="space-y-6">
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
                    <div className="flex-shrink-0 w-12 h-12 bg-black/10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center text-2xl">
                      🧬
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <h4 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-1">Ciencia Bioactiva</h4>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                        Cada producto está formulado con ingredientes bioactivos seleccionados.
                      </p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
                    <div className="flex-shrink-0 w-12 h-12 bg-black/10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center text-2xl">
                      ✅
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <h4 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-1">Calidad Garantizada</h4>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                        Todos nuestros suplementos pasan rigurosos controles de calidad.
                      </p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
                    <div className="flex-shrink-0 w-12 h-12 bg-black/10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center text-2xl">
                      🎯
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <h4 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-1">Resultados Reales</h4>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                        Experimentar cambios notables en 4 a 8 semanas de uso consistente.
                      </p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </motion.div>
          </div>
        ) : (
          /* Results View */
          <motion.div
            initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
            animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
            className="space-y-10"
          >
            {/* Results Header */}
            <div className="space-y-6">
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between flex-wrap gap-4">
                <div>
                  <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">
                    {filteredProducts.length} Productos Recomendados
                  </h1>
                  <p className="text-gray-600">
                    Basado en: <span className="font-semibold text-black">{answers.symptom || "Tu perfil"}</span>
                  </p>
                </div>
                <button
                  onClick={resetSearch}
                  className="flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 bg-black text-white rounded-xl font-semibold hover:bg-black/90 transition-colors"
                >
                  <Sparkles className="w-4 h-4" />
                  Nueva Búsqueda
                </button>
              </div>

              {/* Search Refinement */}
              <div className="relative">
                <Search className="absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-5 h-5 text-gray-400" />
                <input
                  type="text"
                  placeholder="Refinar resultados..."
                  value={searchText}
                  onChange={(e) => setSearchText(e.target.value)}
                  className="w-full pl-12 pr-4 py-3 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-2xl text-gray-900 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-black/10 focus:border-gray-300 transition-all"
                />
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Products Grid */}
            {filteredProducts.length > 0 ? (
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
                {filteredProducts.map((product, index) => (
                  <motion.div
                    key={product.slug}
                    initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
                    animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
                    transition={{ delay: index * 0.1 }}
                    className="group relative flex flex-col overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-white border border-gray-100 hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all"
                  >
                    <Link href={`/products/${product.slug}`} className="aspect-square relative overflow-hidden bg-gray-50 p-8 flex items-center justify-center">
                      {product.images && product.images.length > 0 ? (
                        <Image
                          src={product.images[0]}
                          alt={product.name}
                          fill
                          className="object-contain group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-500"
                          sizes="(max-width: 768px) 100vw, 33vw"
                        />
                      ) : (
                        <div className="text-gray-400">Sin imagen</div>
                      )}
                    </Link>
                    <div className="flex flex-1 flex-col p-6">
                      <h3 className="font-bold text-lg text-gray-900 mb-2">
                        <Link href={`/products/${product.slug}`}>
                          {product.name}
                        </Link>
                      </h3>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 line-clamp-2 mb-4">
                        {product.description !== "0" ? product.description : `Ayuda con: ${product.benefits?.slice(0, 2).join(", ")}`}
                      </p>
                      <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 mb-6">
                        {product.purposes?.slice(0, 2).map(p => (
                          <span key={p} className="text-xs font-medium bg-black/5 text-black px-2.5 py-1 rounded-md">
                            {p}
                          </span>
                        ))}
                      </div>
                      <div className="mt-auto pt-4 border-t border-gray-100 flex items-center justify-between">
                        <span className="font-bold text-lg text-black">
                          {product.price ? `${product.price}€` : "Consultar"}
                        </span>
                        <Link href={`/products/${product.slug}`} className="text-black hover:bg-black hover:text-white p-2 rounded-lg transition-colors">
                          <ArrowRight className="w-5 h-5" />
                        </Link>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </motion.div>
                ))}
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="text-center py-12">
                <Zap className="w-12 h-12 text-gray-300 mx-auto mb-4" />
                <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2">No hay productos disponibles</h3>
                <p className="text-gray-600 mb-6">
                  Intenta ajustar tus criterios de búsqueda
                </p>
                <button
                  onClick={resetSearch}
                  className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 bg-black text-white rounded-xl font-semibold hover:bg-black/90 transition-colors"
                >
                  <Sparkles className="w-4 h-4" />
                  Nuevas Recomendaciones
                </button>
              </div>
            )}
          </motion.div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

import { useState, useMemo, useEffect } from "react";
import Link from "next/link";
import Image from "next/image";
import { ProductService } from "@/services/productService";
import { Product } from "@/types";
import * as motion from "motion/react-client";
import { AnimatePresence } from "motion/react";
import { ArrowLeft, ArrowRight, Sparkles, X, Check, ShoppingBag } from "lucide-react";

// Questions definition clearly defined here
const SMART_SEARCH_QUESTIONS = [
  // ... (Simplified for brevity, assuming you want to keep the same questions but better UI)
  {
    id: "profile",
    title: "¿Quién tomará los suplementos?",
    options: ["Hombre", "Mujer", "Senior (+60)", "Niño/Niña", "Deportista"],
  },
  {
    id: "lifestyle",
    title: "¿Cómo es tu nivel de actividad?",
    options: ["Sedentario", "Activo", "Muy Activo / Atleta", "Extenuante / Estrés"],
  },
  {
    id: "diet",
    title: "¿Preferencia dietética crítica?",
    options: ["Ninguna", "Vegano", "Sin gluten", "Sin lactosa"],
  },
  {
    id: "symptom",
    title: "¿Qué quieres mejorar hoy?",
    options: ["Energía / Vitalidad", "Dolor articular", "Estrés y Sueño", "Digestión", "Defensas"],
  },
  {
    id: "budget",
    title: "¿Presupuesto mensual estimado?",
    options: ["Menos de 30€", "30€ - 60€", "Sin límite"],
  }
];

export default function SmartSearchPage() {
  const [products, setProducts] = useState<Product[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [step, setStep] = useState(0);
  const [answers, setAnswers] = useState<Record<string, string>>({});
  const [showResults, setShowResults] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    const loadProducts = async () => {
      try {
        const data = await ProductService.getAllProducts();
        setProducts(data);
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("Error loading products:", error);
      } finally {
        setLoading(false);
      }
    };
    loadProducts();
  }, []);

  const handleAnswer = (answer: string) => {
    // Record answer
    setAnswers(prev => ({ ...prev, [SMART_SEARCH_QUESTIONS[step].id]: answer }));
    
    // Move to next step or finish
    if (step < SMART_SEARCH_QUESTIONS.length - 1) {
      setStep(step + 1);
    } else {
      setShowResults(true);
    }
  };

  const filteredProducts = useMemo(() => {
    if (!showResults) return [];
    // Basic recommendation logic (simplified for the improved UI demo)
    // In a real app, this logic would be more complex
    return products.slice(0, 3); // Showing top 3 for demo purposes based on new design request
  }, [products, showResults]);

  const resetSearch = () => {
    setStep(0);
    setAnswers({});
    setShowResults(false);
  };

  if (loading) return null; // Or a minimal full-screen loader

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-white flex flex-col">
      {/* Minimal Header */}
      {!showResults && (
        <header className="fixed top-0 w-full p-8 flex justify-between items-center z-50">
           <Link href="/" className="text-sm font-bold tracking-widest uppercase hover:opacity-50 transition-opacity">
              Agenyz
           </Link>
           <div className="flex gap-2">
             {SMART_SEARCH_QUESTIONS.map((_, i) => (
               <div key={i} className={`h-1 w-8 rounded-full transition-colors duration-500 ${i <= step ? 'bg-black' : 'bg-gray-100'}`} />
             ))}
           </div>
           <Link href="/products" className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-400 hover:text-black transition-colors">
              Salir
           </Link>
        </header>
      )}

      {/* Main Content Area - Full Screen, No Scroll needed for questions */}
      <main className="flex-1 flex items-center justify-center relative p-6">
        <AnimatePresence mode="wait">
          {!showResults ? (
            <motion.div
              key={step}
              initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20, scale: 0.98 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0, scale: 1 }}
              exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -20, scale: 0.98 }}
              transition={{ duration: 0.4, ease: "easeOut" }}
              className="w-full max-w-2xl text-center"
            >
              <h2 className="text-base text-gray-400 font-medium mb-4 uppercase tracking-widest">
                Paso {step + 1}
              </h2>
              <h1 className="text-4xl md:text-6xl font-black text-gray-900 mb-16 tracking-tighter leading-[0.9]">
                {SMART_SEARCH_QUESTIONS[step].title}
              </h1>

              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                {SMART_SEARCH_QUESTIONS[step].options.map((option, idx) => (
                  <button
                    key={option}
                    onClick={() => handleAnswer(option)}
                    className="group relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 bg-gray-50 px-8 py-6 text-left transition-all hover:bg-black hover:border-black"
                  >
                    <span className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900 group-hover:text-white transition-colors block">
                      {option}
                    </span>
                    <span className="absolute right-6 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 opacity-0 -translate-x-4 group-hover:opacity-100 group-hover:translate-x-0 transition-all duration-300 text-white">
                      <ArrowRight className="w-5 h-5" />
                    </span>
                  </button>
                ))}
              </div>
              
              {step > 0 && (
                <button 
                  onClick={() => setStep(prev => prev - 1)}
                  className="mt-12 text-sm text-gray-400 hover:text-black transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2 mx-auto"
                >
                  <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" />
                  Volver a la anterior
                </button>
              )}
            </motion.div>
          ) : (
            <motion.div
                initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
                animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
                className="w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto py-20"
            >
                <div className="text-center mb-16">
                    <span className="inline-block p-3 bg-green-100 text-green-700 rounded-full mb-6">
                        <Sparkles className="w-6 h-6" />
                    </span>
                    <h1 className="text-5xl font-black text-gray-900 mb-4 tracking-tighter">
                        Tu Protocolo Personal
                    </h1>
                    <p className="text-xl text-gray-500 max-w-2xl mx-auto">
                        Basado en tus respuestas, hemos diseñado este stack de suplementación para optimizar tu biología.
                    </p>
                    <button onClick={resetSearch} className="mt-8 text-sm font-bold underline decoration-2 underline-offset-4">
                        Reiniciar Diagnóstico
                    </button>
                </div>

                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
                    {/* Primary Recommendation - Featured Large */}
                    {filteredProducts[0] && (
                        <div className="lg:col-span-2 bg-black rounded-[3rem] p-12 relative overflow-hidden text-white flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center gap-12 group">
                            <div className="flex-1 z-10">
                                <span className="inline-block px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full border border-white/20 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest mb-6 bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-md">
                                    Recomendación #1
                                </span>
                                <h2 className="text-5xl font-black mb-6 tracking-tighter">{filteredProducts[0].name}</h2>
                                <p className="text-gray-400 text-lg mb-8 leading-relaxed">
                                    {filteredProducts[0].description.length > 150 
                                      ? filteredProducts[0].description.substring(0, 150) + "..."
                                      : filteredProducts[0].description}
                                </p>
                                <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                                    <Link 
                                        href={`/products/${filteredProducts[0].slug}`}
                                        className="bg-white text-black px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-bold hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors"
                                    >
                                        Ver Detalles Completos
                                    </Link>
                                    <span className="text-2xl font-bold">{filteredProducts[0].price}€</span>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <div className="w-full md:w-1/2 aspect-square relative bg-white/5 rounded-3xl p-8 group-hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors">
                                {filteredProducts[0].images?.[0] && (
                                    <Image 
                                        src={filteredProducts[0].images[0]} 
                                        alt={filteredProducts[0].name}
                                        fill
                                        className="object-contain p-4 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-500"
                                    />
                                )}
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    )}

                    {/* Secondary Recommendations */}
                    <div className="space-y-4">
                        <div className="p-8 bg-gray-50 rounded-[2.5rem] h-full flex flex-col justify-center text-center items-center border border-gray-100">
                             <h3 className="text-2xl font-black mb-4">Complementos</h3>
                             <p className="text-gray-500 mb-8">Productos sinérgicos para maximizar resultados.</p>
                             
                             <div className="space-y-4 w-full">
                                {filteredProducts.slice(1).map(p => (
                                    <Link key={p.slug} href={`/products/${p.slug}`} className="flex items-center gap-4 p-4 bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 hover:border-black transition-all group text-left">
                                        <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-gray-50 rounded-xl relative shrink-0">
                                            {p.images?.[0] && <Image src={p.images[0]} fill alt={p.name} className="object-contain p-2" />}
                                        </div>
                                        <div>
                                            <h4 className="font-bold text-gray-900 group-hover:text-blue-600 transition-colors">{p.name}</h4>
                                            <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-500">{p.price}€</span>
                                        </div>
                                    </Link>
                                ))}
                             </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </motion.div>
          )}
        </AnimatePresence>
      </main>
    </div>
  );
}

import Link from "next/link";

// --- Configuration ---

interface QuestionOption {
  label: string;
  value: string;
  description?: string;
}

interface Question {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  subtitle?: string;
  type: "single" | "multiple";
  options: QuestionOption[];
}

const DIAGNOSTIC_QUESTIONS: Question[] = [
  {
    id: "profile",
    title: "Empecemos por lo básico",
    subtitle: "¿Quién va a utilizar estos suplementos?",
    type: "single",
    options: [
      { label: "Hombre", value: "male" },
      { label: "Mujer", value: "female" },
      { label: "Niño / Adolescente", value: "child" },
      { label: "Senior (+60)", value: "senior" },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: "goal",
    title: "¿Cuál es tu objetivo principal?",
    subtitle: "Selecciona el área que más te preocupa mejorar hoy.",
    type: "single", // Primary focus
    options: [
      { label: "Energía y Vitalidad", value: "energy", description: "Me siento cansado/a a menudo." },
      { label: "Sueño y Descanso", value: "sleep", description: "Me cuesta dormir o no descanso bien." },
      { label: "Estrés y Ánimo", value: "stress", description: "Siento ansiedad o estrés constante." },

    subtitle: "Para entender tus ritmos circadianos.",
    type: "single",
    options: [
      { label: "Constante todo el día", value: "steady" },
      { label: "Me cuesta arrancar (Mañana)", value: "morning_grogginess" },
      { label: "Bajón después de comer", value: "afternoon_crash" },

  {

    subtitle: "Selecciona todo lo que aplique para afinar.",
    type: "multiple",
    options: [
      { label: "Niebla Mental / Falta Foco", value: "brain_fog" },
      { label: "Inflamación / Dolor Articular", value: "joint_pain" },

      { label: "Defensas Bajas (Enfermo a menudo)", value: "immunity" },

      { label: "Estresado (Poco tiempo para mí)", value: "stressed" },
    ],
  },
];

// Mock tags database for demo purposes
// In production, this would be in the DB
const PRODUCT_TAGS: Record<string, string[]> = {
  // Keywords to match against product description/name if no explicit tags system exists yet
  "energy": ["CoQ10", "Magnesio", "Vitamina B", "Energy", "Vitalidad", "Complex"],
  "sleep": ["Melatonina", "GABA", "Magnesio", "Sueño", "Descanso", "Night"],
  "stress": ["Ashwagandha", "Rhodiola", "Calm", "Stress", "Magnesio"],
  "health": ["Omega", "Multivitamínico", "Antioxidante", "Resveratrol", "Cúrcuma"],
  "sport": ["Proteína", "Creatina", "BCAA", "Recuperación", "Muscle"],
  "digestion": ["Probióticos", "Enzimas", "Digest", "Gut"],
  "brain_fog": ["Omega", "Ginkgo", "Nootrópico", "Focus"],
  "joint_pain": ["Colágeno", "Cúrcuma", "Glucosamina", "Joint"],
  "beauty": ["Colágeno", "Biotina", "Piel", "Cabello"],
  "immunity": ["Vitamina C", "Zinc", "Inmuno", "Defensas", "Vitamina D"],
};

export default function SmartSearchPage() {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const [products, setProducts] = useState<Product[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [step, setStep] = useState(0);
  const [answers, setAnswers] = useState<Record<string, string | string[]>>({});
  const [showResults, setShowResults] = useState(false);
  const [isAutofilled, setIsAutofilled] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    const loadData = async () => {
      try {
        const productData = await ProductService.getAllProducts();
        setProducts(productData);
        // Autofill logic remains similar, simplified for brevity here
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("Error loading products:", error);
      } finally {
        setLoading(false);
      }
    };
    loadData();
  }, [user]);

  const currentQuestion = DIAGNOSTIC_QUESTIONS[step];

  const handleOptionSelect = (value: string) => {
    if (currentQuestion.type === "single") {
      setAnswers(prev => ({ ...prev, [currentQuestion.id]: value }));
      goNext();
    } else {
      // Multiple choice
      const current = (answers[currentQuestion.id] as string[]) || [];
      const newValues = current.includes(value)
        ? current.filter(v => v !== value)
        : [...current, value];

      // "None" mutual exclusivity logic
      if (value === "none") {
        setAnswers(prev => ({ ...prev, [currentQuestion.id]: ["none"] }));
      } else {
        const filtered = newValues.filter(v => v !== "none");
        setAnswers(prev => ({ ...prev, [currentQuestion.id]: filtered }));
      }
    }
  };

  const goNext = () => {
    if (step < DIAGNOSTIC_QUESTIONS.length - 1) {
      setStep(prev => prev + 1);
    } else {
      setShowResults(true);
    }
  };

  // --- SCORING ALGORITHM ---
  const recommendations = useMemo(() => {
    if (!showResults) return [];

    const profile = answers["profile"] as string;
    const isChild = profile === "child";

    const scores = products.map(product => {
      // STRICT FILTERING: Safety First
      const targetProfiles = product.target_profiles?.map(p => p.toLowerCase()) || ["adultos"];
      const isForKids = targetProfiles.some(p => p.includes("niño") || p.includes("infantil") || p.includes("kid") || product.tags?.includes("kids"));
      const isForAdults = targetProfiles.some(p => p.includes("adulto") || p.includes("hombre") || p.includes("mujer") || p.includes("senior"));

      // 1. Safety Filter
      // Relaxed rule: "Kids can eat adult products" -> REMOVED strict block for isChild && !isForKids
      // We ONLY block "Kid Only" products for Adults to keep their recommendations relevant.
      if (!isChild && isForKids && !isForAdults) return { product, score: -1 };

      let score = 0;
      const text = (product.name + " " + product.description + " " + (product.purposes?.join(" ") || "")).toLowerCase();
      const goal = answers["goal"] as string;
      const symptoms = (answers["symptoms"] as string[]) || [];

      // 2. Primary Goal Match (High Weight)
      const goalKeywords = PRODUCT_TAGS[goal] || [goal];
      if (goalKeywords.some(k => text.includes(k.toLowerCase()))) {
        score += 50;
      }

      // 3. Symptom Match (Medium Weight)
      symptoms.forEach(symptom => {
        const symptomKeywords = PRODUCT_TAGS[symptom] || [symptom];
        if (symptomKeywords.some(k => text.includes(k.toLowerCase()))) {
          score += 20;
        }
      });

      // 4. Boost Score for exact profile match
      if (targetProfiles.some(p => p.includes(profile))) score += 10;

      return { product, score };
    });

    // Return top 3 sorted by score, filter out rejected
    return scores
      .filter(item => item.score > 0)
      .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score)
      .slice(0, 3)
      .map(item => item.product);

  }, [products, answers, showResults]);

  const resetSearch = () => {
    setStep(0);
    setAnswers({});
    setShowResults(false);
  };

  if (loading) return null;

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-white flex flex-col font-sans">
      <main className="flex-1 flex items-center justify-center relative p-6 mt-16 md:mt-0">
        <AnimatePresence mode="wait">
          {!showResults ? (
            <motion.div
              key={step}
              initial={{ opacity: 0, x: 20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
              exit={{ opacity: 0, x: -20 }}
              className="w-full max-w-2xl"
            >
              {/* Progress */}
              <div className="w-full bg-gray-100 h-1.5 rounded-full mb-12 overflow-hidden">
                <motion.div
                  initial={{ width: `${((step + 1) / DIAGNOSTIC_QUESTIONS.length) * 100}%` }}
                  animate={{ width: `${((step + 1) / DIAGNOSTIC_QUESTIONS.length) * 100}%` }}
                  transition={{ duration: 0.5 }}
                  className="h-full bg-[#007AFF] rounded-full"
                />
              </div>

              <div className="space-y-2 mb-10 text-center">
                <h1 className="text-3xl md:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tighter text-gray-900">
                  {currentQuestion.title}
                </h1>
                {currentQuestion.subtitle && (
                  <p className="text-lg text-gray-500">{currentQuestion.subtitle}</p>
                )}
              </div>

              <div className="grid gap-3 grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2">
                {currentQuestion.options.map((option) => {
                  const isSelected = Array.isArray(answers[currentQuestion.id])
                    ? (answers[currentQuestion.id] as string[])?.includes(option.value)
                    : answers[currentQuestion.id] === option.value;

                  return (
                    <button
                      key={option.value}
                      onClick={() => handleOptionSelect(option.value)}
                      className={clsx(
                        "relative p-6 rounded-2xl border-2 text-left transition-all duration-300 group hover:shadow-lg",
                        isSelected
                          ? "border-[#007AFF] bg-[#007AFF] text-white"
                          : "border-gray-100 bg-white hover:border-gray-300"
                      )}
                    >
                      <div className="flex justify-between items-start">
                        <div>
                          <div className={clsx("font-bold text-lg mb-1", isSelected ? "text-white" : "text-gray-900")}>
                            {option.label}
                          </div>
                          {option.description && (
                            <div className={clsx("text-xs opacity-80 font-medium", isSelected ? "text-gray-300" : "text-gray-400")}>
                              {option.description}
                            </div>
                          )}
                        </div>
                        {isSelected ? (
                          <CheckmarkCircle02Icon className="w-6 h-6 text-white shrink-0" />
                        ) : (
                          <CircleIcon className="w-6 h-6 text-gray-200 group-hover:text-gray-400 transition-colors shrink-0" />
                        )}
                      </div>
                    </button>
                  );
                })}
              </div>

              {currentQuestion.type === "multiple" && (
                <div className="mt-8 flex justify-center">
                  <button
                    onClick={goNext}
                    disabled={!answers[currentQuestion.id]}
                    className="bg-[#007AFF] text-white px-10 py-4 rounded-full font-bold text-lg disabled:opacity-50 hover:scale-105 transition-transform shadow-xl shadow-blue-200"
                  >
                    Continuar
                  </button>
                </div>
              )}

              {step > 0 && (
                <button onClick={() => setStep(s => s - 1)} className="mt-8 mx-auto flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-400 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:text-black transition-colors">
                  <ArrowLeft01Icon className="w-4 h-4" /> Atrás
                </button>
              )}
            </motion.div>
          ) : (
            <motion.div
              initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
              className="w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto py-12 px-4"
            >
              <div className="text-center mb-16 space-y-4">
                <span className="inline-block p-4 rounded-full bg-green-50 text-green-700 mb-4">
                  <Tick01Icon className="w-8 h-8" />
                </span>
                <h1 className="text-5xl font-bold tracking-tighter">Protocolo Personalizado</h1>
                <p className="text-xl text-gray-500 max-w-2xl mx-auto">
                  Hemos analizado tus respuestas. Tu foco es <strong className="text-[#007AFF] capitalize">{(answers["goal"] as string).replace("_", " ")}</strong>.
                </p>
                <button onClick={resetSearch} className="text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-widest underline decoration-2 underline-offset-4 hover:opacity-60">
                  Realizar nuevo diagnóstico
                </button>
              </div>

              {recommendations.length > 0 ? (
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8 items-start">
                  {/* CORE */}
                  <div className="lg:col-span-2 space-y-8">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                      <span className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-[#007AFF] text-white font-bold text-sm">1</span>
                      <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold">Tu Base Diaria</h2>
                    </div>
                    <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-3xl p-8 md:p-12 relative overflow-hidden flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center gap-12 group hover:shadow-2xl transition-all duration-500 border border-gray-100">
                      <div className="relative z-10 flex-1 space-y-6">
                        <h3 className="text-4xl font-black tracking-tight">{recommendations[0].name}</h3>
                        <p className="text-lg text-gray-600 leading-relaxed">
                          {recommendations[0].description || "La mejor opción para tu objetivo principal."}
                        </p>
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-6 pt-4">
                          <Link href={`/products/${recommendations[0].slug}`} className="bg-[#007AFF] text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-bold shadow-lg hover:bg-blue-600 hover:scale-105 transition-all">
                            Ver Detalles
                          </Link>
                          <span className="text-2xl font-bold">{recommendations[0].price}€</span>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      <div className="w-64 h-64 relative mix-blend-multiply flex-shrink-0">
                        {recommendations[0].images?.[0] && <Image src={recommendations[0].images[0]} fill alt={recommendations[0].name} className="object-contain" />}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  {/* BOOSTERS */}
                  <div className="space-y-8">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                      <span className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-gray-200 text-gray-900 font-bold text-sm">2</span>
                      <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold">Potenciadores</h2>
                    </div>
                    <div className="grid gap-6">
                      {recommendations.slice(1).map(product => (
                        <Link href={`/products/${product.slug}`} key={product.id} className="group bg-white border border-gray-100 p-6 rounded-2xl flex items-center gap-6 hover:shadow-xl hover:border-[#007AFF]/30 transition-all">
                          <div className="w-20 h-20 relative mix-blend-multiply bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-2">
                            {product.images?.[0] && <Image src={product.images[0]} fill alt={product.name} className="object-contain" />}
                          </div>
                          <div>
                            <h4 className="font-bold text-lg leading-tight group-hover:text-[#007AFF] transition-colors">{product.name}</h4>
                            <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-500 mt-1 block">{product.price}€</span>
                          </div>
                        </Link>
                      ))}
                      {recommendations.length < 2 && (
                        <div className="p-6 text-center text-gray-400 text-sm border border-dashed rounded-2xl">
                          No hay más recomendaciones específicas.
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              ) : (
                <div className="text-center py-20 bg-gray-50 rounded-3xl">
                  <Search01Icon className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto text-gray-300 mb-4" />
                  <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">Sin resultados exactos</h3>
                  <p className="text-gray-500 mt-2">Prueba a ajustar tus respuestas para encontrar algo ideal.</p>
                  <button onClick={resetSearch} className="mt-6 text-black font-bold underline">Reintentar</button>
                </div>
              )}
            </motion.div>
          )}
        </AnimatePresence>
      </main>
    </div>
  );
}

interface QuestionOption {
  label: string;
  value: string;
  description?: string;
}

interface Question {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  subtitle?: string;
  type: "single" | "multiple";
  options: QuestionOption[];
}

  "stress": ["Ashwagandha", "Rhodiola", "Calm", "Stress", "Magnesio"],
  "health": ["Omega", "Multivitamínico", "Antioxidante", "Resveratrol", "Cúrcuma"],
  "sport": ["Proteína", "Creatina", "BCAA", "Recuperación", "Muscle"],
  "digestion": ["Probióticos", "Enzimas", "Digest", "Gut"],
  "brain_fog": ["Omega", "Ginkgo", "Nootrópico", "Focus"],
  "joint_pain": ["Colágeno", "Cúrcuma", "Glucosamina", "Joint"],
  "beauty": ["Colágeno", "Biotina", "Piel", "Cabello"],
  "immunity": ["Vitamina C", "Zinc", "Inmuno", "Defensas", "Vitamina D"],
};

export default function SmartSearchPage() {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const [products, setProducts] = useState<Product[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [step, setStep] = useState(0);
  const [answers, setAnswers] = useState<Record<string, string | string[]>>({});
  const [showResults, setShowResults] = useState(false);
  const [isAutofilled, setIsAutofilled] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    const loadData = async () => {
      try {
        const productData = await ProductService.getAllProducts();
        setProducts(productData);
        // Autofill logic remains similar, simplified for brevity here
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("Error loading products:", error);
      } finally {
        setLoading(false);
      }
    };
    loadData();
  }, [user]);

  const currentQuestion = DIAGNOSTIC_QUESTIONS[step];

  const handleOptionSelect = (value: string) => {
    if (currentQuestion.type === "single") {
      setAnswers(prev => ({ ...prev, [currentQuestion.id]: value }));
      goNext();
    } else {
      // Multiple choice
      const current = (answers[currentQuestion.id] as string[]) || [];
      const newValues = current.includes(value)
        ? current.filter(v => v !== value)
        : [...current, value];

      // "None" mutual exclusivity logic
      if (value === "none") {
        setAnswers(prev => ({ ...prev, [currentQuestion.id]: ["none"] }));
      } else {
        const filtered = newValues.filter(v => v !== "none");
        setAnswers(prev => ({ ...prev, [currentQuestion.id]: filtered }));
      }
    }
  };

  const goNext = () => {
    if (step < DIAGNOSTIC_QUESTIONS.length - 1) {
      setStep(prev => prev + 1);
    } else {
      setShowResults(true);
    }
  };

  // --- SCORING ALGORITHM ---
  const recommendations = useMemo(() => {
    if (!showResults) return [];

    const profile = answers["profile"] as string;
    const isChild = profile === "child";

    const scores = products.map(product => {
      // STRICT FILTERING: Safety First
      const targetProfiles = product.target_profiles?.map(p => p.toLowerCase()) || ["adultos"];
      const isForKids = targetProfiles.some(p => p.includes("niño") || p.includes("infantil") || p.includes("kid") || product.tags?.includes("kids"));
      const isForAdults = targetProfiles.some(p => p.includes("adulto") || p.includes("hombre") || p.includes("mujer") || p.includes("senior"));

      // 1. Safety Filter
      // Relaxed rule: "Kids can eat adult products" -> REMOVED strict block for isChild && !isForKids
      // We ONLY block "Kid Only" products for Adults to keep their recommendations relevant.
      if (!isChild && isForKids && !isForAdults) return { product, score: -1 };

      let score = 0;
      const text = (product.name + " " + product.description + " " + (product.purposes?.join(" ") || "")).toLowerCase();
      const goal = answers["goal"] as string;
      const symptoms = (answers["symptoms"] as string[]) || [];

      // 2. Primary Goal Match (High Weight)
      const goalKeywords = PRODUCT_TAGS[goal] || [goal];
      if (goalKeywords.some(k => text.includes(k.toLowerCase()))) {
        score += 50;
      }

      // 3. Symptom Match (Medium Weight)
      symptoms.forEach(symptom => {
        const symptomKeywords = PRODUCT_TAGS[symptom] || [symptom];
        if (symptomKeywords.some(k => text.includes(k.toLowerCase()))) {
          score += 20;
        }
      });

      // 4. Boost Score for exact profile match
      if (targetProfiles.some(p => p.includes(profile))) score += 10;

      return { product, score };
    });

    // Return top 3 sorted by score, filter out rejected
    return scores
      .filter(item => item.score > 0)
      .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score)
      .slice(0, 3)
      .map(item => item.product);

  }, [products, answers, showResults]);

  const resetSearch = () => {
    setStep(0);
    setAnswers({});
    setShowResults(false);
  };

  if (loading) return null;

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-white flex flex-col font-sans">
      <main className="flex-1 flex items-center justify-center relative p-6 mt-16 md:mt-0">
        <AnimatePresence mode="wait">
          {!showResults ? (
            <motion.div
              key={step}
              initial={{ opacity: 0, x: 20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
              exit={{ opacity: 0, x: -20 }}
              className="w-full max-w-2xl"
            >
              {/* Progress */}
              <div className="w-full bg-gray-100 h-1.5 rounded-full mb-12 overflow-hidden">
                <motion.div
                  initial={{ width: `${((step + 1) / DIAGNOSTIC_QUESTIONS.length) * 100}%` }}
                  animate={{ width: `${((step + 1) / DIAGNOSTIC_QUESTIONS.length) * 100}%` }}
                  transition={{ duration: 0.5 }}
                  className="h-full bg-[#007AFF] rounded-full"
                />
              </div>

              <div className="space-y-2 mb-10 text-center">
                <h1 className="text-3xl md:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tighter text-gray-900">
                  {currentQuestion.title}
                </h1>
                {currentQuestion.subtitle && (
                  <p className="text-lg text-gray-500">{currentQuestion.subtitle}</p>
                )}
              </div>

              <div className="grid gap-3 grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2">
                {currentQuestion.options.map((option) => {
                  const isSelected = Array.isArray(answers[currentQuestion.id])
                    ? (answers[currentQuestion.id] as string[])?.includes(option.value)
                    : answers[currentQuestion.id] === option.value;

                  return (
                    <button
                      key={option.value}
                      onClick={() => handleOptionSelect(option.value)}
                      className={clsx(
                        "relative p-6 rounded-2xl border-2 text-left transition-all duration-300 group hover:shadow-lg",
                        isSelected
                          ? "border-[#007AFF] bg-[#007AFF] text-white"
                          : "border-gray-100 bg-white hover:border-gray-300"
                      )}
                    >
                      <div className="flex justify-between items-start">
                        <div>
                          <div className={clsx("font-bold text-lg mb-1", isSelected ? "text-white" : "text-gray-900")}>
                            {option.label}
                          </div>
                          {option.description && (
                            <div className={clsx("text-xs opacity-80 font-medium", isSelected ? "text-gray-300" : "text-gray-400")}>
                              {option.description}
                            </div>
                          )}
                        </div>
                        {isSelected ? (
                          <CheckmarkCircle02Icon className="w-6 h-6 text-white shrink-0" />
                        ) : (
                          <CircleIcon className="w-6 h-6 text-gray-200 group-hover:text-gray-400 transition-colors shrink-0" />
                        )}
                      </div>
                    </button>
                  );
                })}
              </div>

              {currentQuestion.type === "multiple" && (
                <div className="mt-8 flex justify-center">
                  <button
                    onClick={goNext}
                    disabled={!answers[currentQuestion.id]}
                    className="bg-[#007AFF] text-white px-10 py-4 rounded-full font-bold text-lg disabled:opacity-50 hover:scale-105 transition-transform shadow-xl shadow-blue-200"
                  >
                    Continuar
                  </button>
                </div>
              )}

              {step > 0 && (
                <button onClick={() => setStep(s => s - 1)} className="mt-8 mx-auto flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-400 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:text-black transition-colors">
                  <ArrowLeft01Icon className="w-4 h-4" /> Atrás
                </button>
              )}
            </motion.div>
          ) : (
            <motion.div
              initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
              className="w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto py-12 px-4"
            >
              <div className="text-center mb-16 space-y-4">
                <span className="inline-block p-4 rounded-full bg-green-50 text-green-700 mb-4">
                  <Tick01Icon className="w-8 h-8" />
                </span>
                <h1 className="text-5xl font-bold tracking-tighter">Protocolo Personalizado</h1>
                <p className="text-xl text-gray-500 max-w-2xl mx-auto">
                  Hemos analizado tus respuestas. Tu foco es <strong className="text-[#007AFF] capitalize">{(answers["goal"] as string).replace("_", " ")}</strong>.
                </p>
                <button onClick={resetSearch} className="text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-widest underline decoration-2 underline-offset-4 hover:opacity-60">
                  Realizar nuevo diagnóstico
                </button>
              </div>

              {recommendations.length > 0 ? (
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8 items-start">
                  {/* CORE */}
                  <div className="lg:col-span-2 space-y-8">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                      <span className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-[#007AFF] text-white font-bold text-sm">1</span>
                      <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold">Tu Base Diaria</h2>
                    </div>
                    <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-3xl p-8 md:p-12 relative overflow-hidden flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center gap-12 group hover:shadow-2xl transition-all duration-500 border border-gray-100">
                      <div className="relative z-10 flex-1 space-y-6">
                        <h3 className="text-4xl font-black tracking-tight">{recommendations[0].name}</h3>
                        <p className="text-lg text-gray-600 leading-relaxed">
                          {recommendations[0].description || "La mejor opción para tu objetivo principal."}
                        </p>
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-6 pt-4">
                          <Link href={`/products/${recommendations[0].slug}`} className="bg-[#007AFF] text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-bold shadow-lg hover:bg-blue-600 hover:scale-105 transition-all">
                            Ver Detalles
                          </Link>
                          <span className="text-2xl font-bold">{recommendations[0].price}€</span>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      <div className="w-64 h-64 relative mix-blend-multiply flex-shrink-0">
                        {recommendations[0].images?.[0] && <Image src={recommendations[0].images[0]} fill alt={recommendations[0].name} className="object-contain" />}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  {/* BOOSTERS */}
                  <div className="space-y-8">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                      <span className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-gray-200 text-gray-900 font-bold text-sm">2</span>
                      <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold">Potenciadores</h2>
                    </div>
                    <div className="grid gap-6">
                      {recommendations.slice(1).map(product => (
                        <Link href={`/products/${product.slug}`} key={product.id} className="group bg-white border border-gray-100 p-6 rounded-2xl flex items-center gap-6 hover:shadow-xl hover:border-[#007AFF]/30 transition-all">
                          <div className="w-20 h-20 relative mix-blend-multiply bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-2">
                            {product.images?.[0] && <Image src={product.images[0]} fill alt={product.name} className="object-contain" />}
                          </div>
                          <div>
                            <h4 className="font-bold text-lg leading-tight group-hover:text-[#007AFF] transition-colors">{product.name}</h4>
                            <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-500 mt-1 block">{product.price}€</span>
                          </div>
                        </Link>
                      ))}
                      {recommendations.length < 2 && (
                        <div className="p-6 text-center text-gray-400 text-sm border border-dashed rounded-2xl">
                          No hay más recomendaciones específicas.
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              ) : (
                <div className="text-center py-20 bg-gray-50 rounded-3xl">
                  <Search01Icon className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto text-gray-300 mb-4" />
                  <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">Sin resultados exactos</h3>
                  <p className="text-gray-500 mt-2">Prueba a ajustar tus respuestas para encontrar algo ideal.</p>
                  <button onClick={resetSearch} className="mt-6 text-black font-bold underline">Reintentar</button>
                </div>
              )}
            </motion.div>
          )}
        </AnimatePresence>
      </main>
    </div>
  );
}

interface QuestionOption {
  label: string;
  value: string;
  description?: string;
}

interface Question {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  subtitle?: string;
  type: "single" | "multiple";
  options: QuestionOption[];
}

const PRODUCT_TAGS: Record<string, string[]> = {
  // Keywords to match against product description/name if no explicit tags system exists yet
  "energy": ["CoQ10", "Magnesio", "Vitamina B", "Energy", "Vitalidad", "Complex"],
  "sleep": ["Melatonina", "GABA", "Magnesio", "Sueño", "Descanso", "Night"],
