// Mock tags database for demo purposes
// In production, this would be in the DB
const PRODUCT_TAGS: Record<string, string[]> = {
  // Keywords to match against product description/name if no explicit tags system exists yet
  "energy": ["CoQ10", "Magnesio", "Vitamina B", "Energy", "Vitalidad", "Complex"],
  "sleep": ["Melatonina", "GABA", "Magnesio", "Sueño", "Descanso", "Night"],
  "stress": ["Ashwagandha", "Rhodiola", "Calm", "Stress", "Magnesio"],
  "health": ["Omega", "Multivitamínico", "Antioxidante", "Resveratrol", "Cúrcuma"],
  "sport": ["Proteína", "Creatina", "BCAA", "Recuperación", "Muscle"],
  "digestion": ["Probióticos", "Enzimas", "Digest", "Gut"],
  "brain_fog": ["Omega", "Ginkgo", "Nootrópico", "Focus"],
  "joint_pain": ["Colágeno", "Cúrcuma", "Glucosamina", "Joint"],
  "beauty": ["Colágeno", "Biotina", "Piel", "Cabello"],
  "immunity": ["Vitamina C", "Zinc", "Inmuno", "Defensas", "Vitamina D"],
};

export default function SmartSearchPage() {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const [products, setProducts] = useState<Product[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [step, setStep] = useState(0);
  const [answers, setAnswers] = useState<Record<string, string | string[]>>({});
  const [showResults, setShowResults] = useState(false);
  const [isAnalyzing, setIsAnalyzing] = useState(false);
  const [isAutofilled, setIsAutofilled] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    const loadData = async () => {
      try {
        const productData = await ProductService.getAllProducts();
        setProducts(productData);
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("Error loading products:", error);
      } finally {
        setLoading(false);
      }
    };
    loadData();
  }, [user]);

  const currentQuestion = DIAGNOSTIC_QUESTIONS[step];

  const handleOptionSelect = (value: string) => {
    if (currentQuestion.type === "single") {
      const newAnswers = { ...answers, [currentQuestion.id]: value };
      setAnswers(newAnswers);
      // Pass the new answers to goNext so it checks the updated state
      goNext(newAnswers);
    } else {
      // Multiple choice
      const current = (answers[currentQuestion.id] as string[]) || [];
      const newValues = current.includes(value)
        ? current.filter(v => v !== value)
        : [...current, value];

      // "None" mutual exclusivity logic
      if (value === "none") {
        setAnswers(prev => ({ ...prev, [currentQuestion.id]: ["none"] }));
      } else {
        const filtered = newValues.filter(v => v !== "none");
        setAnswers(prev => ({ ...prev, [currentQuestion.id]: filtered }));
      }
    }
  };

  const goNext = (currentAnswers = answers) => {
    if (step < DIAGNOSTIC_QUESTIONS.length - 1) {
      setStep(prev => prev + 1);
    } else {
      finishSearch();
    }
  };

  const finishSearch = () => {
    setIsAnalyzing(true);
    setTimeout(() => {
      setIsAnalyzing(false);
      setShowResults(true);
    }, 2000); // 2s "Analysis" delay
  };


  // --- SCORING ALGORITHM ---
  const recommendations = useMemo(() => {
    if (!showResults) return [];

    const profile = answers["profile"] as string;
    const isChild = profile === "child";

    const scores = products.map(product => {
      // STRICT FILTERING: Safety First
      const targetProfiles = product.target_profiles?.map(p => p.toLowerCase()) || ["adultos"];
      const isForKids = targetProfiles.some(p => p.includes("niño") || p.includes("infantil") || p.includes("kid") || product.tags?.includes("kids"));
      const isForAdults = targetProfiles.some(p => p.includes("adulto") || p.includes("hombre") || p.includes("mujer") || p.includes("senior"));

      // 1. Safety Filter
      // Relaxed rule: "Kids can eat adult products" -> REMOVED strict block for isChild && !isForKids
      // We ONLY block "Kid Only" products for Adults to keep their recommendations relevant.
      if (!isChild && isForKids && !isForAdults) return { product, score: -1 };

      let score = 0;
      const text = (product.name + " " + product.description + " " + (product.purposes?.join(" ") || "")).toLowerCase();
      const goal = answers["goal"] as string;
      const symptoms = (answers["symptoms"] as string[]) || [];

      // 2. Primary Goal Match (High Weight)
      const goalKeywords = PRODUCT_TAGS[goal] || [goal];
      if (goalKeywords.some(k => text.includes(k.toLowerCase()))) {
        score += 50;
      }

      // 3. Symptom Match (Medium Weight)
      symptoms.forEach(symptom => {
        const symptomKeywords = PRODUCT_TAGS[symptom] || [symptom];
        if (symptomKeywords.some(k => text.includes(k.toLowerCase()))) {
          score += 20;
        }
      });

      // 4. Boost Score for exact profile match
      if (targetProfiles.some(p => p.includes(profile))) score += 10;

      return { product, score };
    });

    // Return top 3 sorted by score, filter out rejected
    return scores
      .filter(item => item.score > 0)
      .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score)
      .slice(0, 3)
      .map(item => item.product);

  }, [products, answers, showResults]);

  const resetSearch = () => {
    setStep(0);
    setAnswers({});
    setShowResults(false);
  };

  if (loading) return null;

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-white flex flex-col font-sans">
      <main className="flex-1 flex items-center justify-center relative p-6 mt-16 md:mt-0">
        <AnimatePresence mode="wait">
          {isAnalyzing ? (
             <motion.div
               key="analyzing"
               initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95 }}
               animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1 }}
               exit={{ opacity: 0, scale: 1.05 }}
               className="text-center w-full max-w-md"
             >
               <div className="relative w-24 h-24 mx-auto mb-8">
                  <motion.div
                    animate={{ rotate: 360 }}
                    transition={{ duration: 3, repeat: Infinity, ease: "linear" }}
                    className="absolute inset-0 border-4 border-gray-100 rounded-full"
                  />
                  <motion.div
                    animate={{ rotate: 360 }}
                    transition={{ duration: 1.5, repeat: Infinity, ease: "linear" }}
                    className="absolute inset-0 border-4 border-t-[#007AFF] border-r-transparent border-b-transparent border-l-transparent rounded-full"
                  />
                  <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center">
                    <Sparkles className="w-8 h-8 text-[#007AFF]" />
                  </div>
               </div>
               <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 tracking-tight">Analizando tu perfil...</h2>
               <p className="text-gray-500 mt-3 text-lg">Cruzando tus síntomas con más de 50 compuestos bioactivos.</p>
             </motion.div>
          ) : !showResults ? (
            <motion.div
              key={step}
              initial={{ opacity: 0, x: 20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
              exit={{ opacity: 0, x: -20 }}
              className="w-full max-w-2xl"
            >
              {/* Progress */}
              <div className="w-full bg-gray-100 h-1.5 rounded-full mb-12 overflow-hidden">
                <motion.div
                  initial={{ width: `${((step + 1) / DIAGNOSTIC_QUESTIONS.length) * 100}%` }}
                  animate={{ width: `${((step + 1) / DIAGNOSTIC_QUESTIONS.length) * 100}%` }}
                  transition={{ duration: 0.5 }}
                  className="h-full bg-[#007AFF] rounded-full"
                />
              </div>

              <div className="space-y-2 mb-10 text-center">
                <h1 className="text-3xl md:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tighter text-gray-900">
                  {currentQuestion.title}
                </h1>
                {currentQuestion.subtitle && (
                  <p className="text-lg text-gray-500">{currentQuestion.subtitle}</p>
                )}
              </div>

              <div className="grid gap-3 grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2">
                {currentQuestion.options.map((option) => {
                  const isSelected = Array.isArray(answers[currentQuestion.id])
                    ? (answers[currentQuestion.id] as string[])?.includes(option.value)
                    : answers[currentQuestion.id] === option.value;

                  const Icon = ICON_MAP[option.value];

                  return (
                    <button
                      key={option.value}
                      onClick={() => handleOptionSelect(option.value)}
                      className={clsx(
                        "relative p-4 md:p-6 rounded-2xl border-2 text-left transition-all duration-300 group hover:shadow-lg flex items-center gap-4",
                        isSelected
                          ? "border-[#007AFF] bg-[#007AFF] text-white"
                          : "border-gray-100 bg-white hover:border-gray-300"
                      )}
                    >
                      {Icon && (
                        <div className={clsx("p-3 rounded-full shrink-0 transition-colors", isSelected ? "bg-white/20" : "bg-gray-50 group-hover:bg-gray-100")}>
                          <Icon className={clsx("w-6 h-6", isSelected ? "text-white" : "text-gray-600")} />
                        </div>
                      )}

                      <div className="flex-1">
                          <div className={clsx("font-bold text-lg mb-0.5", isSelected ? "text-white" : "text-gray-900")}>
                            {option.label}
                          </div>
                          {option.description && (
                            <div className={clsx("text-xs opacity-90 font-medium leading-tight", isSelected ? "text-blue-100" : "text-gray-500")}>
                              {option.description}
                            </div>
                          )}
                      </div>

                      <div className="shrink-0 self-center">
                        {isSelected ? (
                          <CheckmarkCircle02Icon className="w-6 h-6 text-white" />
                        ) : (
                          <CircleIcon className="w-6 h-6 text-gray-200 group-hover:text-gray-400 transition-colors" />
                        )}
                      </div>
                    </button>
                  );
                })}
              </div>

              {currentQuestion.type === "multiple" && (
                <div className="mt-8 flex justify-center">
                  <button
                    onClick={goNext}
                    disabled={!answers[currentQuestion.id]}
                    className="bg-[#007AFF] text-white px-10 py-4 rounded-full font-bold text-lg disabled:opacity-50 hover:scale-105 transition-transform shadow-xl shadow-blue-200"
                  >
                    Continuar
                  </button>
                </div>
              )}

              {step > 0 && (
                <button onClick={() => setStep(s => s - 1)} className="mt-8 mx-auto flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-400 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:text-black transition-colors">
                  <ArrowLeft01Icon className="w-4 h-4" /> Atrás
                </button>
              )}
            </motion.div>
          ) : (
            <motion.div
              initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
              className="w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto py-12 px-4"
            >
              <div className="text-center mb-12 space-y-4">
                <span className="inline-flex items-center justify-center p-4 rounded-full bg-green-100 text-green-600 mb-4 shadow-sm">
                  <Tick01Icon className="w-8 h-8" />
                </span>
                <h1 className="text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tighter text-gray-900">Protocolo Personalizado</h1>
                <p className="text-xl text-gray-500 max-w-2xl mx-auto">
                  Hemos generado una estrategia basada en tus respuestas.
                </p>
                <button onClick={resetSearch} className="text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400 hover:text-black transition-colors pt-2">
                  Repetir Diagnóstico
                </button>
              </div>

              {/* ANALYSIS BLOCK */}
              {answers["goal"] && ANALYSIS_TIPS[answers["goal"] as string] && (
                <motion.div 
                  initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
                  animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
                  transition={{ delay: 0.2 }}
                  className="max-w-4xl mx-auto mb-16 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50/80 to-indigo-50/80 backdrop-blur-sm border border-blue-100/50 rounded-3xl p-8 md:p-10 relative overflow-hidden shadow-sm"
                >
                   <div className="absolute -top-10 -right-10 p-8 opacity-[0.03]">
                      <Brain className="w-64 h-64 text-blue-900" />
                   </div>
                   <div className="relative z-10">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-4 text-[#007AFF] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-xs md:text-sm">
                        <Activity className="w-5 h-5" />
                        Análisis Bio-Individual
                      </div>
                      <h2 className="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">
                        {ANALYSIS_TIPS[answers["goal"] as string].title}
                      </h2>
                      <p className="text-lg text-gray-700 leading-relaxed max-w-2xl">
                        {ANALYSIS_TIPS[answers["goal"] as string].text}
                      </p>
                   </div>
                </motion.div>
              )}

              {recommendations.length > 0 ? (
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8 items-start">
                  {/* CORE */}
                  <div className="lg:col-span-2 space-y-8">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                      <span className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-[#007AFF] text-white font-bold text-sm">1</span>
                      <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold">Tu Base Diaria</h2>
                    </div>
                    <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-3xl p-8 md:p-12 relative overflow-hidden flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center gap-12 group hover:shadow-2xl transition-all duration-500 border border-gray-100">
                      <div className="relative z-10 flex-1 space-y-6">
                        <h3 className="text-4xl font-black tracking-tight">{recommendations[0].name}</h3>
                        <p className="text-lg text-gray-600 leading-relaxed">
                          {recommendations[0].description || "La mejor opción para tu objetivo principal."}
                        </p>
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-6 pt-4">
                          <Link href={`/products/${recommendations[0].slug}`} className="bg-[#007AFF] text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-bold shadow-lg hover:bg-blue-600 hover:scale-105 transition-all">
                            Ver Detalles
                          </Link>
                          <span className="text-2xl font-bold">{recommendations[0].price}€</span>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      <div className="w-64 h-64 relative mix-blend-multiply flex-shrink-0">
                        {recommendations[0].images?.[0] && <Image src={recommendations[0].images[0]} fill alt={recommendations[0].name} className="object-contain" />}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  {/* BOOSTERS */}
                  <div className="space-y-8">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                      <span className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-gray-200 text-gray-900 font-bold text-sm">2</span>
                      <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold">Potenciadores</h2>
                    </div>
                    <div className="grid gap-6">
                      {recommendations.slice(1).map(product => (
                        <Link href={`/products/${product.slug}`} key={product.id} className="group bg-white border border-gray-100 p-6 rounded-2xl flex items-center gap-6 hover:shadow-xl hover:border-[#007AFF]/30 transition-all">
                          <div className="w-20 h-20 relative mix-blend-multiply bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-2">
                            {product.images?.[0] && <Image src={product.images[0]} fill alt={product.name} className="object-contain" />}
                          </div>
                          <div>
                            <h4 className="font-bold text-lg leading-tight group-hover:text-[#007AFF] transition-colors">{product.name}</h4>
                            <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-500 mt-1 block">{product.price}€</span>
                          </div>
                        </Link>
                      ))}
                      {recommendations.length < 2 && (
                        <div className="p-6 text-center text-gray-400 text-sm border border-dashed rounded-2xl">
                          No hay más recomendaciones específicas.
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              ) : (
                <div className="text-center py-20 bg-gray-50 rounded-3xl">
                  <Search01Icon className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto text-gray-300 mb-4" />
                  <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">Sin resultados exactos</h3>
                  <p className="text-gray-500 mt-2">Prueba a ajustar tus respuestas para encontrar algo ideal.</p>
                  <button onClick={resetSearch} className="mt-6 text-black font-bold underline">Reintentar</button>
                </div>
              )}
            </motion.div>
          )}
        </AnimatePresence>
      </main>
    </div>
  );
}

interface QuestionOption {

  value: string;
  description?: string;
}

}

// Mock tags database for demo purposes
// In production, this would be in the DB
const PRODUCT_TAGS: Record<string, string[]> = {
  // Keywords to match against product description/name if no explicit tags system exists yet
  "energy": ["CoQ10", "Magnesio", "Vitamina B", "Energy", "Vitalidad", "Complex"],
  "sleep": ["Melatonina", "GABA", "Magnesio", "Sueño", "Descanso", "Night"],
  "stress": ["Ashwagandha", "Rhodiola", "Calm", "Stress", "Magnesio"],
  "health": ["Omega", "Multivitamínico", "Antioxidante", "Resveratrol", "Cúrcuma"],
  "sport": ["Proteína", "Creatina", "BCAA", "Recuperación", "Muscle"],
  "digestion": ["Probióticos", "Enzimas", "Digest", "Gut"],
  "brain_fog": ["Omega", "Ginkgo", "Nootrópico", "Focus"],
  "joint_pain": ["Colágeno", "Cúrcuma", "Glucosamina", "Joint"],
  "beauty": ["Colágeno", "Biotina", "Piel", "Cabello"],
  "immunity": ["Vitamina C", "Zinc", "Inmuno", "Defensas", "Vitamina D"],
};

export default function SmartSearchPage() {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const [products, setProducts] = useState<Product[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [step, setStep] = useState(0);
  const [answers, setAnswers] = useState<Record<string, string | string[]>>({});
  const [showResults, setShowResults] = useState(false);
  const [isAnalyzing, setIsAnalyzing] = useState(false);
  const [isAutofilled, setIsAutofilled] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    const loadData = async () => {
      try {
        const productData = await ProductService.getAllProducts();
        setProducts(productData);
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("Error loading products:", error);
      } finally {
        setLoading(false);
      }
    };
    loadData();
  }, [user]);

  const currentQuestion = DIAGNOSTIC_QUESTIONS[step];

  const handleOptionSelect = (value: string) => {
    if (currentQuestion.type === "single") {
      const newAnswers = { ...answers, [currentQuestion.id]: value };
      setAnswers(newAnswers);
      // Pass the new answers to goNext so it checks the updated state
      goNext(newAnswers);
    } else {
      // Multiple choice
      const current = (answers[currentQuestion.id] as string[]) || [];
      const newValues = current.includes(value)
        ? current.filter(v => v !== value)
        : [...current, value];

      // "None" mutual exclusivity logic
      if (value === "none") {
        setAnswers(prev => ({ ...prev, [currentQuestion.id]: ["none"] }));
      } else {
        const filtered = newValues.filter(v => v !== "none");
        setAnswers(prev => ({ ...prev, [currentQuestion.id]: filtered }));
      }
    }
  };

  const goNext = (currentAnswers = answers) => {
    if (step < DIAGNOSTIC_QUESTIONS.length - 1) {
      setStep(prev => prev + 1);
    } else {
      finishSearch();
    }
  };

  const finishSearch = () => {
    setIsAnalyzing(true);
    setTimeout(() => {
      setIsAnalyzing(false);
      setShowResults(true);
    }, 2000); // 2s "Analysis" delay
  };


  // --- SCORING ALGORITHM ---
  const recommendations = useMemo(() => {
    if (!showResults) return [];

    const profile = answers["profile"] as string;
    const isChild = profile === "child";

    const scores = products.map(product => {
      // STRICT FILTERING: Safety First
      const targetProfiles = product.target_profiles?.map(p => p.toLowerCase()) || ["adultos"];
      const isForKids = targetProfiles.some(p => p.includes("niño") || p.includes("infantil") || p.includes("kid") || product.tags?.includes("kids"));
      const isForAdults = targetProfiles.some(p => p.includes("adulto") || p.includes("hombre") || p.includes("mujer") || p.includes("senior"));

      // 1. Safety Filter
      // Relaxed rule: "Kids can eat adult products" -> REMOVED strict block for isChild && !isForKids
      // We ONLY block "Kid Only" products for Adults to keep their recommendations relevant.
      if (!isChild && isForKids && !isForAdults) return { product, score: -1 };

      let score = 0;
      const text = (product.name + " " + product.description + " " + (product.purposes?.join(" ") || "")).toLowerCase();
      const goal = answers["goal"] as string;
      const symptoms = (answers["symptoms"] as string[]) || [];

      // 2. Primary Goal Match (High Weight)
      const goalKeywords = PRODUCT_TAGS[goal] || [goal];
      if (goalKeywords.some(k => text.includes(k.toLowerCase()))) {
        score += 50;
      }

      // 3. Symptom Match (Medium Weight)
      symptoms.forEach(symptom => {
        const symptomKeywords = PRODUCT_TAGS[symptom] || [symptom];
        if (symptomKeywords.some(k => text.includes(k.toLowerCase()))) {
          score += 20;
        }
      });

      // 4. Boost Score for exact profile match
      if (targetProfiles.some(p => p.includes(profile))) score += 10;

      return { product, score };
    });

    // Return top 3 sorted by score, filter out rejected
    return scores
      .filter(item => item.score > 0)
      .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score)
      .slice(0, 3)
      .map(item => item.product);

  }, [products, answers, showResults]);

  const resetSearch = () => {
    setStep(0);
    setAnswers({});
    setShowResults(false);
  };

  if (loading) return null;

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-white flex flex-col font-sans">
      <main className="flex-1 flex items-center justify-center relative p-6 mt-16 md:mt-0">
        <AnimatePresence mode="wait">
          {isAnalyzing ? (
             <motion.div
               key="analyzing"
               initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95 }}
               animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1 }}
               exit={{ opacity: 0, scale: 1.05 }}
               className="text-center w-full max-w-md"
             >
               <div className="relative w-24 h-24 mx-auto mb-8">
                  <motion.div
                    animate={{ rotate: 360 }}
                    transition={{ duration: 3, repeat: Infinity, ease: "linear" }}
                    className="absolute inset-0 border-4 border-gray-100 rounded-full"
                  />
                  <motion.div
                    animate={{ rotate: 360 }}
                    transition={{ duration: 1.5, repeat: Infinity, ease: "linear" }}
                    className="absolute inset-0 border-4 border-t-[#007AFF] border-r-transparent border-b-transparent border-l-transparent rounded-full"
                  />
                  <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center">
                    <Sparkles className="w-8 h-8 text-[#007AFF]" />
                  </div>
               </div>
               <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 tracking-tight">Analizando tu perfil...</h2>
               <p className="text-gray-500 mt-3 text-lg">Cruzando tus síntomas con más de 50 compuestos bioactivos.</p>
             </motion.div>
          ) : !showResults ? (
            <motion.div
              key={step}
              initial={{ opacity: 0, x: 20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
              exit={{ opacity: 0, x: -20 }}
              className="w-full max-w-2xl"
            >
              {/* Progress */}
              <div className="w-full bg-gray-100 h-1.5 rounded-full mb-12 overflow-hidden">
                <motion.div
                  initial={{ width: `${((step + 1) / DIAGNOSTIC_QUESTIONS.length) * 100}%` }}
                  animate={{ width: `${((step + 1) / DIAGNOSTIC_QUESTIONS.length) * 100}%` }}
                  transition={{ duration: 0.5 }}
                  className="h-full bg-[#007AFF] rounded-full"
                />
              </div>

              <div className="space-y-2 mb-10 text-center">
                <h1 className="text-3xl md:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tighter text-gray-900">
                  {currentQuestion.title}
                </h1>
                {currentQuestion.subtitle && (
                  <p className="text-lg text-gray-500">{currentQuestion.subtitle}</p>
                )}
              </div>

              <div className="grid gap-3 grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2">
                {currentQuestion.options.map((option) => {
                  const isSelected = Array.isArray(answers[currentQuestion.id])
                    ? (answers[currentQuestion.id] as string[])?.includes(option.value)
                    : answers[currentQuestion.id] === option.value;

                  const Icon = ICON_MAP[option.value];

                  return (
                    <button
                      key={option.value}
                      onClick={() => handleOptionSelect(option.value)}
                      className={clsx(
                        "relative p-4 md:p-6 rounded-2xl border-2 text-left transition-all duration-300 group hover:shadow-lg flex items-center gap-4",
                        isSelected
                          ? "border-[#007AFF] bg-[#007AFF] text-white"
                          : "border-gray-100 bg-white hover:border-gray-300"
                      )}
                    >
                      {Icon && (
                        <div className={clsx("p-3 rounded-full shrink-0 transition-colors", isSelected ? "bg-white/20" : "bg-gray-50 group-hover:bg-gray-100")}>
                          <Icon className={clsx("w-6 h-6", isSelected ? "text-white" : "text-gray-600")} />
                        </div>
                      )}

                      <div className="flex-1">
                          <div className={clsx("font-bold text-lg mb-0.5", isSelected ? "text-white" : "text-gray-900")}>
                            {option.label}
                          </div>
                          {option.description && (
                            <div className={clsx("text-xs opacity-90 font-medium leading-tight", isSelected ? "text-blue-100" : "text-gray-500")}>
                              {option.description}
                            </div>
                          )}
                      </div>

                      <div className="shrink-0 self-center">
                        {isSelected ? (
                          <CheckmarkCircle02Icon className="w-6 h-6 text-white" />
                        ) : (
                          <CircleIcon className="w-6 h-6 text-gray-200 group-hover:text-gray-400 transition-colors" />
                        )}
                      </div>
                    </button>
                  );
                })}
              </div>

              {currentQuestion.type === "multiple" && (
                <div className="mt-8 flex justify-center">
                  <button
                    onClick={() => goNext()}
                    disabled={!answers[currentQuestion.id]}
                    className="bg-[#007AFF] text-white px-10 py-4 rounded-full font-bold text-lg disabled:opacity-50 hover:scale-105 transition-transform shadow-xl shadow-blue-200"
                  >
                    Continuar
                  </button>
                </div>
              )}

              {step > 0 && (
                <button onClick={() => setStep(s => s - 1)} className="mt-8 mx-auto flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-400 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:text-black transition-colors">
                  <ArrowLeft01Icon className="w-4 h-4" /> Atrás
                </button>
              )}
            </motion.div>
          ) : (
            <motion.div
              initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
              className="w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto py-12 px-4"
            >
              <div className="text-center mb-12 space-y-4">
                <span className="inline-flex items-center justify-center p-4 rounded-full bg-green-100 text-green-600 mb-4 shadow-sm">
                  <Tick01Icon className="w-8 h-8" />
                </span>
                <h1 className="text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tighter text-gray-900">Protocolo Personalizado</h1>
                <p className="text-xl text-gray-500 max-w-2xl mx-auto">
                  Hemos generado una estrategia basada en tus respuestas.
                </p>
                <button onClick={resetSearch} className="text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400 hover:text-black transition-colors pt-2">
                  Repetir Diagnóstico
                </button>
              </div>

              {/* ANALYSIS BLOCK */}
              {answers["goal"] && ANALYSIS_TIPS[answers["goal"] as string] && (
                <motion.div 
                  initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
                  animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
                  transition={{ delay: 0.2 }}
                  className="max-w-4xl mx-auto mb-16 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50/80 to-indigo-50/80 backdrop-blur-sm border border-blue-100/50 rounded-3xl p-8 md:p-10 relative overflow-hidden shadow-sm"
                >
                   <div className="absolute -top-10 -right-10 p-8 opacity-[0.03]">
                      <Brain className="w-64 h-64 text-blue-900" />
                   </div>
                   <div className="relative z-10">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-4 text-[#007AFF] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-xs md:text-sm">
                        <Activity className="w-5 h-5" />
                        Análisis Bio-Individual
                      </div>
                      <h2 className="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">
                        {ANALYSIS_TIPS[answers["goal"] as string].title}
                      </h2>
                      <p className="text-lg text-gray-700 leading-relaxed max-w-2xl">
                        {ANALYSIS_TIPS[answers["goal"] as string].text}
                      </p>
                   </div>
                </motion.div>
              )}

              {recommendations.length > 0 ? (
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8 items-start">
                  {/* CORE */}
                  <div className="lg:col-span-2 space-y-8">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                      <span className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-[#007AFF] text-white font-bold text-sm">1</span>
                      <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold">Tu Base Diaria</h2>
                    </div>
                    <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-3xl p-8 md:p-12 relative overflow-hidden flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center gap-12 group hover:shadow-2xl transition-all duration-500 border border-gray-100">
                      <div className="relative z-10 flex-1 space-y-6">
                        <h3 className="text-4xl font-black tracking-tight">{recommendations[0].name}</h3>
                        <p className="text-lg text-gray-600 leading-relaxed">
                          {recommendations[0].description || "La mejor opción para tu objetivo principal."}
                        </p>
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-6 pt-4">
                          <Link href={`/products/${recommendations[0].slug}`} className="bg-[#007AFF] text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-bold shadow-lg hover:bg-blue-600 hover:scale-105 transition-all">
                            Ver Detalles
                          </Link>
                          <span className="text-2xl font-bold">{recommendations[0].price}€</span>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      <div className="w-64 h-64 relative mix-blend-multiply flex-shrink-0">
                        {recommendations[0].images?.[0] && <Image src={recommendations[0].images[0]} fill alt={recommendations[0].name} className="object-contain" />}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  {/* BOOSTERS */}
                  <div className="space-y-8">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                      <span className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-gray-200 text-gray-900 font-bold text-sm">2</span>
                      <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold">Potenciadores</h2>
                    </div>
                    <div className="grid gap-6">
                      {recommendations.slice(1).map(product => (
                        <Link href={`/products/${product.slug}`} key={product.id} className="group bg-white border border-gray-100 p-6 rounded-2xl flex items-center gap-6 hover:shadow-xl hover:border-[#007AFF]/30 transition-all">
                          <div className="w-20 h-20 relative mix-blend-multiply bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-2">
                            {product.images?.[0] && <Image src={product.images[0]} fill alt={product.name} className="object-contain" />}
                          </div>
                          <div>
                            <h4 className="font-bold text-lg leading-tight group-hover:text-[#007AFF] transition-colors">{product.name}</h4>
                            <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-500 mt-1 block">{product.price}€</span>
                          </div>
                        </Link>
                      ))}
                      {recommendations.length < 2 && (
                        <div className="p-6 text-center text-gray-400 text-sm border border-dashed rounded-2xl">
                          No hay más recomendaciones específicas.
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              ) : (
                <div className="text-center py-20 bg-gray-50 rounded-3xl">
                  <Search01Icon className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto text-gray-300 mb-4" />
                  <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">Sin resultados exactos</h3>
                  <p className="text-gray-500 mt-2">Prueba a ajustar tus respuestas para encontrar algo ideal.</p>
                  <button onClick={resetSearch} className="mt-6 text-black font-bold underline">Reintentar</button>
                </div>
              )}
            </motion.div>
          )}
        </AnimatePresence>
      </main>
    </div>
  );
}

// Mock tags database for demo purposes
// In production, this would be in the DB
const PRODUCT_TAGS: Record<string, string[]> = {
  // Keywords to match against product description/name if no explicit tags system exists yet
  "energy": ["CoQ10", "Magnesio", "Vitamina B", "Energy", "Vitalidad", "Complex"],
  "sleep": ["Melatonina", "GABA", "Magnesio", "Sueño", "Descanso", "Night"],
  "stress": ["Ashwagandha", "Rhodiola", "Calm", "Stress", "Magnesio"],
  "health": ["Omega", "Multivitamínico", "Antioxidante", "Resveratrol", "Cúrcuma"],
  "sport": ["Proteína", "Creatina", "BCAA", "Recuperación", "Muscle"],
  "digestion": ["Probióticos", "Enzimas", "Digest", "Gut"],
  "brain_fog": ["Omega", "Ginkgo", "Nootrópico", "Focus"],
  "joint_pain": ["Colágeno", "Cúrcuma", "Glucosamina", "Joint"],
  "beauty": ["Colágeno", "Biotina", "Piel", "Cabello"],
  "immunity": ["Vitamina C", "Zinc", "Inmuno", "Defensas", "Vitamina D"],
};

export default function SmartSearchPage() {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const [products, setProducts] = useState<Product[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [step, setStep] = useState(0);
  const [answers, setAnswers] = useState<Record<string, string | string[]>>({});
  const [showResults, setShowResults] = useState(false);
  const [isAnalyzing, setIsAnalyzing] = useState(false);
  const [isAutofilled, setIsAutofilled] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    const loadData = async () => {
      try {
        const productData = await ProductService.getAllProducts();
        setProducts(productData);
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("Error loading products:", error);
      } finally {
        setLoading(false);
      }
    };
    loadData();
  }, [user]);

  const currentQuestion = DIAGNOSTIC_QUESTIONS[step];

  const handleOptionSelect = (value: string) => {
    if (currentQuestion.type === "single") {
      const newAnswers = { ...answers, [currentQuestion.id]: value };
      setAnswers(newAnswers);
      // Pass the new answers to goNext so it checks the updated state
      goNext(newAnswers);
    } else {
      // Multiple choice
      const current = (answers[currentQuestion.id] as string[]) || [];
      const newValues = current.includes(value)
        ? current.filter(v => v !== value)
        : [...current, value];

      // "None" mutual exclusivity logic
      if (value === "none") {
        setAnswers(prev => ({ ...prev, [currentQuestion.id]: ["none"] }));
      } else {
        const filtered = newValues.filter(v => v !== "none");
        setAnswers(prev => ({ ...prev, [currentQuestion.id]: filtered }));
      }
    }
  };

  const goNext = (currentAnswers = answers) => {
    if (step < DIAGNOSTIC_QUESTIONS.length - 1) {
      setStep(prev => prev + 1);
    } else {
      finishSearch();
    }
  };

  const finishSearch = () => {
    setIsAnalyzing(true);
    setTimeout(() => {
      setIsAnalyzing(false);
      setShowResults(true);
    }, 2000); // 2s "Analysis" delay
  };


  // --- SCORING ALGORITHM ---
  const recommendations = useMemo(() => {
    if (!showResults) return [];

    const profile = answers["profile"] as string;
    const isChild = profile === "child";

    const scores = products.map(product => {
      // STRICT FILTERING: Safety First
      const targetProfiles = product.target_profiles?.map(p => p.toLowerCase()) || ["adultos"];
      const isForKids = targetProfiles.some(p => p.includes("niño") || p.includes("infantil") || p.includes("kid") || product.tags?.includes("kids"));
      const isForAdults = targetProfiles.some(p => p.includes("adulto") || p.includes("hombre") || p.includes("mujer") || p.includes("senior"));

      // 1. Safety Filter
      // Relaxed rule: "Kids can eat adult products" -> REMOVED strict block for isChild && !isForKids
      // We ONLY block "Kid Only" products for Adults to keep their recommendations relevant.
      if (!isChild && isForKids && !isForAdults) return { product, score: -1 };

      let score = 0;
      const text = (product.name + " " + product.description + " " + (product.purposes?.join(" ") || "")).toLowerCase();
      const goal = answers["goal"] as string;
      const symptoms = (answers["symptoms"] as string[]) || [];

      // 2. Primary Goal Match (High Weight)
      const goalKeywords = PRODUCT_TAGS[goal] || [goal];
      if (goalKeywords.some(k => text.includes(k.toLowerCase()))) {
        score += 50;
      }

      // 3. Symptom Match (Medium Weight)
      symptoms.forEach(symptom => {
        const symptomKeywords = PRODUCT_TAGS[symptom] || [symptom];
        if (symptomKeywords.some(k => text.includes(k.toLowerCase()))) {
          score += 20;
        }
      });

      // 4. Boost Score for exact profile match
      if (targetProfiles.some(p => p.includes(profile))) score += 10;

      return { product, score };
    });

    // Return top 3 sorted by score, filter out rejected
    return scores
      .filter(item => item.score > 0)
      .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score)
      .slice(0, 3)
      .map(item => item.product);

  }, [products, answers, showResults]);

  const resetSearch = () => {
    setStep(0);
    setAnswers({});
    setShowResults(false);
  };

  if (loading) return null;

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-white flex flex-col font-sans">
      <main className="flex-1 flex items-center justify-center relative p-6 mt-16 md:mt-0">
        <AnimatePresence mode="wait">
          {isAnalyzing ? (
             <motion.div
               key="analyzing"
               initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95 }}
               animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1 }}
               exit={{ opacity: 0, scale: 1.05 }}
               className="text-center w-full max-w-md"
             >
               <div className="relative w-24 h-24 mx-auto mb-8">
                  <motion.div
                    animate={{ rotate: 360 }}
                    transition={{ duration: 3, repeat: Infinity, ease: "linear" }}
                    className="absolute inset-0 border-4 border-gray-100 rounded-full"
                  />
                  <motion.div
                    animate={{ rotate: 360 }}
                    transition={{ duration: 1.5, repeat: Infinity, ease: "linear" }}
                    className="absolute inset-0 border-4 border-t-[#007AFF] border-r-transparent border-b-transparent border-l-transparent rounded-full"
                  />
                  <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center">
                    <Sparkles className="w-8 h-8 text-[#007AFF]" />
                  </div>
               </div>
               <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 tracking-tight">Analizando tu perfil...</h2>
               <p className="text-gray-500 mt-3 text-lg">Cruzando tus síntomas con más de 50 compuestos bioactivos.</p>
             </motion.div>
          ) : !showResults ? (
            <motion.div
              key={step}
              initial={{ opacity: 0, x: 20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
              exit={{ opacity: 0, x: -20 }}
              className="w-full max-w-2xl"
            >
              {/* Progress */}
              <div className="w-full bg-gray-100 h-1.5 rounded-full mb-12 overflow-hidden">
                <motion.div
                  initial={{ width: `${((step + 1) / DIAGNOSTIC_QUESTIONS.length) * 100}%` }}
                  animate={{ width: `${((step + 1) / DIAGNOSTIC_QUESTIONS.length) * 100}%` }}
                  transition={{ duration: 0.5 }}
                  className="h-full bg-[#007AFF] rounded-full"
                />
              </div>

              <div className="space-y-2 mb-10 text-center">
                <h1 className="text-3xl md:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tighter text-gray-900">
                  {currentQuestion.title}
                </h1>
                {currentQuestion.subtitle && (
                  <p className="text-lg text-gray-500">{currentQuestion.subtitle}</p>
                )}
              </div>

              <div className="grid gap-3 grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2">
                {currentQuestion.options.map((option) => {
                  const isSelected = Array.isArray(answers[currentQuestion.id])
                    ? (answers[currentQuestion.id] as string[])?.includes(option.value)
                    : answers[currentQuestion.id] === option.value;

                  const Icon = ICON_MAP[option.value];

                  return (
                    <button
                      key={option.value}
                      onClick={() => handleOptionSelect(option.value)}
                      className={clsx(
                        "relative p-4 md:p-6 rounded-2xl border-2 text-left transition-all duration-300 group hover:shadow-lg flex items-center gap-4",
                        isSelected
                          ? "border-[#007AFF] bg-[#007AFF] text-white"
                          : "border-gray-100 bg-white hover:border-gray-300"
                      )}
                    >
                      {Icon && (
                        <div className={clsx("p-3 rounded-full shrink-0 transition-colors", isSelected ? "bg-white/20" : "bg-gray-50 group-hover:bg-gray-100")}>
                          <Icon className={clsx("w-6 h-6", isSelected ? "text-white" : "text-gray-600")} />
                        </div>
                      )}

                      <div className="flex-1">
                          <div className={clsx("font-bold text-lg mb-0.5", isSelected ? "text-white" : "text-gray-900")}>
                            {option.label}
                          </div>
                          {option.description && (
                            <div className={clsx("text-xs opacity-90 font-medium leading-tight", isSelected ? "text-blue-100" : "text-gray-500")}>
                              {option.description}
                            </div>
                          )}
                      </div>

                      <div className="shrink-0 self-center">
                        {isSelected ? (
                          <CheckmarkCircle02Icon className="w-6 h-6 text-white" />
                        ) : (
                          <CircleIcon className="w-6 h-6 text-gray-200 group-hover:text-gray-400 transition-colors" />
                        )}
                      </div>
                    </button>
                  );
                })}
              </div>

              {currentQuestion.type === "multiple" && (
                <div className="mt-8 flex justify-center">
                  <button
                    onClick={() => goNext()}
                    disabled={!answers[currentQuestion.id]}
                    className="bg-[#007AFF] text-white px-10 py-4 rounded-full font-bold text-lg disabled:opacity-50 hover:scale-105 transition-transform shadow-xl shadow-blue-200"
                  >
                    Continuar
                  </button>
                </div>
              )}

              {step > 0 && (
                <button onClick={() => setStep(s => s - 1)} className="mt-8 mx-auto flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-400 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:text-black transition-colors">
                  <ArrowLeft01Icon className="w-4 h-4" /> Atrás
                </button>
              )}
            </motion.div>
          ) : (
            <motion.div
              initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
              className="w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto py-12 px-4"
            >
              <div className="text-center mb-12 space-y-4">
                <span className="inline-flex items-center justify-center p-4 rounded-full bg-green-100 text-green-600 mb-4 shadow-sm">
                  <Tick01Icon className="w-8 h-8" />
                </span>
                <h1 className="text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tighter text-gray-900">Protocolo Personalizado</h1>
                <p className="text-xl text-gray-500 max-w-2xl mx-auto">
                  Hemos generado una estrategia basada en tus respuestas.
                </p>
                <button onClick={resetSearch} className="text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400 hover:text-black transition-colors pt-2">
                  Repetir Diagnóstico
                </button>
              </div>

              {/* ANALYSIS BLOCK */}
              {answers["goal"] && ANALYSIS_TIPS[answers["goal"] as string] && (
                <motion.div 
                  initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
                  animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
                  transition={{ delay: 0.2 }}
                  className="max-w-4xl mx-auto mb-16 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50/80 to-indigo-50/80 backdrop-blur-sm border border-blue-100/50 rounded-3xl p-8 md:p-10 relative overflow-hidden shadow-sm"
                >
                   <div className="absolute -top-10 -right-10 p-8 opacity-[0.03]">
                      <Brain className="w-64 h-64 text-blue-900" />
                   </div>
                   <div className="relative z-10">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-4 text-[#007AFF] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-xs md:text-sm">
                        <Activity className="w-5 h-5" />
                        Análisis Individual
                      </div>
                      <h2 className="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">
                        {ANALYSIS_TIPS[answers["goal"] as string].title}
                      </h2>
                      <p className="text-lg text-gray-700 leading-relaxed max-w-2xl">
                        {ANALYSIS_TIPS[answers["goal"] as string].text}
                      </p>
                   </div>
                </motion.div>
              )}

              {recommendations.length > 0 ? (
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8 items-start">
                  {/* CORE */}
                  <div className="lg:col-span-2 space-y-8">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                      <span className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-[#007AFF] text-white font-bold text-sm">1</span>
                      <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold">Tu Base Diaria</h2>
                    </div>
                    <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-3xl p-8 md:p-12 relative overflow-hidden flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center gap-12 group hover:shadow-2xl transition-all duration-500 border border-gray-100">
                      <div className="relative z-10 flex-1 space-y-6">
                        <h3 className="text-4xl font-black tracking-tight">{recommendations[0].name}</h3>
                        <p className="text-lg text-gray-600 leading-relaxed">
                          {recommendations[0].description || "La mejor opción para tu objetivo principal."}
                        </p>
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-6 pt-4">
                          <Link href={`/products/${recommendations[0].slug}`} className="bg-[#007AFF] text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-bold shadow-lg hover:bg-blue-600 hover:scale-105 transition-all">
                            Ver Detalles
                          </Link>
                          <span className="text-2xl font-bold">{recommendations[0].price}€</span>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      <div className="w-64 h-64 relative mix-blend-multiply flex-shrink-0">
                        {recommendations[0].images?.[0] && <Image src={recommendations[0].images[0]} fill alt={recommendations[0].name} className="object-contain" />}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  {/* BOOSTERS */}
                  <div className="space-y-8">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                      <span className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-gray-200 text-gray-900 font-bold text-sm">2</span>
                      <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold">Potenciadores</h2>
                    </div>
                    <div className="grid gap-6">
                      {recommendations.slice(1).map(product => (
                        <Link href={`/products/${product.slug}`} key={product.id} className="group bg-white border border-gray-100 p-6 rounded-2xl flex items-center gap-6 hover:shadow-xl hover:border-[#007AFF]/30 transition-all">
                          <div className="w-20 h-20 relative mix-blend-multiply bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-2">
                            {product.images?.[0] && <Image src={product.images[0]} fill alt={product.name} className="object-contain" />}
                          </div>
                          <div>
                            <h4 className="font-bold text-lg leading-tight group-hover:text-[#007AFF] transition-colors">{product.name}</h4>
                            <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-500 mt-1 block">{product.price}€</span>
                          </div>
                        </Link>
                      ))}
                      {recommendations.length < 2 && (
                        <div className="p-6 text-center text-gray-400 text-sm border border-dashed rounded-2xl">
                          No hay más recomendaciones específicas.
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              ) : (
                <div className="text-center py-20 bg-gray-50 rounded-3xl">
                  <Search01Icon className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto text-gray-300 mb-4" />
                  <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">Sin resultados exactos</h3>
                  <p className="text-gray-500 mt-2">Prueba a ajustar tus respuestas para encontrar algo ideal.</p>
                  <button onClick={resetSearch} className="mt-6 text-black font-bold underline">Reintentar</button>
                </div>
              )}
            </motion.div>
          )}
        </AnimatePresence>
      </main>
    </div>
  );
}

interface QuestionOption {

  description?: string;
}

}

// Mock tags database for demo purposes
// In production, this would be in the DB
const PRODUCT_TAGS: Record<string, string[]> = {
  // Keywords to match against product description/name if no explicit tags system exists yet
  "energy": ["CoQ10", "Magnesio", "Vitamina B", "Energy", "Vitalidad", "Complex"],
  "sleep": ["Melatonina", "GABA", "Magnesio", "Sueño", "Descanso", "Night"],
  "stress": ["Ashwagandha", "Rhodiola", "Calm", "Stress", "Magnesio"],
  "health": ["Omega", "Multivitamínico", "Antioxidante", "Resveratrol", "Cúrcuma"],
  "sport": ["Proteína", "Creatina", "BCAA", "Recuperación", "Muscle"],
  "digestion": ["Probióticos", "Enzimas", "Digest", "Gut"],
  "brain_fog": ["Omega", "Ginkgo", "Nootrópico", "Focus"],
  "joint_pain": ["Colágeno", "Cúrcuma", "Glucosamina", "Joint"],
  "beauty": ["Colágeno", "Biotina", "Piel", "Cabello"],
  "immunity": ["Vitamina C", "Zinc", "Inmuno", "Defensas", "Vitamina D"],
};

export default function SmartSearchPage() {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const [products, setProducts] = useState<Product[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [step, setStep] = useState(0);
  const [answers, setAnswers] = useState<Record<string, string | string[]>>({});
  const [showResults, setShowResults] = useState(false);
  const [isAnalyzing, setIsAnalyzing] = useState(false);
  const [isAutofilled, setIsAutofilled] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    const loadData = async () => {
      try {
        const productData = await ProductService.getAllProducts();
        setProducts(productData);
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("Error loading products:", error);
      } finally {
        setLoading(false);
      }
    };
    loadData();
  }, [user]);

  const currentQuestion = DIAGNOSTIC_QUESTIONS[step];

  const handleOptionSelect = (value: string) => {
    if (currentQuestion.type === "single") {
      const newAnswers = { ...answers, [currentQuestion.id]: value };
      setAnswers(newAnswers);
      // Pass the new answers to goNext so it checks the updated state
      goNext(newAnswers);
    } else {
      // Multiple choice
      const current = (answers[currentQuestion.id] as string[]) || [];
      const newValues = current.includes(value)
        ? current.filter(v => v !== value)
        : [...current, value];

      // "None" mutual exclusivity logic
      if (value === "none") {
        setAnswers(prev => ({ ...prev, [currentQuestion.id]: ["none"] }));
      } else {
        const filtered = newValues.filter(v => v !== "none");
        setAnswers(prev => ({ ...prev, [currentQuestion.id]: filtered }));
      }
    }
  };

  const goNext = (currentAnswers = answers) => {
    if (step < DIAGNOSTIC_QUESTIONS.length - 1) {
      setStep(prev => prev + 1);
    } else {
      finishSearch();
    }
  };

  const finishSearch = () => {
    setIsAnalyzing(true);
    setTimeout(() => {
      setIsAnalyzing(false);
      setShowResults(true);
    }, 2000); // 2s "Analysis" delay
  };


  // --- SCORING ALGORITHM ---
  const recommendations = useMemo(() => {
    if (!showResults) return [];

    const profile = answers["profile"] as string;
    const isChild = profile === "child";

    const scores = products.map(product => {
      // STRICT FILTERING: Safety First
      const targetProfiles = product.target_profiles?.map(p => p.toLowerCase()) || ["adultos"];
      const isForKids = targetProfiles.some(p => p.includes("niño") || p.includes("infantil") || p.includes("kid") || product.tags?.includes("kids"));
      const isForAdults = targetProfiles.some(p => p.includes("adulto") || p.includes("hombre") || p.includes("mujer") || p.includes("senior"));

      // 1. Safety Filter
      // Relaxed rule: "Kids can eat adult products" -> REMOVED strict block for isChild && !isForKids
      // We ONLY block "Kid Only" products for Adults to keep their recommendations relevant.
      if (!isChild && isForKids && !isForAdults) return { product, score: -1 };

      let score = 0;
      const text = (product.name + " " + product.description + " " + (product.purposes?.join(" ") || "")).toLowerCase();
      const goal = answers["goal"] as string;
      const symptoms = (answers["symptoms"] as string[]) || [];

      // 2. Primary Goal Match (High Weight)
      const goalKeywords = PRODUCT_TAGS[goal] || [goal];
      if (goalKeywords.some(k => text.includes(k.toLowerCase()))) {
        score += 50;
      }

      // 3. Symptom Match (Medium Weight)
      symptoms.forEach(symptom => {
        const symptomKeywords = PRODUCT_TAGS[symptom] || [symptom];
        if (symptomKeywords.some(k => text.includes(k.toLowerCase()))) {
          score += 20;
        }
      });

      // 4. Boost Score for exact profile match
      if (targetProfiles.some(p => p.includes(profile))) score += 10;

      return { product, score };
    });

    // Return top 3 sorted by score, filter out rejected
    return scores
      .filter(item => item.score > 0)
      .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score)
      .slice(0, 3)
      .map(item => item.product);

  }, [products, answers, showResults]);

  const resetSearch = () => {
    setStep(0);
    setAnswers({});
    setShowResults(false);
  };

  if (loading) return null;

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-white flex flex-col font-sans">
      <main className="flex-1 flex items-center justify-center relative p-6 mt-16 md:mt-0">
        <AnimatePresence mode="wait">
          {isAnalyzing ? (
             <motion.div
               key="analyzing"
               initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95 }}
               animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1 }}
               exit={{ opacity: 0, scale: 1.05 }}
               className="text-center w-full max-w-md"
             >
               <div className="relative w-24 h-24 mx-auto mb-8">
                  <motion.div
                    animate={{ rotate: 360 }}
                    transition={{ duration: 3, repeat: Infinity, ease: "linear" }}
                    className="absolute inset-0 border-4 border-gray-100 rounded-full"
                  />
                  <motion.div
                    animate={{ rotate: 360 }}
                    transition={{ duration: 1.5, repeat: Infinity, ease: "linear" }}
                    className="absolute inset-0 border-4 border-t-primary border-r-transparent border-b-transparent border-l-transparent rounded-full"
                  />
                  <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center">
                    <Sparkles className="w-8 h-8 text-primary" />
                  </div>
               </div>
               <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 tracking-tight">Analizando tu perfil...</h2>
               <p className="text-gray-500 mt-3 text-lg">Cruzando tus síntomas con más de 50 compuestos bioactivos.</p>
             </motion.div>
          ) : !showResults ? (
            <motion.div
              key={step}
              initial={{ opacity: 0, x: 20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
              exit={{ opacity: 0, x: -20 }}
              className="w-full max-w-2xl"
            >
              {/* Progress */}
              <div className="w-full bg-gray-100 h-1.5 rounded-full mb-12 overflow-hidden">
                <motion.div
                  initial={{ width: `${((step + 1) / DIAGNOSTIC_QUESTIONS.length) * 100}%` }}
                  animate={{ width: `${((step + 1) / DIAGNOSTIC_QUESTIONS.length) * 100}%` }}
                  transition={{ duration: 0.5 }}
                  className="h-full bg-primary rounded-full"
                />
              </div>

              <div className="space-y-2 mb-10 text-center">
                <h1 className="text-3xl md:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tighter text-gray-900">
                  {currentQuestion.title}
                </h1>
                {currentQuestion.subtitle && (
                  <p className="text-lg text-gray-500">{currentQuestion.subtitle}</p>
                )}
              </div>

              <div className="grid gap-3 grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2">
                {currentQuestion.options.map((option) => {
                  const isSelected = Array.isArray(answers[currentQuestion.id])
                    ? (answers[currentQuestion.id] as string[])?.includes(option.value)
                    : answers[currentQuestion.id] === option.value;

                  const Icon = ICON_MAP[option.value];

                  return (
                    <button
                      key={option.value}
                      onClick={() => handleOptionSelect(option.value)}
                      className={clsx(
                        "relative p-4 md:p-6 rounded-2xl border-2 text-left transition-all duration-300 group hover:shadow-lg flex items-center gap-4",
                        isSelected
                          ? "border-primary bg-primary text-primary-foreground"
                          : "border-gray-100 bg-white hover:border-gray-300"
                      )}
                    >
                      {Icon && (
                        <div className={clsx("p-3 rounded-full shrink-0 transition-colors", isSelected ? "bg-white/20" : "bg-gray-50 group-hover:bg-gray-100")}>
                          <Icon className={clsx("w-6 h-6", isSelected ? "text-white" : "text-gray-600")} />
                        </div>
                      )}

                      <div className="flex-1">
                          <div className={clsx("font-bold text-lg mb-0.5", isSelected ? "text-white" : "text-gray-900")}>
                            {option.label}
                          </div>
                          {option.description && (
                            <div className={clsx("text-xs opacity-90 font-medium leading-tight", isSelected ? "text-blue-100" : "text-gray-500")}>
                              {option.description}
                            </div>
                          )}
                      </div>

                      <div className="shrink-0 self-center">
                        {isSelected ? (
                          <CheckmarkCircle02Icon className="w-6 h-6 text-white" />
                        ) : (
                          <CircleIcon className="w-6 h-6 text-gray-200 group-hover:text-gray-400 transition-colors" />
                        )}
                      </div>
                    </button>
                  );
                })}
              </div>

              {currentQuestion.type === "multiple" && (
                <div className="mt-8 flex justify-center">
                  <button
                    onClick={() => goNext()}
                    disabled={!answers[currentQuestion.id]}
                    className="bg-primary text-primary-foreground px-10 py-4 rounded-full font-bold text-lg disabled:opacity-50 hover:scale-105 transition-transform shadow-xl shadow-blue-200"
                  >
                    Continuar
                  </button>
                </div>
              )}

              {step > 0 && (
                <button onClick={() => setStep(s => s - 1)} className="mt-8 mx-auto flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-400 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:text-black transition-colors">
                  <ArrowLeft01Icon className="w-4 h-4" /> Atrás
                </button>
              )}
            </motion.div>
          ) : (
            <motion.div
              initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
              className="w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto py-12 px-4"
            >
              <div className="text-center mb-12 space-y-4">
                <span className="inline-flex items-center justify-center p-4 rounded-full bg-green-100 text-green-600 mb-4 shadow-sm">
                  <Tick01Icon className="w-8 h-8" />
                </span>
                <h1 className="text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tighter text-gray-900">Protocolo Personalizado</h1>
                <p className="text-xl text-gray-500 max-w-2xl mx-auto">
                  Hemos generado una estrategia basada en tus respuestas.
                </p>
                <button onClick={resetSearch} className="text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400 hover:text-black transition-colors pt-2">
                  Repetir Diagnóstico
                </button>
              </div>

              {/* ANALYSIS BLOCK */}
              {answers["goal"] && ANALYSIS_TIPS[answers["goal"] as string] && (
                <motion.div 
                  initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
                  animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
                  transition={{ delay: 0.2 }}
                  className="max-w-4xl mx-auto mb-16 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50/80 to-indigo-50/80 backdrop-blur-sm border border-blue-100/50 rounded-3xl p-8 md:p-10 relative overflow-hidden shadow-sm"
                >
                   <div className="absolute -top-10 -right-10 p-8 opacity-[0.03]">
                      <Brain className="w-64 h-64 text-blue-900" />
                   </div>
                   <div className="relative z-10">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-4 text-primary font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-xs md:text-sm">
                        <Activity className="w-5 h-5" />
                        Análisis Individual
                      </div>
                      <h2 className="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">
                        {ANALYSIS_TIPS[answers["goal"] as string].title}
                      </h2>
                      <p className="text-lg text-gray-700 leading-relaxed max-w-2xl">
                        {ANALYSIS_TIPS[answers["goal"] as string].text}
                      </p>
                   </div>
                </motion.div>
              )}

              {recommendations.length > 0 ? (
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8 items-start">
                  {/* CORE */}
                  <div className="lg:col-span-2 space-y-8">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                      <span className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-primary text-primary-foreground font-bold text-sm">1</span>
                      <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold">Tu Base Diaria</h2>
                    </div>
                    <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-3xl p-8 md:p-12 relative overflow-hidden flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center gap-12 group hover:shadow-2xl transition-all duration-500 border border-gray-100">
                      <div className="relative z-10 flex-1 space-y-6">
                        <h3 className="text-4xl font-black tracking-tight">{recommendations[0].name}</h3>
                        <p className="text-lg text-gray-600 leading-relaxed">
                          {recommendations[0].description || "La mejor opción para tu objetivo principal."}
                        </p>
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-6 pt-4">
                          <Link href={`/products/${recommendations[0].slug}`} className="bg-primary text-primary-foreground px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-bold shadow-lg hover:bg-primary/90 hover:scale-105 transition-all">
                            Ver Detalles
                          </Link>
                          <span className="text-2xl font-bold">{recommendations[0].price}€</span>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      <div className="w-64 h-64 relative mix-blend-multiply flex-shrink-0">
                        {recommendations[0].images?.[0] && <Image src={recommendations[0].images[0]} fill alt={recommendations[0].name} className="object-contain" />}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  {/* BOOSTERS */}
                  <div className="space-y-8">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                      <span className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-gray-200 text-gray-900 font-bold text-sm">2</span>
                      <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold">Potenciadores</h2>
                    </div>
                    <div className="grid gap-6">
                      {recommendations.slice(1).map(product => (
                        <Link href={`/products/${product.slug}`} key={product.id} className="group bg-white border border-gray-100 p-6 rounded-2xl flex items-center gap-6 hover:shadow-xl hover:border-primary/30 transition-all">
                          <div className="w-20 h-20 relative mix-blend-multiply bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-2">
                            {product.images?.[0] && <Image src={product.images[0]} fill alt={product.name} className="object-contain" />}
                          </div>
                          <div>
                            <h4 className="font-bold text-lg leading-tight group-hover:text-[#007AFF] transition-colors">{product.name}</h4>
                            <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-500 mt-1 block">{product.price}€</span>
                          </div>
                        </Link>
                      ))}
                      {recommendations.length < 2 && (
                        <div className="p-6 text-center text-gray-400 text-sm border border-dashed rounded-2xl">
                          No hay más recomendaciones específicas.
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              ) : (
                <div className="text-center py-20 bg-gray-50 rounded-3xl">
                  <Search01Icon className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto text-gray-300 mb-4" />
                  <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">Sin resultados exactos</h3>
                  <p className="text-gray-500 mt-2">Prueba a ajustar tus respuestas para encontrar algo ideal.</p>
                  <button onClick={resetSearch} className="mt-6 text-black font-bold underline">Reintentar</button>
                </div>
              )}
            </motion.div>
          )}
        </AnimatePresence>
      </main>
    </div>
  );
}
\n\n=======================\n\nFOUND GOOD FILE: C:\\Users\\Mykola\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\History\734be903\bpXp.tsx\n﻿"use client";

type AnswerValue = string | string[];
type Answers = Record<string, AnswerValue>;

interface QuestionOption {
  label: string;
  value: string;
  description?: string;
}

interface Question {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  subtitle?: string;
  type: "single" | "multiple";
  options: QuestionOption[];
  showIf?: (answers: Answers) => boolean;
  minSelection?: number;
}

function hasGoal(answers: Answers, goal: string): boolean {
  const mainGoal = typeof answers.main_goal === "string" ? answers.main_goal : "";
  const secondary = Array.isArray(answers.secondary_goals) ? answers.secondary_goals : [];
  return mainGoal === goal || secondary.includes(goal);
}
