function getOptionLabel(questionId: string, value: string): string {
  const question = QUESTIONS.find((item) => item.id === questionId);
  if (!question) return value;
  const option = question.options.find((item) => item.value === value);
  return option?.label || value;
}

export default function SmartSearchPage() {
  const [products, setProducts] = useState<Product[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [step, setStep] = useState(0);
  const [answers, setAnswers] = useState<Answers>({});
  const [showResults, setShowResults] = useState(false);
  const [isAnalyzing, setIsAnalyzing] = useState(false);
  const [recommendations, setRecommendations] = useState<Product[]>([]);
  const [protocolBlocks, setProtocolBlocks] = useState<Array<{ title: string; text: string }>>([]);
  const [analysisStage, setAnalysisStage] = useState(0);

  useEffect(() => {
    const loadData = async () => {
      try {
        const productData = await ProductService.getAllProducts();
        setProducts(productData);
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("Error loading products:", error);
      } finally {
        setLoading(false);
      }
    };

    loadData();
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isAnalyzing) return;

    const timer = setInterval(() => {
      setAnalysisStage((prev) => (prev < 2 ? prev + 1 : prev));
    }, 500);

    return () => clearInterval(timer);
  }, [isAnalyzing]);

  const visibleQuestions = useMemo(
    () => QUESTIONS.filter((question) => (question.showIf ? question.showIf(answers) : true)),
    [answers],
  );

  useEffect(() => {
    if (step >= visibleQuestions.length) {
      setStep(Math.max(0, visibleQuestions.length - 1));
    }
  }, [step, visibleQuestions.length]);

  const currentQuestion = visibleQuestions[step];
  const totalSteps = visibleQuestions.length;
  const currentStepNumber = step + 1;

  const canContinue = useMemo(() => {
    if (!currentQuestion) return false;
    const value = answers[currentQuestion.id];
    if (!value) return false;
    if (currentQuestion.type === "single") return typeof value === "string" && value.length > 0;
    if (!Array.isArray(value)) return false;
    if (currentQuestion.minSelection) return value.length >= currentQuestion.minSelection;
    return value.length > 0;
  }, [answers, currentQuestion]);

  const handleOptionSelect = (value: string) => {
    if (!currentQuestion) return;

    if (currentQuestion.type === "single") {
      const updated = { ...answers, [currentQuestion.id]: value };
      setAnswers(updated);
      if (step < visibleQuestions.length - 1) {
        setStep((prev) => prev + 1);
      } else {
        void finishSearch(updated);
      }
      return;
    }

    const current = (answers[currentQuestion.id] as string[]) || [];
    let nextValues = current.includes(value)
      ? current.filter((entry) => entry !== value)
      : [...current, value];

    if (currentQuestion.id === "symptoms") {
      if (value === "ninguno") {
        nextValues = ["ninguno"];
      } else {
        nextValues = nextValues.filter((entry) => entry !== "ninguno");
      }
    }

    if (currentQuestion.id === "secondary_goals" && nextValues.length > 3) {
      nextValues = nextValues.slice(nextValues.length - 3);
    }

    setAnswers((prev) => ({ ...prev, [currentQuestion.id]: nextValues }));
  };

  const goNext = () => {
    if (!canContinue || !currentQuestion) return;
    if (step < visibleQuestions.length - 1) {
      setStep((prev) => prev + 1);
      return;
    }
    void finishSearch(answers);
  };

  const goBack = () => {
    setStep((prev) => Math.max(0, prev - 1));
  };

  const finishSearch = async (finalAnswers: Answers) => {
    setIsAnalyzing(true);
    setAnalysisStage(0);

    const goalValues = [
      typeof finalAnswers.main_goal === "string" ? finalAnswers.main_goal : "",
      ...((Array.isArray(finalAnswers.secondary_goals) ? finalAnswers.secondary_goals : []) as string[]),
    ].filter(Boolean);

    const symptomValues = ((Array.isArray(finalAnswers.symptoms) ? finalAnswers.symptoms : []) as string[]).filter(
      (entry) => entry !== "ninguno",
    );

    try {
      const response = await fetch("/api/recommend", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          symptoms: symptomValues,
          goals: goalValues,
          answers: finalAnswers,
        }),
      });

      if (response.ok) {
        const data = await response.json();
        setRecommendations(Array.isArray(data?.products) ? data.products.slice(0, 3) : []);
        setProtocolBlocks(Array.isArray(data?.blocks) ? data.blocks.slice(0, 3) : []);
      } else {
        setRecommendations(products.slice(0, 3));
        setProtocolBlocks([]);
      }
    } catch {
      setRecommendations(products.slice(0, 3));
      setProtocolBlocks([]);
    } finally {
      setTimeout(() => {
        setIsAnalyzing(false);
        setShowResults(true);
      }, 1000);
    }
  };

  const resetSearch = () => {
    setStep(0);
    setAnswers({});
    setShowResults(false);
    setRecommendations([]);
    setProtocolBlocks([]);
  };

  const profileChips = useMemo(() => {
    const chips: string[] = [];

    if (typeof answers.age_range === "string") chips.push(getOptionLabel("age_range", answers.age_range));
    if (typeof answers.profile === "string") chips.push(getOptionLabel("profile", answers.profile));
    if (typeof answers.main_goal === "string") chips.push(getOptionLabel("main_goal", answers.main_goal));

    const secondary = Array.isArray(answers.secondary_goals) ? answers.secondary_goals : [];
    secondary.forEach((item) => chips.push(getOptionLabel("secondary_goals", item)));

    return chips;
  }, [answers]);

  if (loading || !currentQuestion) return null;

  const analysisSteps = ["Validando perfil", "Ajustando objetivos", "Generando plan final"];

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen flex flex-col">
      <main className="flex-1 flex items-center justify-center relative p-6 mt-16 md:mt-0">
        <AnimatePresence mode="wait">
          {isAnalyzing ? (
            <motion.div
              key="analyzing"
              initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1 }}
              exit={{ opacity: 0, scale: 1.05 }}
              className="text-center w-full max-w-md"
            >
              <div className="relative w-24 h-24 mx-auto mb-8">
                <motion.div
                  animate={{ rotate: 360 }}
                  transition={{ duration: 3, repeat: Infinity, ease: "linear" }}
                  className="absolute inset-0 border-4 border-gray-100 rounded-full"
                />
                <motion.div
                  animate={{ rotate: 360 }}
                  transition={{ duration: 1.5, repeat: Infinity, ease: "linear" }}
                  className="absolute inset-0 border-4 border-t-primary border-r-transparent border-b-transparent border-l-transparent rounded-full"
                />
                <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center">
                  <Sparkles className="w-8 h-8 text-primary" />
                </div>
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 tracking-tight">Personalizando tu protocolo...</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-500 mt-3 text-lg">Cruzando edad, objetivos, síntomas y estilo de vida con el catálogo.</p>

              <div className="mt-8 mx-auto w-full max-w-sm space-y-2.5 text-left">
                {analysisSteps.map((item, index) => {
                  const done = index < analysisStage;
                  const current = index === analysisStage;

                  return (
                    <div
                      key={item}
                      className={clsx(
                        "flex items-center gap-3 rounded-lg border px-3 py-2.5 text-sm",
                        done
                          ? "border-green-200 bg-green-50 text-green-700"
                          : current
                            ? "border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 text-blue-700"
                            : "border-gray-200 bg-white text-gray-500",
                      )}
                    >
                      {done ? (
                        <CheckCircle2 className="h-4 w-4 shrink-0" />
                      ) : current ? (
                        <Circle className="h-4 w-4 shrink-0" />
                      ) : (
                        <Circle className="h-4 w-4 shrink-0" />
                      )}
                        <span className="leading-tight">{item}</span>
                    </div>
                  );
                })}
              </div>
            </motion.div>
          ) : !showResults ? (
            <motion.div
              key={currentQuestion.id}
              initial={{ opacity: 0, x: 20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
              exit={{ opacity: 0, x: -20 }}
              className="w-full max-w-3xl min-h-[82vh] flex flex-col"
            >
              <div className="mb-5 flex items-center justify-between text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-500">
                <span>Progreso personalizado</span>
                <span>
                  Paso {currentStepNumber} de {totalSteps}
                </span>
              </div>

              <div className="mb-8 hidden md:flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
                {visibleQuestions.map((question, index) => {
                  const isDone = index < step;
                  const isCurrent = index === step;

                  return (
                    <div
                      key={question.id}
                      className={clsx(
                        "inline-flex items-center rounded-full border text-xs font-medium transition-colors",
                        isDone && "h-8 w-8 justify-center border-green-200 bg-green-50 text-green-700",
                        isCurrent && "h-8 gap-2 px-3 border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 text-blue-700",
                        !isDone && !isCurrent && "h-8 w-8 justify-center border-gray-200 bg-white text-gray-500",
                      )}
                    >
                      {isDone ? (
                        <CheckCircle2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                      ) : isCurrent ? (
                        <span className="text-[10px] font-semibold">{index + 1}</span>
                      ) : (
                        <span className="text-[10px] font-semibold">{index + 1}</span>
                      )}
                      {isCurrent && <span className="whitespace-nowrap">{question.title}</span>}
                    </div>
                  );
                })}
              </div>

              <div className="w-full bg-gray-100 h-1.5 rounded-full mb-8 md:mb-12 overflow-hidden">
                <motion.div
                  initial={{ width: `${((step + 1) / visibleQuestions.length) * 100}%` }}
                  animate={{ width: `${((step + 1) / visibleQuestions.length) * 100}%` }}
                  transition={{ duration: 0.4 }}
                  className="h-full bg-primary rounded-full"
                />
              </div>

              <div className="space-y-2 mb-6 text-center">
                <h1 className="text-2xl md:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tighter text-gray-900">{currentQuestion.title}</h1>
                {currentQuestion.subtitle && <p className="text-base md:text-lg text-gray-500">{currentQuestion.subtitle}</p>}
              </div>

              <div className="grid gap-2.5 grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 flex-1 content-start">
                {currentQuestion.options.map((option) => {
                  const selectedValue = answers[currentQuestion.id];
                  const isSelected = Array.isArray(selectedValue)
                    ? selectedValue.includes(option.value)
                    : selectedValue === option.value;

                  const Icon = ICON_MAP[option.value] || Circle;

                  return (
                    <button
                      key={option.value}
                      onClick={() => handleOptionSelect(option.value)}
                      className={clsx(
                        "relative p-4 md:p-5 min-h-[72px] rounded-2xl border-2 text-left transition-all duration-300 group hover:shadow-lg flex items-center gap-3 touch-manipulation",
                        isSelected ? "border-primary bg-primary text-primary-foreground" : "border-gray-100 bg-white hover:border-gray-300",
                      )}
                    >
                      <div className={clsx("p-2.5 rounded-full shrink-0", isSelected ? "bg-white/20" : "bg-gray-50 group-hover:bg-gray-100")}>
                        <Icon className={clsx("w-5 h-5", isSelected ? "text-white" : "text-gray-600")} />
                      </div>

                      <div className="flex-1">
                        <div className={clsx("font-bold text-base md:text-lg mb-0.5", isSelected ? "text-white" : "text-gray-900")}>{option.label}</div>
                        {option.description && (
                          <div className={clsx("text-xs opacity-90 font-medium leading-tight", isSelected ? "text-blue-100" : "text-gray-500")}>
                            {option.description}
                          </div>
                        )}
                      </div>

                      <div className="shrink-0 self-center">
                        {isSelected ? <CheckCircle2 className="w-6 h-6 text-white" /> : <Circle className="w-6 h-6 text-gray-300" />}
                      </div>
                    </button>
                  );
                })}
              </div>

              {currentQuestion.type === "multiple" && (
                <div className="sticky bottom-0 mt-4 z-20 bg-gradient-to-t from-white via-white/95 to-transparent pb-6 pt-6 px-4 -mx-4 md:mx-0 flex justify-center">
                  <button
                    onClick={goNext}
                    disabled={!canContinue}
                    className="w-full max-w-md bg-primary text-primary-foreground h-14 rounded-full font-bold text-base md:text-lg disabled:opacity-50 hover:scale-[1.02] transition-transform shadow-xl shadow-blue-200 touch-manipulation flex items-center justify-center safe-area-bottom-margin"
                  >
                    Continuar
                  </button>
                </div>
              )}

              {step > 0 && (
                <button onClick={goBack} className="mt-8 mx-auto flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-400 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:text-black transition-colors">
                  <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" /> Atrás
                </button>
              )}
            </motion.div>
          ) : (
            <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} className="w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto py-12 px-4">
              <div className="text-center mb-12 space-y-4">
                <span className="inline-flex items-center justify-center p-4 rounded-full bg-green-100 text-green-600 mb-4 shadow-sm">
                  <CheckCircle2 className="w-8 h-8" />
                </span>
                <h1 className="text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tighter text-gray-900">Protocolo personalizado</h1>
                <p className="text-xl text-gray-500 max-w-2xl mx-auto">Plan creado según tus objetivos, perfil y contexto diario.</p>
                <button onClick={resetSearch} className="text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400 hover:text-black transition-colors pt-2">
                  Repetir cuestionario
                </button>
              </div>

              {profileChips.length > 0 && (
                <div className="max-w-5xl mx-auto mb-10">
                  <div className="panel-soft">
                    <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900">Perfil evaluado</h2>
                    <div className="mt-4 flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                      {profileChips.map((chip) => (
                        <span key={chip} className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-700 bg-gray-100 border border-gray-200 px-3 py-1 rounded-full">
                          {chip}
                        </span>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}

              {protocolBlocks.length > 0 && (
                <div className="max-w-5xl mx-auto mb-10">
                  <div className="panel-soft">
                    <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500">Pautas del plan</p>
                    <div className="mt-3 flex flex-wrap gap-2.5">
                      {protocolBlocks.map((block) => (
                        <span
                          key={block.title}
                          title={block.text}
                          className="inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-gray-200 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium text-gray-700"
                        >
                          {block.title}
                        </span>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}

              {recommendations.length > 0 ? (
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8 items-start">
                  <div className="lg:col-span-2 space-y-8">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                      <span className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-primary text-primary-foreground font-bold text-sm">1</span>
                      <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold">Base diaria recomendada</h2>
                    </div>
                    <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-3xl p-8 md:p-12 relative overflow-hidden flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center gap-12 group hover:shadow-2xl transition-all duration-500 border border-gray-100">
                      <div className="relative z-10 flex-1 space-y-6">
                        <h3 className="text-4xl font-black tracking-tight">{recommendations[0].name}</h3>
                        <p className="text-lg text-gray-600 leading-relaxed">{recommendations[0].description || "Opcion principal para tu objetivo actual."}</p>
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-6 pt-4">
                          <Link href={`/products/${recommendations[0].slug}`} className="bg-primary text-primary-foreground px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-bold shadow-lg hover:bg-primary/90 hover:scale-105 transition-all">
                            Ver detalles
                          </Link>
                          <span className="text-2xl font-bold">{formatPrice(recommendations[0].price)}</span>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      <div className="w-64 h-64 relative mix-blend-multiply flex-shrink-0">
                        {recommendations[0].images?.[0] && <Image src={recommendations[0].images[0]} fill alt={recommendations[0].name} className="object-contain" />}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  <div className="space-y-8">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                      <span className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-gray-200 text-gray-900 font-bold text-sm">2</span>
                      <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold">Refuerzos</h2>
                    </div>
                    <div className="grid gap-6">
                      {recommendations.slice(1).map((product) => (
                        <Link href={`/products/${product.slug}`} key={product.id} className="group bg-white border border-gray-100 p-6 rounded-2xl flex items-center gap-6 hover:shadow-xl hover:border-primary/30 transition-all">
                          <div className="w-20 h-20 relative mix-blend-multiply bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-2">
                            {product.images?.[0] && <Image src={product.images[0]} fill alt={product.name} className="object-contain" />}
                          </div>
                          <div>
                            <h4 className="font-bold text-lg leading-tight group-hover:text-[#007AFF] transition-colors">{product.name}</h4>
                            <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-500 mt-1 block">{formatPrice(product.price)}</span>
                          </div>
                        </Link>
                      ))}

                      {recommendations.length < 2 && (
                        <div className="p-6 text-center text-gray-400 text-sm border border-dashed rounded-2xl">No hay más refuerzos específicos para este perfil.</div>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              ) : (
                <div className="text-center py-20 bg-gray-50 rounded-3xl">
                  <Search className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto text-gray-300 mb-4" />
                  <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">Sin resultados exactos</h3>
                  <p className="text-gray-500 mt-2">Ajusta respuestas para conseguir un plan más preciso.</p>
                  <button onClick={resetSearch} className="mt-6 text-black font-bold underline">
                    Reintentar
                  </button>
                </div>
              )}
            </motion.div>
          )}
        </AnimatePresence>
      </main>
    </div>
  );
}

type AnswerValue = string | string[];
type Answers = Record<string, AnswerValue>;

interface QuestionOption {
  label: string;
  value: string;
  description?: string;
}

interface Question {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  subtitle?: string;
  type: "single" | "multiple";
  options: QuestionOption[];
  showIf?: (answers: Answers) => boolean;
  minSelection?: number;
}

function hasGoal(answers: Answers, goal: string): boolean {
  const mainGoal = typeof answers.main_goal === "string" ? answers.main_goal : "";
  const secondary = Array.isArray(answers.secondary_goals) ? answers.secondary_goals : [];
  return mainGoal === goal || secondary.includes(goal);
}

function getOptionLabel(questionId: string, value: string): string {
  const question = QUESTIONS.find((item) => item.id === questionId);
  if (!question) return value;
  const option = question.options.find((item) => item.value === value);
  return option?.label || value;
}

export default function SmartSearchPage() {
  const [products, setProducts] = useState<Product[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [step, setStep] = useState(0);
  const [answers, setAnswers] = useState<Answers>({});
  const [showResults, setShowResults] = useState(false);
  const [isAnalyzing, setIsAnalyzing] = useState(false);
  const [recommendations, setRecommendations] = useState<Product[]>([]);
  const [protocolBlocks, setProtocolBlocks] = useState<Array<{ title: string; text: string }>>([]);
  const [analysisStage, setAnalysisStage] = useState(0);

  useEffect(() => {
    const loadData = async () => {
      try {
        const productData = await ProductService.getAllProducts();
        setProducts(productData);
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("Error loading products:", error);
      } finally {
        setLoading(false);
      }
    };

    loadData();
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isAnalyzing) return;

    const timer = setInterval(() => {
      setAnalysisStage((prev) => (prev < 2 ? prev + 1 : prev));
    }, 500);

    return () => clearInterval(timer);
  }, [isAnalyzing]);

  const visibleQuestions = useMemo(
    () => QUESTIONS.filter((question) => (question.showIf ? question.showIf(answers) : true)),
    [answers],
  );

  useEffect(() => {
    if (step >= visibleQuestions.length) {
      setStep(Math.max(0, visibleQuestions.length - 1));
    }
  }, [step, visibleQuestions.length]);

  const currentQuestion = visibleQuestions[step];
  const totalSteps = visibleQuestions.length;
  const currentStepNumber = step + 1;

  const canContinue = useMemo(() => {
    if (!currentQuestion) return false;
    const value = answers[currentQuestion.id];
    if (!value) return false;
    if (currentQuestion.type === "single") return typeof value === "string" && value.length > 0;
    if (!Array.isArray(value)) return false;
    if (currentQuestion.minSelection) return value.length >= currentQuestion.minSelection;
    return value.length > 0;
  }, [answers, currentQuestion]);

  const handleOptionSelect = (value: string) => {
    if (!currentQuestion) return;

    if (currentQuestion.type === "single") {
      const updated = { ...answers, [currentQuestion.id]: value };
      setAnswers(updated);
      if (step < visibleQuestions.length - 1) {
        setStep((prev) => prev + 1);
      } else {
        void finishSearch(updated);
      }
      return;
    }

    const current = (answers[currentQuestion.id] as string[]) || [];
    let nextValues = current.includes(value)
      ? current.filter((entry) => entry !== value)
      : [...current, value];

    if (currentQuestion.id === "symptoms") {
      if (value === "ninguno") {
        nextValues = ["ninguno"];
      } else {
        nextValues = nextValues.filter((entry) => entry !== "ninguno");
      }
    }

    if (currentQuestion.id === "secondary_goals" && nextValues.length > 3) {
      nextValues = nextValues.slice(nextValues.length - 3);
    }

    setAnswers((prev) => ({ ...prev, [currentQuestion.id]: nextValues }));
  };

  const goNext = () => {
    if (!canContinue || !currentQuestion) return;
    if (step < visibleQuestions.length - 1) {
      setStep((prev) => prev + 1);
      return;
    }
    void finishSearch(answers);
  };

  const goBack = () => {
    setStep((prev) => Math.max(0, prev - 1));
  };

  const finishSearch = async (finalAnswers: Answers) => {
    setIsAnalyzing(true);
    setAnalysisStage(0);

    const goalValues = [
      typeof finalAnswers.main_goal === "string" ? finalAnswers.main_goal : "",
      ...((Array.isArray(finalAnswers.secondary_goals) ? finalAnswers.secondary_goals : []) as string[]),
    ].filter(Boolean);

    const symptomValues = ((Array.isArray(finalAnswers.symptoms) ? finalAnswers.symptoms : []) as string[]).filter(
      (entry) => entry !== "ninguno",
    );

    try {
      const response = await fetch("/api/recommend", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          symptoms: symptomValues,
          goals: goalValues,
          answers: finalAnswers,
        }),
      });

      if (response.ok) {
        const data = await response.json();
        setRecommendations(Array.isArray(data?.products) ? data.products.slice(0, 3) : []);
        setProtocolBlocks(Array.isArray(data?.blocks) ? data.blocks.slice(0, 3) : []);
      } else {
        setRecommendations(products.slice(0, 3));
        setProtocolBlocks([]);
      }
    } catch {
      setRecommendations(products.slice(0, 3));
      setProtocolBlocks([]);
    } finally {
      setTimeout(() => {
        setIsAnalyzing(false);
        setShowResults(true);
      }, 1000);
    }
  };

  const resetSearch = () => {
    setStep(0);
    setAnswers({});
    setShowResults(false);
    setRecommendations([]);
    setProtocolBlocks([]);
  };

  const profileChips = useMemo(() => {
    const chips: string[] = [];

    if (typeof answers.age_range === "string") chips.push(getOptionLabel("age_range", answers.age_range));
    if (typeof answers.profile === "string") chips.push(getOptionLabel("profile", answers.profile));
    if (typeof answers.main_goal === "string") chips.push(getOptionLabel("main_goal", answers.main_goal));

    const secondary = Array.isArray(answers.secondary_goals) ? answers.secondary_goals : [];
    secondary.forEach((item) => chips.push(getOptionLabel("secondary_goals", item)));

    return chips;
  }, [answers]);

  if (loading || !currentQuestion) return null;

  const analysisSteps = ["Validando perfil", "Ajustando objetivos", "Generando plan final"];

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen flex flex-col">
      <main className="flex-1 flex items-center justify-center relative p-6 mt-16 md:mt-0">
        <AnimatePresence mode="wait">
          {isAnalyzing ? (
            <motion.div
              key="analyzing"
              initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1 }}
              exit={{ opacity: 0, scale: 1.05 }}
              transition={{ type: "spring", stiffness: 300, damping: 30, mass: 1 }}
              className="text-center w-full max-w-md"
            >
              <div className="relative w-24 h-24 mx-auto mb-8">
                <motion.div
                  animate={{ rotate: 360 }}
                  transition={{ duration: 3, repeat: Infinity, ease: "linear" }}
                  className="absolute inset-0 border-4 border-gray-100 rounded-full"
                />
                <motion.div
                  animate={{ rotate: 360 }}
                  transition={{ duration: 1.5, repeat: Infinity, ease: "linear" }}
                  className="absolute inset-0 border-4 border-t-primary border-r-transparent border-b-transparent border-l-transparent rounded-full"
                />
                <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center">
                  <Sparkles className="w-8 h-8 text-primary" />
                </div>
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 tracking-tight">Personalizando tu protocolo...</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-500 mt-3 text-lg">Cruzando edad, objetivos, síntomas y estilo de vida con el catálogo.</p>

              <div className="mt-8 mx-auto w-full max-w-sm space-y-2.5 text-left">
                {analysisSteps.map((item, index) => {
                  const done = index < analysisStage;
                  const current = index === analysisStage;

                  return (
                    <div
                      key={item}
                      className={clsx(
                        "flex items-center gap-3 rounded-lg border px-3 py-2.5 text-sm",
                        done
                          ? "border-green-200 bg-green-50 text-green-700"
                          : current
                            ? "border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 text-blue-700"
                            : "border-gray-200 bg-white text-gray-500",
                      )}
                    >
                      {done ? (
                        <CheckCircle2 className="h-4 w-4 shrink-0" />
                      ) : current ? (
                        <Circle className="h-4 w-4 shrink-0" />
                      ) : (
                        <Circle className="h-4 w-4 shrink-0" />
                      )}
                        <span className="leading-tight">{item}</span>
                    </div>
                  );
                })}
              </div>
            </motion.div>
          ) : !showResults ? (
            <motion.div
              key={currentQuestion.id}
              initial={{ opacity: 0, x: 20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
              exit={{ opacity: 0, x: -20 }}
              transition={{ type: "spring", stiffness: 300, damping: 30, mass: 1 }}
              className="w-full max-w-3xl min-h-[82vh] flex flex-col"
            >
              <div className="mb-5 flex items-center justify-between text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-500">
                <span>Progreso personalizado</span>
                <span>
                  Paso {currentStepNumber} de {totalSteps}
                </span>
              </div>

              <div className="mb-8 hidden md:flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
                {visibleQuestions.map((question, index) => {
                  const isDone = index < step;
                  const isCurrent = index === step;

                  return (
                    <div
                      key={question.id}
                      className={clsx(
                        "inline-flex items-center rounded-full border text-xs font-medium transition-colors",
                        isDone && "h-8 w-8 justify-center border-green-200 bg-green-50 text-green-700",
                        isCurrent && "h-8 gap-2 px-3 border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 text-blue-700",
                        !isDone && !isCurrent && "h-8 w-8 justify-center border-gray-200 bg-white text-gray-500",
                      )}
                    >
                      {isDone ? (
                        <CheckCircle2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                      ) : isCurrent ? (
                        <span className="text-[10px] font-semibold">{index + 1}</span>
                      ) : (
                        <span className="text-[10px] font-semibold">{index + 1}</span>
                      )}
                      {isCurrent && <span className="whitespace-nowrap">{question.title}</span>}
                    </div>
                  );
                })}
              </div>

              <div className="w-full bg-gray-100 h-1.5 rounded-full mb-8 md:mb-12 overflow-hidden">
                <motion.div
                  initial={{ width: `${((step + 1) / visibleQuestions.length) * 100}%` }}
                  animate={{ width: `${((step + 1) / visibleQuestions.length) * 100}%` }}
                  transition={{ duration: 0.4 }}
                  className="h-full bg-primary rounded-full"
                />
              </div>

              <div className="space-y-2 mb-6 text-center">
                <h1 className="text-2xl md:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tighter text-gray-900">{currentQuestion.title}</h1>
                {currentQuestion.subtitle && <p className="text-base md:text-lg text-gray-500">{currentQuestion.subtitle}</p>}
              </div>

              <div className="grid gap-2.5 grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 flex-1 content-start">
                {currentQuestion.options.map((option) => {
                  const selectedValue = answers[currentQuestion.id];
                  const isSelected = Array.isArray(selectedValue)
                    ? selectedValue.includes(option.value)
                    : selectedValue === option.value;

                  const Icon = ICON_MAP[option.value] || Circle;

                  return (
                    <button
                      key={option.value}
                      onClick={() => handleOptionSelect(option.value)}
                      className={clsx(
                        "relative p-4 md:p-5 min-h-[72px] rounded-2xl border-2 text-left transition-all duration-300 group hover:shadow-lg flex items-center gap-3 touch-manipulation",
                        isSelected ? "border-primary bg-primary text-primary-foreground" : "border-gray-100 bg-white hover:border-gray-300",
                      )}
                    >
                      <div className={clsx("p-2.5 rounded-full shrink-0", isSelected ? "bg-white/20" : "bg-gray-50 group-hover:bg-gray-100")}>
                        <Icon className={clsx("w-5 h-5", isSelected ? "text-white" : "text-gray-600")} />
                      </div>

                      <div className="flex-1">
                        <div className={clsx("font-bold text-base md:text-lg mb-0.5", isSelected ? "text-white" : "text-gray-900")}>{option.label}</div>
                        {option.description && (
                          <div className={clsx("text-xs opacity-90 font-medium leading-tight", isSelected ? "text-blue-100" : "text-gray-500")}>
                            {option.description}
                          </div>
                        )}
                      </div>

                      <div className="shrink-0 self-center">
                        {isSelected ? <CheckCircle2 className="w-6 h-6 text-white" /> : <Circle className="w-6 h-6 text-gray-300" />}
                      </div>
                    </button>
                  );
                })}
              </div>

              {currentQuestion.type === "multiple" && (
                <div className="sticky bottom-0 mt-4 z-20 bg-gradient-to-t from-white via-white/95 to-transparent pb-6 pt-6 px-4 -mx-4 md:mx-0 flex justify-center">
                  <button
                    onClick={goNext}
                    disabled={!canContinue}
                    className="w-full max-w-md bg-primary text-primary-foreground h-14 rounded-full font-bold text-base md:text-lg disabled:opacity-50 hover:scale-[1.02] transition-transform shadow-xl shadow-blue-200 touch-manipulation flex items-center justify-center safe-area-bottom-margin"
                  >
                    Continuar
                  </button>
                </div>
              )}

              {step > 0 && (
                <button onClick={goBack} className="mt-8 mx-auto flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-400 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:text-black transition-colors">
                  <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" /> Atrás
                </button>
              )}
            </motion.div>
          ) : (
              initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
              transition={{ type: "spring", stiffness: 300, damping: 30, mass: 1 }}
              className="w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto py-12 px-4"
            
            <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} className="w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto py-12 px-4">
              <div className="text-center mb-12 space-y-4">
                <span className="inline-flex items-center justify-center p-4 rounded-full bg-green-100 text-green-600 mb-4 shadow-sm">
                  <CheckCircle2 className="w-8 h-8" />
                </span>
                <h1 className="text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tighter text-gray-900">Protocolo personalizado</h1>
                <p className="text-xl text-gray-500 max-w-2xl mx-auto">Plan creado según tus objetivos, perfil y contexto diario.</p>
                <button onClick={resetSearch} className="text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400 hover:text-black transition-colors pt-2">
                  Repetir cuestionario
                </button>
              </div>

              {profileChips.length > 0 && (
                <div className="max-w-5xl mx-auto mb-10">
                  <div className="panel-soft">
                    <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900">Perfil evaluado</h2>
                    <div className="mt-4 flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                      {profileChips.map((chip) => (
                        <span key={chip} className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-700 bg-gray-100 border border-gray-200 px-3 py-1 rounded-full">
                          {chip}
                        </span>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}

              {protocolBlocks.length > 0 && (
                <div className="max-w-5xl mx-auto mb-10">
                  <div className="panel-soft">
                    <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500">Pautas del plan</p>
                    <div className="mt-3 flex flex-wrap gap-2.5">
                      {protocolBlocks.map((block) => (
                        <span
                          key={block.title}
                          title={block.text}
                          className="inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-gray-200 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium text-gray-700"
                        >
                          {block.title}
                        </span>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}

              {recommendations.length > 0 ? (
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8 items-start">
                  <div className="lg:col-span-2 space-y-8">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                      <span className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-primary text-primary-foreground font-bold text-sm">1</span>
                      <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold">Base diaria recomendada</h2>
                    </div>
                    <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-3xl p-8 md:p-12 relative overflow-hidden flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center gap-12 group hover:shadow-2xl transition-all duration-500 border border-gray-100">
                      <div className="relative z-10 flex-1 space-y-6">
                        <h3 className="text-4xl font-black tracking-tight">{recommendations[0].name}</h3>
                        <p className="text-lg text-gray-600 leading-relaxed">{recommendations[0].description || "Opcion principal para tu objetivo actual."}</p>
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-6 pt-4">
                          <Link href={`/products/${recommendations[0].slug}`} className="bg-primary text-primary-foreground px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-bold shadow-lg hover:bg-primary/90 hover:scale-105 transition-all">
                            Ver detalles
                          </Link>
                          <span className="text-2xl font-bold">{formatPrice(recommendations[0].price)}</span>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      <div className="w-64 h-64 relative mix-blend-multiply flex-shrink-0">
                        {recommendations[0].images?.[0] && <Image src={recommendations[0].images[0]} fill alt={recommendations[0].name} className="object-contain" />}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  <div className="space-y-8">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                      <span className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-gray-200 text-gray-900 font-bold text-sm">2</span>
                      <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold">Refuerzos</h2>
                    </div>
                    <div className="grid gap-6">
                      {recommendations.slice(1).map((product) => (
                        <Link href={`/products/${product.slug}`} key={product.id} className="group bg-white border border-gray-100 p-6 rounded-2xl flex items-center gap-6 hover:shadow-xl hover:border-primary/30 transition-all">
                          <div className="w-20 h-20 relative mix-blend-multiply bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-2">
                            {product.images?.[0] && <Image src={product.images[0]} fill alt={product.name} className="object-contain" />}
                          </div>
                          <div>
                            <h4 className="font-bold text-lg leading-tight group-hover:text-[#007AFF] transition-colors">{product.name}</h4>
                            <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-500 mt-1 block">{formatPrice(product.price)}</span>
                          </div>
                        </Link>
                      ))}

                      {recommendations.length < 2 && (
                        <div className="p-6 text-center text-gray-400 text-sm border border-dashed rounded-2xl">No hay más refuerzos específicos para este perfil.</div>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              ) : (
                <div className="text-center py-20 bg-gray-50 rounded-3xl">
                  <Search className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto text-gray-300 mb-4" />
                  <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">Sin resultados exactos</h3>
                  <p className="text-gray-500 mt-2">Ajusta respuestas para conseguir un plan más preciso.</p>
                  <button onClick={resetSearch} className="mt-6 text-black font-bold underline">
                    Reintentar
                  </button>
                </div>
              )}
            </motion.div>
          )}
        </AnimatePresence>
      </main>
    </div>
  );
}

type AnswerValue = string | string[];
type Answers = Record<string, AnswerValue>;

interface QuestionOption {
  label: string;
  value: string;
  description?: string;
}

interface Question {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  subtitle?: string;
  type: "single" | "multiple";
  options: QuestionOption[];
  showIf?: (answers: Answers) => boolean;
  minSelection?: number;
}

function hasGoal(answers: Answers, goal: string): boolean {
  const mainGoal = typeof answers.main_goal === "string" ? answers.main_goal : "";
  const secondary = Array.isArray(answers.secondary_goals) ? answers.secondary_goals : [];
  return mainGoal === goal || secondary.includes(goal);
}

function getOptionLabel(questionId: string, value: string): string {
  const question = QUESTIONS.find((item) => item.id === questionId);
  if (!question) return value;
  const option = question.options.find((item) => item.value === value);
  return option?.label || value;
}

export default function SmartSearchPage() {
  const [products, setProducts] = useState<Product[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [step, setStep] = useState(0);
  const [answers, setAnswers] = useState<Answers>({});
  const [showResults, setShowResults] = useState(false);
  const [isAnalyzing, setIsAnalyzing] = useState(false);
  const [recommendations, setRecommendations] = useState<Product[]>([]);
  const [protocolBlocks, setProtocolBlocks] = useState<Array<{ title: string; text: string }>>([]);
  const [analysisStage, setAnalysisStage] = useState(0);

  useEffect(() => {
    const loadData = async () => {
      try {
        const productData = await ProductService.getAllProducts();
        setProducts(productData);
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("Error loading products:", error);
      } finally {
        setLoading(false);
      }
    };

    loadData();
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isAnalyzing) return;

    const timer = setInterval(() => {
      setAnalysisStage((prev) => (prev < 2 ? prev + 1 : prev));
    }, 500);

    return () => clearInterval(timer);
  }, [isAnalyzing]);

  const visibleQuestions = useMemo(
    () => QUESTIONS.filter((question) => (question.showIf ? question.showIf(answers) : true)),
    [answers],
  );

  useEffect(() => {
    if (step >= visibleQuestions.length) {
      setStep(Math.max(0, visibleQuestions.length - 1));
    }
  }, [step, visibleQuestions.length]);

  const currentQuestion = visibleQuestions[step];
  const totalSteps = visibleQuestions.length;
  const currentStepNumber = step + 1;

  const canContinue = useMemo(() => {
    if (!currentQuestion) return false;
    const value = answers[currentQuestion.id];
    if (!value) return false;
    if (currentQuestion.type === "single") return typeof value === "string" && value.length > 0;
    if (!Array.isArray(value)) return false;
    if (currentQuestion.minSelection) return value.length >= currentQuestion.minSelection;
    return value.length > 0;
  }, [answers, currentQuestion]);

  const handleOptionSelect = (value: string) => {
    if (!currentQuestion) return;

    if (currentQuestion.type === "single") {
      const updated = { ...answers, [currentQuestion.id]: value };
      setAnswers(updated);
      if (step < visibleQuestions.length - 1) {
        setStep((prev) => prev + 1);
      } else {
        void finishSearch(updated);
      }
      return;
    }

    const current = (answers[currentQuestion.id] as string[]) || [];
    let nextValues = current.includes(value)
      ? current.filter((entry) => entry !== value)
      : [...current, value];

    if (currentQuestion.id === "symptoms") {
      if (value === "ninguno") {
        nextValues = ["ninguno"];
      } else {
        nextValues = nextValues.filter((entry) => entry !== "ninguno");
      }
    }

    if (currentQuestion.id === "secondary_goals" && nextValues.length > 3) {
      nextValues = nextValues.slice(nextValues.length - 3);
    }

    setAnswers((prev) => ({ ...prev, [currentQuestion.id]: nextValues }));
  };

  const goNext = () => {
    if (!canContinue || !currentQuestion) return;
    if (step < visibleQuestions.length - 1) {
      setStep((prev) => prev + 1);
      return;
    }
    void finishSearch(answers);
  };

  const goBack = () => {
    setStep((prev) => Math.max(0, prev - 1));
  };

  const finishSearch = async (finalAnswers: Answers) => {
    setIsAnalyzing(true);
    setAnalysisStage(0);

    const goalValues = [
      typeof finalAnswers.main_goal === "string" ? finalAnswers.main_goal : "",
      ...((Array.isArray(finalAnswers.secondary_goals) ? finalAnswers.secondary_goals : []) as string[]),
    ].filter(Boolean);

    const symptomValues = ((Array.isArray(finalAnswers.symptoms) ? finalAnswers.symptoms : []) as string[]).filter(
      (entry) => entry !== "ninguno",
    );

    try {
      const response = await fetch("/api/recommend", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          symptoms: symptomValues,
          goals: goalValues,
          answers: finalAnswers,
        }),
      });

      if (response.ok) {
        const data = await response.json();
        setRecommendations(Array.isArray(data?.products) ? data.products.slice(0, 3) : []);
        setProtocolBlocks(Array.isArray(data?.blocks) ? data.blocks.slice(0, 3) : []);
      } else {
        setRecommendations(products.slice(0, 3));
        setProtocolBlocks([]);
      }
    } catch {
      setRecommendations(products.slice(0, 3));
      setProtocolBlocks([]);
    } finally {
      setTimeout(() => {
        setIsAnalyzing(false);
        setShowResults(true);
      }, 1000);
    }
  };

  const resetSearch = () => {
    setStep(0);
    setAnswers({});
    setShowResults(false);
    setRecommendations([]);
    setProtocolBlocks([]);
  };

  const profileChips = useMemo(() => {
    const chips: string[] = [];

    if (typeof answers.age_range === "string") chips.push(getOptionLabel("age_range", answers.age_range));
    if (typeof answers.profile === "string") chips.push(getOptionLabel("profile", answers.profile));
    if (typeof answers.main_goal === "string") chips.push(getOptionLabel("main_goal", answers.main_goal));

    const secondary = Array.isArray(answers.secondary_goals) ? answers.secondary_goals : [];
    secondary.forEach((item) => chips.push(getOptionLabel("secondary_goals", item)));

    return chips;
  }, [answers]);

  if (loading || !currentQuestion) return null;

  const analysisSteps = ["Validando perfil", "Ajustando objetivos", "Generando plan final"];

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen flex flex-col">
      <main className="flex-1 flex items-center justify-center relative p-6 mt-16 md:mt-0">
        <AnimatePresence mode="wait">
          {isAnalyzing ? (
            <motion.div
              key="analyzing"
              initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1 }}
              exit={{ opacity: 0, scale: 1.05 }}
              transition={{ type: "spring", stiffness: 300, damping: 30, mass: 1 }}
              className="text-center w-full max-w-md"
            >
              <div className="relative w-24 h-24 mx-auto mb-8">
                <motion.div
                  animate={{ rotate: 360 }}
                  transition={{ duration: 3, repeat: Infinity, ease: "linear" }}
                  className="absolute inset-0 border-4 border-gray-100 rounded-full"
                />
                <motion.div
                  animate={{ rotate: 360 }}
                  transition={{ duration: 1.5, repeat: Infinity, ease: "linear" }}
                  className="absolute inset-0 border-4 border-t-primary border-r-transparent border-b-transparent border-l-transparent rounded-full"
                />
                <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center">
                  <Sparkles className="w-8 h-8 text-primary" />
                </div>
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 tracking-tight">Personalizando tu protocolo...</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-500 mt-3 text-lg">Cruzando edad, objetivos, síntomas y estilo de vida con el catálogo.</p>

              <div className="mt-8 mx-auto w-full max-w-sm space-y-2.5 text-left">
                {analysisSteps.map((item, index) => {
                  const done = index < analysisStage;
                  const current = index === analysisStage;

                  return (
                    <div
                      key={item}
                      className={clsx(
                        "flex items-center gap-3 rounded-lg border px-3 py-2.5 text-sm",
                        done
                          ? "border-green-200 bg-green-50 text-green-700"
                          : current
                            ? "border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 text-blue-700"
                            : "border-gray-200 bg-white text-gray-500",
                      )}
                    >
                      {done ? (
                        <CheckCircle2 className="h-4 w-4 shrink-0" />
                      ) : current ? (
                        <Circle className="h-4 w-4 shrink-0" />
                      ) : (
                        <Circle className="h-4 w-4 shrink-0" />
                      )}
                        <span className="leading-tight">{item}</span>
                    </div>
                  );
                })}
              </div>
            </motion.div>
          ) : !showResults ? (
            <motion.div
              key={currentQuestion.id}
              initial={{ opacity: 0, x: 20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
              exit={{ opacity: 0, x: -20 }}
              transition={{ type: "spring", stiffness: 300, damping: 30, mass: 1 }}
              className="w-full max-w-3xl min-h-[82vh] flex flex-col"
            >
              <div className="mb-5 flex items-center justify-between text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-500">
                <span>Progreso personalizado</span>
                <span>
                  Paso {currentStepNumber} de {totalSteps}
                </span>
              </div>

              <div className="mb-8 hidden md:flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
                {visibleQuestions.map((question, index) => {
                  const isDone = index < step;
                  const isCurrent = index === step;

                  return (
                    <div
                      key={question.id}
                      className={clsx(
                        "inline-flex items-center rounded-full border text-xs font-medium transition-colors",
                        isDone && "h-8 w-8 justify-center border-green-200 bg-green-50 text-green-700",
                        isCurrent && "h-8 gap-2 px-3 border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 text-blue-700",
                        !isDone && !isCurrent && "h-8 w-8 justify-center border-gray-200 bg-white text-gray-500",
                      )}
                    >
                      {isDone ? (
                        <CheckCircle2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                      ) : isCurrent ? (
                        <span className="text-[10px] font-semibold">{index + 1}</span>
                      ) : (
                        <span className="text-[10px] font-semibold">{index + 1}</span>
                      )}
                      {isCurrent && <span className="whitespace-nowrap">{question.title}</span>}
                    </div>
                  );
                })}
              </div>

              <div className="w-full bg-gray-100 h-1.5 rounded-full mb-8 md:mb-12 overflow-hidden">
                <motion.div
                  initial={{ width: `${((step + 1) / visibleQuestions.length) * 100}%` }}
                  animate={{ width: `${((step + 1) / visibleQuestions.length) * 100}%` }}
                  transition={{ duration: 0.4 }}
                  className="h-full bg-primary rounded-full"
                />
              </div>

              <div className="space-y-2 mb-6 text-center">
                <h1 className="text-2xl md:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tighter text-gray-900">{currentQuestion.title}</h1>
                {currentQuestion.subtitle && <p className="text-base md:text-lg text-gray-500">{currentQuestion.subtitle}</p>}
              </div>

              <div className="grid gap-2.5 grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 flex-1 content-start">
                {currentQuestion.options.map((option) => {
                  const selectedValue = answers[currentQuestion.id];
                  const isSelected = Array.isArray(selectedValue)
                    ? selectedValue.includes(option.value)
                    : selectedValue === option.value;

                  const Icon = ICON_MAP[option.value] || Circle;

                  return (
                    <button
                      key={option.value}
                      onClick={() => handleOptionSelect(option.value)}
                      className={clsx(
                        "relative p-4 md:p-5 min-h-[72px] rounded-2xl border-2 text-left transition-all duration-300 group hover:shadow-lg flex items-center gap-3 touch-manipulation",
                        isSelected ? "border-primary bg-primary text-primary-foreground" : "border-gray-100 bg-white hover:border-gray-300",
                      )}
                    >
                      <div className={clsx("p-2.5 rounded-full shrink-0", isSelected ? "bg-white/20" : "bg-gray-50 group-hover:bg-gray-100")}>
                        <Icon className={clsx("w-5 h-5", isSelected ? "text-white" : "text-gray-600")} />
                      </div>

                      <div className="flex-1">
                        <div className={clsx("font-bold text-base md:text-lg mb-0.5", isSelected ? "text-white" : "text-gray-900")}>{option.label}</div>
                        {option.description && (
                          <div className={clsx("text-xs opacity-90 font-medium leading-tight", isSelected ? "text-blue-100" : "text-gray-500")}>
                            {option.description}
                          </div>
                        )}
                      </div>

                      <div className="shrink-0 self-center">
                        {isSelected ? <CheckCircle2 className="w-6 h-6 text-white" /> : <Circle className="w-6 h-6 text-gray-300" />}
                      </div>
                    </button>
                  );
                })}
              </div>

              {currentQuestion.type === "multiple" && (
                <div className="sticky bottom-0 mt-4 z-20 bg-gradient-to-t from-white via-white/95 to-transparent pb-6 pt-6 px-4 -mx-4 md:mx-0 flex justify-center">
                  <button
                    onClick={goNext}
                    disabled={!canContinue}
                    className="w-full max-w-md bg-primary text-primary-foreground h-14 rounded-full font-bold text-base md:text-lg disabled:opacity-50 hover:scale-[1.02] transition-transform shadow-xl shadow-blue-200 touch-manipulation flex items-center justify-center safe-area-bottom-margin"
                  >
                    Continuar
                  </button>
                </div>
              )}

              {step > 0 && (
                <button onClick={goBack} className="mt-8 mx-auto flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-400 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:text-black transition-colors">
                  <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" /> Atrás
                </button>
              )}
            </motion.div>
          ) : (
            <motion.div
              initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
              transition={{ type: "spring", stiffness: 300, damping: 30, mass: 1 }}
              className="w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto py-12 px-4"
            >
              <div className="text-center mb-12 space-y-4">
                <span className="inline-flex items-center justify-center p-4 rounded-full bg-green-100 text-green-600 mb-4 shadow-sm">
                  <CheckCircle2 className="w-8 h-8" />
                </span>
                <h1 className="text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tighter text-gray-900">Protocolo personalizado</h1>
                <p className="text-xl text-gray-500 max-w-2xl mx-auto">Plan creado según tus objetivos, perfil y contexto diario.</p>
                <button onClick={resetSearch} className="text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400 hover:text-black transition-colors pt-2">
                  Repetir cuestionario
                </button>
              </div>

              {profileChips.length > 0 && (
                <div className="max-w-5xl mx-auto mb-10">
                  <div className="panel-soft">
                    <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900">Perfil evaluado</h2>
                    <div className="mt-4 flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                      {profileChips.map((chip) => (
                        <span key={chip} className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-700 bg-gray-100 border border-gray-200 px-3 py-1 rounded-full">
                          {chip}
                        </span>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}

              {protocolBlocks.length > 0 && (
                <div className="max-w-5xl mx-auto mb-10">
                  <div className="panel-soft">
                    <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500">Pautas del plan</p>
                    <div className="mt-3 flex flex-wrap gap-2.5">
                      {protocolBlocks.map((block) => (
                        <span
                          key={block.title}
                          title={block.text}
                          className="inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-gray-200 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium text-gray-700"
                        >
                          {block.title}
                        </span>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}

              {recommendations.length > 0 ? (
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8 items-start">
                  <div className="lg:col-span-2 space-y-8">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                      <span className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-primary text-primary-foreground font-bold text-sm">1</span>
                      <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold">Base diaria recomendada</h2>
                    </div>
                    <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-3xl p-8 md:p-12 relative overflow-hidden flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center gap-12 group hover:shadow-2xl transition-all duration-500 border border-gray-100">
                      <div className="relative z-10 flex-1 space-y-6">
                        <h3 className="text-4xl font-black tracking-tight">{recommendations[0].name}</h3>
                        <p className="text-lg text-gray-600 leading-relaxed">{recommendations[0].description || "Opcion principal para tu objetivo actual."}</p>
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-6 pt-4">
                          <Link href={`/products/${recommendations[0].slug}`} className="bg-primary text-primary-foreground px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-bold shadow-lg hover:bg-primary/90 hover:scale-105 transition-all">
                            Ver detalles
                          </Link>
                          <span className="text-2xl font-bold">{formatPrice(recommendations[0].price)}</span>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      <div className="w-64 h-64 relative mix-blend-multiply flex-shrink-0">
                        {recommendations[0].images?.[0] && <Image src={recommendations[0].images[0]} fill alt={recommendations[0].name} className="object-contain" />}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  <div className="space-y-8">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                      <span className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-gray-200 text-gray-900 font-bold text-sm">2</span>
                      <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold">Refuerzos</h2>
                    </div>
                    <div className="grid gap-6">
                      {recommendations.slice(1).map((product) => (
                        <Link href={`/products/${product.slug}`} key={product.id} className="group bg-white border border-gray-100 p-6 rounded-2xl flex items-center gap-6 hover:shadow-xl hover:border-primary/30 transition-all">
                          <div className="w-20 h-20 relative mix-blend-multiply bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-2">
                            {product.images?.[0] && <Image src={product.images[0]} fill alt={product.name} className="object-contain" />}
                          </div>
                          <div>
                            <h4 className="font-bold text-lg leading-tight group-hover:text-[#007AFF] transition-colors">{product.name}</h4>
                            <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-500 mt-1 block">{formatPrice(product.price)}</span>
                          </div>
                        </Link>
                      ))}

                      {recommendations.length < 2 && (
                        <div className="p-6 text-center text-gray-400 text-sm border border-dashed rounded-2xl">No hay más refuerzos específicos para este perfil.</div>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              ) : (
                <div className="text-center py-20 bg-gray-50 rounded-3xl">
                  <Search className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto text-gray-300 mb-4" />
                  <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">Sin resultados exactos</h3>
                  <p className="text-gray-500 mt-2">Ajusta respuestas para conseguir un plan más preciso.</p>
                  <button onClick={resetSearch} className="mt-6 text-black font-bold underline">
                    Reintentar
                  </button>
                </div>
              )}
            </motion.div>
          )}
        </AnimatePresence>
      </main>
    </div>
  );
}

type AnswerValue = string | Array<string>;

interface QuestionOption {
  label: string;
  value: string;
  description?: string;
}

interface Question {

  subtitle?: string;
  type: "single" | "multiple";

}

function hasGoal(answers: Answers, goal: string): boolean {
  const mainGoal = typeof answers.main_goal === "string" ? answers.main_goal : "";
  const secondary = Array.isArray(answers.secondary_goals) ? answers.secondary_goals : [];
  return mainGoal === goal || secondary.includes(goal);
}
