  },
  {
    id: "symptoms",
    title: "Síntomas actuales",
    subtitle: "Selecciona lo que más notas en esta etapa.",
    type: "multiple",
    minSelection: 1,
    options: [
      { label: "Cansancio", value: "cansancio" },
      { label: "Estrés alto", value: "estres_alto" },
      { label: "Sueño ligero", value: "sueno_ligero" },
      { label: "Digestión pesada", value: "digestion_pesada" },
      { label: "Defensas bajas", value: "defensas_bajas" },
      { label: "Dolor articular", value: "dolor_articular" },
      { label: "Piel/cabello", value: "piel_cabello" },
      { label: "Niebla mental", value: "niebla_mental" },
      { label: "Ninguno en particular", value: "ninguno" },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: "dietary_preferences",
    title: "Preferencias dietarias",
    subtitle: "Opcional: filtramos por compatibilidad.",
    type: "multiple",
    options: [
      { label: "Vegano", value: "vegano" },
      { label: "Sin gluten", value: "sin_gluten" },
      { label: "Sin lactosa", value: "sin_lactosa" },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: "format_preference",
    title: "Formato preferido",
    subtitle: "Elige formatos que realmente usarías.",
    type: "multiple",
    minSelection: 1,
    options: [
      { label: "Cápsulas", value: "capsulas" },
      { label: "Polvo", value: "polvo" },
      { label: "Bebida", value: "bebida" },
      { label: "Gomitas", value: "gomitas" },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: "budget",
    title: "Rango de presupuesto",
    subtitle: "Mostraremos opciones realistas para ti.",
    type: "single",
    options: [
      { label: "Ajustado", value: "ajustado" },
      { label: "Medio", value: "medio" },
      { label: "Alto", value: "alto" },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: "adherence",
    title: "Compromiso de seguimiento",
    subtitle: "Define la complejidad del plan.",
    type: "single",
    options: [
      { label: "Bajo (quiero algo muy simple)", value: "bajo" },
      { label: "Moderado", value: "moderado" },
      { label: "Alto (puedo seguir plan completo)", value: "alto" },
    ],
  },
];

function getOptionLabel(questionId: string, value: string): string {
  const question = QUESTIONS.find((item) => item.id === questionId);
  if (!question) return value;
  const option = question.options.find((item) => item.value === value);
  return option?.label || value;
}

export default function SmartSearchPage() {
  const [products, setProducts] = useState<Array<Product>>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [step, setStep] = useState(0);
  const [answers, setAnswers] = useState<Answers>({});
  const [showResults, setShowResults] = useState(false);
  const [isAnalyzing, setIsAnalyzing] = useState(false);
  const [recommendations, setRecommendations] = useState<Array<Product>>([]);
  const [protocolBlocks, setProtocolBlocks] = useState<Array<{ title: string; text: string }>>([]);
  const [analysisStage, setAnalysisStage] = useState(0);

  useEffect(() => {
    const loadData = async () => {
      try {
        const productData = await ProductService.getAllProducts();
        setProducts(productData);
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("Error loading products:", error);
      } finally {
        setLoading(false);
      }
    };

    loadData();
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isAnalyzing) return;

    const timer = setInterval(() => {
      setAnalysisStage((prev) => (prev < 2 ? prev + 1 : prev));
    }, 500);

    return () => clearInterval(timer);
  }, [isAnalyzing]);

  const visibleQuestions = useMemo(
    () => QUESTIONS.filter((question) => (question.showIf ? question.showIf(answers) : true)),
    [answers],
  );

  useEffect(() => {
    if (step >= visibleQuestions.length) {
      setStep(Math.max(0, visibleQuestions.length - 1));
    }
  }, [step, visibleQuestions.length]);

  const currentQuestion = visibleQuestions[step];
  const totalSteps = visibleQuestions.length;
  const currentStepNumber = step + 1;

  const canContinue = useMemo(() => {
    const value = answers[currentQuestion.id];
    if (!value) return false;
    if (currentQuestion.type === "single") return typeof value === "string" && value.length > 0;
    if (!Array.isArray(value)) return false;
    if (currentQuestion.minSelection) return value.length >= currentQuestion.minSelection;
    return value.length > 0;
  }, [answers, currentQuestion]);

  const handleOptionSelect = (value: string) => {
    if (currentQuestion.type === "single") {
      const updated = { ...answers, [currentQuestion.id]: value };
      setAnswers(updated);
      if (step < visibleQuestions.length - 1) {
        setStep((prev) => prev + 1);
      } else {
        void finishSearch(updated);
      }
      return;
    }

    const val = answers[currentQuestion.id];
    const current = Array.isArray(val) ? val : [];
    let nextValues = current.includes(value)
      ? current.filter((entry) => entry !== value)
      : [...current, value];

    if (currentQuestion.id === "symptoms") {
      if (value === "ninguno") {
        nextValues = ["ninguno"];
      } else {
        nextValues = nextValues.filter((entry) => entry !== "ninguno");
      }
    }

    if (currentQuestion.id === "secondary_goals" && nextValues.length > 3) {
      nextValues = nextValues.slice(nextValues.length - 3);
    }

    setAnswers((prev) => ({ ...prev, [currentQuestion.id]: nextValues }));
  };

  const goNext = () => {
    if (!canContinue) return;
    if (step < visibleQuestions.length - 1) {
      setStep((prev) => prev + 1);
      return;
    }
    void finishSearch(answers);
  };

  const goBack = () => {
    setStep((prev) => Math.max(0, prev - 1));
  };

  const finishSearch = async (finalAnswers: Answers) => {
    setIsAnalyzing(true);
    setAnalysisStage(0);

    const goalValues = [
      typeof finalAnswers.main_goal === "string" ? finalAnswers.main_goal : "",
      ...(Array.isArray(finalAnswers.secondary_goals) ? finalAnswers.secondary_goals : []),
    ].filter(Boolean);

    const symptomValues = (Array.isArray(finalAnswers.symptoms) ? finalAnswers.symptoms : []).filter(
      (entry) => entry !== "ninguno",
    );

    try {
      const response = await fetch("/api/recommend", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          symptoms: symptomValues,
          goals: goalValues,
          answers: finalAnswers,
        }),
      });

      if (response.ok) {
        const data = await response.json();
        setRecommendations(Array.isArray(data?.products) ? data.products.slice(0, 3) : []);
        setProtocolBlocks(Array.isArray(data?.blocks) ? data.blocks.slice(0, 3) : []);
      } else {
        setRecommendations(products.slice(0, 3));
        setProtocolBlocks([]);
      }
    } catch {
      setRecommendations(products.slice(0, 3));
      setProtocolBlocks([]);
    } finally {
      setTimeout(() => {
        setIsAnalyzing(false);
        setShowResults(true);
      }, 1000);
    }
  };

  const resetSearch = () => {
    setStep(0);
    setAnswers({});
    setShowResults(false);
    setRecommendations([]);
    setProtocolBlocks([]);
  };

  const profileChips = useMemo(() => {
    const chips: Array<string> = [];

    if (typeof answers.age_range === "string") chips.push(getOptionLabel("age_range", answers.age_range));
    if (typeof answers.profile === "string") chips.push(getOptionLabel("profile", answers.profile));
    if (typeof answers.main_goal === "string") chips.push(getOptionLabel("main_goal", answers.main_goal));

    const secondary = Array.isArray(answers.secondary_goals) ? answers.secondary_goals : [];
    secondary.forEach((item) => chips.push(getOptionLabel("secondary_goals", String(item))));

    return chips;
  }, [answers]);

  if (loading) return null;

  const analysisSteps = ["Validando perfil", "Ajustando objetivos", "Generando plan final"];

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen flex flex-col">
      <main className="flex-1 flex items-center justify-center relative p-6 mt-16 md:mt-0">
        <AnimatePresence mode="wait">
          {isAnalyzing ? (
            <motion.div
              key="analyzing"
              initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1 }}
              exit={{ opacity: 0, scale: 1.05 }}
              transition={{ type: "spring", stiffness: 300, damping: 30, mass: 1 }}
              className="text-center w-full max-w-md"
            >
              <div className="relative w-24 h-24 mx-auto mb-8">
                <motion.div
                  animate={{ rotate: 360 }}
                  transition={{ duration: 3, repeat: Infinity, ease: "linear" }}
                  className="absolute inset-0 border-4 border-muted rounded-full"
                />
                <motion.div
                  animate={{ rotate: 360 }}
                  transition={{ duration: 1.5, repeat: Infinity, ease: "linear" }}
                  className="absolute inset-0 border-4 border-t-primary border-r-transparent border-b-transparent border-l-transparent rounded-full"
                />
                <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center">
                  <Sparkles className="w-8 h-8 text-primary" />
                </div>
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-foreground tracking-tight">Personalizando tu protocolo...</h2>
              <p className="text-muted-foreground mt-3 text-lg">Cruzando edad, objetivos, síntomas y estilo de vida con el catálogo.</p>

              <div className="mt-8 mx-auto w-full max-w-sm space-y-2.5 text-left">
                {analysisSteps.map((item, index) => {
                  const done = index < analysisStage;
                  const current = index === analysisStage;

                  return (
                    <div
                      key={item}
                      className={clsx(
                        "flex items-center gap-3 rounded-lg border px-3 py-2.5 text-sm",
                        done
                          ? "border-success/20 bg-success/10 text-success"
                          : current
                            ? "border-primary/20 bg-primary/10 text-primary"
                            : "border-border bg-card text-muted-foreground",
                      )}
                    >
                      {done ? (
                        <CheckCircle2 className="h-4 w-4 shrink-0" />
                      ) : current ? (
                        <Circle className="h-4 w-4 shrink-0" />
                      ) : (
                        <Circle className="h-4 w-4 shrink-0" />
                      )}
                      <span className="leading-tight">{item}</span>
                    </div>
                  );
                })}
              </div>
            </motion.div>
          ) : !showResults ? (
            <motion.div
              key={currentQuestion.id}
              initial={{ opacity: 0, x: 20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
              exit={{ opacity: 0, x: -20 }}
              transition={{ type: "spring", stiffness: 300, damping: 30, mass: 1 }}
              className="w-full max-w-3xl min-h-[82vh] flex flex-col"
            >
              <div className="mb-5 flex items-center justify-between text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground">
                <span>Progreso personalizado</span>
                <span>
                  Paso {currentStepNumber} de {totalSteps}
                </span>
              </div>

              <div className="mb-8 hidden md:flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
                {visibleQuestions.map((question, index) => {
                  const isDone = index < step;
                  const isCurrent = index === step;

                  return (
                    <div
                      key={question.id}
                      className={clsx(
                        "inline-flex items-center rounded-full border text-xs font-medium transition-colors",
                        isDone && "h-8 w-8 justify-center border-success/20 bg-success/10 text-success",
                        isCurrent && "h-8 gap-2 px-3 border-primary/20 bg-primary/10 text-primary",
                        !isDone && !isCurrent && "h-8 w-8 justify-center border-border bg-card text-muted-foreground",
                      )}
                    >
                      {isDone ? (
                        <CheckCircle2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                      ) : isCurrent ? (
                        <span className="text-[10px] font-semibold">{index + 1}</span>
                      ) : (
                        <span className="text-[10px] font-semibold">{index + 1}</span>
                      )}
                      {isCurrent && <span className="whitespace-nowrap">{question.title}</span>}
                    </div>
                  );
                })}
              </div>

              <div className="w-full bg-muted h-1.5 rounded-full mb-8 md:mb-12 overflow-hidden">
                <motion.div
                  initial={{ width: `${((step + 1) / visibleQuestions.length) * 100}%` }}
                  animate={{ width: `${((step + 1) / visibleQuestions.length) * 100}%` }}
                  transition={{ duration: 0.4 }}
                  className="h-full bg-primary rounded-full"
                />
              </div>

              <div className="space-y-2 mb-6 text-center">
                <h1 className="text-xl sm:text-2xl md:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tighter text-foreground">{currentQuestion.title}</h1>
                {currentQuestion.subtitle && <p className="text-base md:text-lg text-muted-foreground">{currentQuestion.subtitle}</p>}
              </div>

              <div className="grid gap-2.5 grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 flex-1 content-start">
                {currentQuestion.options.map((option) => {
                  const selectedValue = answers[currentQuestion.id];
                  const isSelected = Array.isArray(selectedValue)
                    ? selectedValue.includes(option.value)
                    : selectedValue === option.value;

                  const Icon = ICON_MAP[option.value] || Circle;

                  return (
                    <button
                      key={option.value}
                      onClick={() => handleOptionSelect(option.value)}
                      className={clsx(
                        "relative p-4 md:p-5 min-h-18 rounded-2xl border-2 text-left transition-all duration-300 group hover:shadow-lg flex items-center gap-3 touch-manipulation",
                        isSelected ? "border-primary bg-primary text-primary-foreground" : "border-border bg-card hover:border-input",
                      )}
                    >
                      <div className={clsx("p-2.5 rounded-full shrink-0", isSelected ? "bg-white/20" : "bg-muted group-hover:bg-muted/80")}>
                        <Icon className={clsx("w-5 h-5", isSelected ? "text-primary-foreground" : "text-muted-foreground")} />
                      </div>

                      <div className="flex-1">
                        <div className={clsx("font-bold text-base md:text-lg mb-0.5", isSelected ? "text-primary-foreground" : "text-foreground")}>{option.label}</div>
                        {option.description && (
                          <div className={clsx("text-xs opacity-90 font-medium leading-tight", isSelected ? "text-primary-foreground/80" : "text-muted-foreground")}>
                            {option.description}
                          </div>
                        )}
                      </div>

                      <div className="shrink-0 self-center">
                        {isSelected ? <CheckCircle2 className="w-6 h-6 text-primary-foreground" /> : <Circle className="w-6 h-6 text-muted-foreground/30" />}
                      </div>
                    </button>
                  );
                })}
              </div>

              {currentQuestion.type === "multiple" && (
                <div className="sticky bottom-0 mt-4 z-20 bg-linear-to-t from-background via-background/95 to-transparent pb-6 pt-6 px-4 -mx-4 md:mx-0 flex justify-center">
                  <button
                    onClick={goNext}
                    disabled={!canContinue}
                    className="w-full max-w-md bg-primary text-primary-foreground h-14 rounded-full font-bold text-base md:text-lg disabled:opacity-50 hover:scale-[1.02] transition-transform shadow-xl shadow-primary/20 touch-manipulation flex items-center justify-center safe-area-bottom-margin"
                  >
                    Continuar
                  </button>
                </div>
              )}

              {step > 0 && (
                <button onClick={goBack} className="mt-8 mx-auto flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-muted-foreground font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:text-foreground transition-colors">
                  <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" /> Atrás
                </button>
              )}
            </motion.div>
          ) : (
            <motion.div
              initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
              transition={{ type: "spring", stiffness: 300, damping: 30, mass: 1 }}
              className="w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto py-12 px-4"
            >
              <div className="text-center mb-12 space-y-4">
                <span className="inline-flex items-center justify-center p-4 rounded-full bg-success/10 text-success mb-4 shadow-sm">
                  <CheckCircle2 className="w-8 h-8" />
                </span>
                <h1 className="text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tighter text-foreground">Protocolo personalizado</h1>
                <p className="text-xl text-muted-foreground max-w-2xl mx-auto">Plan creado según tus objetivos, perfil y contexto diario.</p>
                <button onClick={resetSearch} className="text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground transition-colors pt-2">
                  Repetir cuestionario
                </button>
              </div>

              {profileChips.length > 0 && (
                <div className="max-w-5xl mx-auto mb-10">
                  <div className="panel-soft">
                    <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-foreground">Perfil evaluado</h2>
                    <div className="mt-4 flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                      {profileChips.map((chip) => (
                        <span key={chip} className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground bg-muted border border-border px-3 py-1 rounded-full">
                          {chip}
                        </span>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}

              {protocolBlocks.length > 0 && (
                <div className="max-w-5xl mx-auto mb-10">
                  <div className="panel-soft">
                    <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-widest text-muted-foreground">Pautas del plan</p>
                    <div className="mt-3 flex flex-wrap gap-2.5">
                      {protocolBlocks.map((block) => (
                        <span
                          key={block.title}
                          title={block.text}
                          className="inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-border bg-card px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground"
                        >
                          {block.title}
                        </span>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}

              {recommendations.length > 0 ? (
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 lg:gap-8 items-start">
                  <div className="lg:col-span-2 space-y-8">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                      <span className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-primary text-primary-foreground font-bold text-sm">1</span>
                      <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold">Base diaria recomendada</h2>
                    </div>
                    <div className="bg-muted/40 rounded-2xl md:rounded-3xl p-6 md:p-12 relative overflow-hidden flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center gap-6 md:gap-12 group hover:shadow-2xl transition-all duration-500 border border-border">
                      <div className="relative z-10 flex-1 space-y-6">
                        <h3 className="text-2xl md:text-4xl font-black tracking-tight text-balance">{recommendations[0].name}</h3>
                        <p className="text-base md:text-lg text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed text-balance">{recommendations[0].description || "Opción principal para tu objetivo actual."}</p>
                        <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center gap-4 sm:gap-6 pt-4 w-full sm:w-auto">
                          <Link href="/products/$slug" params={{ slug: recommendations[0].slug }} className="bg-primary text-primary-foreground px-6 md:px-8 py-3.5 md:py-4 rounded-full font-bold shadow-lg hover:bg-primary/90 hover:scale-105 transition-all text-center w-full sm:w-auto">
                            Ver detalles
                          </Link>
                          <span className="text-xl md:text-2xl font-bold">{formatPrice(recommendations[0].price)}</span>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      <div className="w-40 h-40 md:w-64 md:h-64 relative mix-blend-multiply shrink-0">
                        {recommendations[0].images[0] && <img src={recommendations[0].images[0]} alt={recommendations[0].name} className="object-contain w-full h-full" />}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  <div className="space-y-8">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                      <span className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-muted text-foreground font-bold text-sm">2</span>
                      <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold">Refuerzos</h2>
                    </div>
                    <div className="grid gap-6">
                      {recommendations.slice(1).map((product) => (
                        <Link href="/products/$slug" params={{ slug: product.slug }} key={product.id} className="group bg-card border border-border p-6 rounded-2xl flex items-center gap-6 hover:shadow-xl hover:border-primary/30 transition-all">
                          <div className="w-20 h-20 relative mix-blend-multiply bg-muted rounded-lg p-2">
                            {product.images[0] && <img src={product.images[0]} alt={product.name} className="object-contain w-full h-full" />}
                          </div>
                          <div>
                            <h4 className="font-bold text-lg leading-tight group-hover:text-primary transition-colors">{product.name}</h4>
                            <span className="text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground mt-1 block">{formatPrice(product.price)}</span>
                          </div>
                        </Link>
                      ))}

                      {recommendations.length < 2 && (
                        <div className="p-6 text-center text-muted-foreground/60 text-sm border border-dashed rounded-2xl">No hay más refuerzos específicos para este perfil.</div>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              ) : (
                <div className="text-center py-20 bg-muted rounded-3xl">
                  <Search className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto text-muted-foreground/50 mb-4" />
                  <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-foreground">Sin resultados exactos</h3>
                  <p className="text-muted-foreground mt-2">Ajusta respuestas para conseguir un plan más preciso.</p>
                  <button onClick={resetSearch} className="mt-6 text-foreground font-bold underline">
                    Reintentar
                  </button>
                </div>
              )}
            </motion.div>
          )}
        </AnimatePresence>
      </main>
    </div>
  );
}

import { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from "react";
import Link from "next/link";
import * as motion from "motion/react-client";
import { AnimatePresence } from "motion/react";
import clsx from "clsx";
import {
  Activity,
  AlertCircle,
  ArrowLeft,
  Battery,
  Brain,
  CheckCircle2,
  Circle,
  Clock3,
  Coffee,
  Dumbbell,
  Heart,
  Leaf,
  Moon,
  Search,
  Shield,
  Smile,
  Sparkles,
  Sun,
  User,
  Utensils,
  Zap,
} from "lucide-react";
import type { ComponentType } from "react";
import type { Product } from "@/types";
import { formatPrice } from "@/lib/utils";
import { ProductService } from "@/services/productService";

type AnswerValue = string | Array<string>;
type Answers = Record<string, AnswerValue>;

interface QuestionOption {
  label: string;
  value: string;
  description?: string;
}

interface Question {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  subtitle?: string;
  type: "single" | "multiple";
  options: Array<QuestionOption>;
  showIf?: (answers: Answers) => boolean;
  minSelection?: number;
}

const ICON_MAP: Record<string, ComponentType<{ className?: string }> | undefined> = {
  hombre: User,
  mujer: User,
  senior: User,
  embarazo_posparto: Heart,
  energia: Zap,
  sueno: Moon,
  estres: Smile,
  digestion: Utensils,
  defensas: Shield,
  belleza: Sparkles,
  articulaciones: Activity,
  deporte: Dumbbell,
  metabolismo: Leaf,
  estable: Sun,
  cansancio_manana: Coffee,
  bajon_tarde: Battery,
  agotado_noche: Moon,
  sedentario: Clock3,
  activo: Activity,
  deportista: Dumbbell,
  alto_estres: AlertCircle,
  cansancio: Battery,
  estres_alto: AlertCircle,
  sueno_ligero: Moon,
  digestion_pesada: Utensils,
  defensas_bajas: Shield,
  dolor_articular: Activity,
  piel_cabello: Sparkles,
  niebla_mental: Brain,
  ninguno: CheckCircle2,
  vegano: Leaf,
  sin_gluten: Shield,
  sin_lactosa: Shield,
  capsulas: Activity,
  polvo: Sparkles,
  bebida: Utensils,
  gomitas: Smile,
  conciliacion: Moon,
  despertares: Moon,
  no_reparador: Moon,
  hinchazon: Utensils,
  lentitud: Utensils,
  sensibilidad: AlertCircle,
  transito_irregular: Activity,
  baja: Activity,
  media: Dumbbell,
  alta: Dumbbell,
  competicion: Zap,
};

function hasGoal(answers: Answers, goal: string): boolean {
  const mainGoal = typeof answers.main_goal === "string" ? answers.main_goal : "";
  const secondary = Array.isArray(answers.secondary_goals) ? answers.secondary_goals : [];
  return mainGoal === goal || secondary.includes(goal);
}

const QUESTIONS: Array<Question> = [
  {
    id: "age_range",
    title: "Edad y etapa de vida",
    subtitle: "Nos ayuda a ajustar intensidad y prioridades.",
    type: "single",
    options: [
      { label: "14-17", value: "14-17" },
      { label: "18-25", value: "18-25" },
      { label: "26-39", value: "26-39" },
      { label: "40-64", value: "40-64" },
      { label: "65+", value: "65+" },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: "profile",
    title: "Perfil principal",

    type: "single",

      { label: "Hombre", value: "hombre" },

      { label: "Energía", value: "energia" },
      { label: "Sueño", value: "sueno" },
      { label: "Estrés", value: "estres" },

      { label: "Defensas", value: "defensas" },

  },
  {
    id: "sleep_context",

    subtitle: "Pregunta adaptada a tus objetivos.",
    type: "single",
    showIf: (answers) => hasGoal(answers, "sueno") || hasGoal(answers, "estres"),
    options: [
      { label: "Me cuesta conciliar el sueño", value: "conciliacion" },
      { label: "Me despierto varias veces", value: "despertares" },
      { label: "Duermo, pero no descanso", value: "no_reparador" },
      { label: "No es un problema principal", value: "estable" },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: "digestion_context",
    title: "Contexto digestivo",
    subtitle: "Pregunta adaptada a tus objetivos.",
    type: "single",
    showIf: (answers) => hasGoal(answers, "digestion") || hasGoal(answers, "metabolismo"),
    options: [
      { label: "Hinchazón frecuente", value: "hinchazon" },
      { label: "Lentitud digestiva", value: "lentitud" },
      { label: "Sensibilidad a comidas", value: "sensibilidad" },
      { label: "Tránsito irregular", value: "transito_irregular" },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: "training_load",
    title: "Carga de entrenamiento",
    subtitle: "Pregunta adaptada a tus objetivos.",
    type: "single",
    showIf: (answers) => hasGoal(answers, "deporte"),
    options: [
      { label: "1-2 días por semana", value: "baja" },
      { label: "3-4 días por semana", value: "media" },
      { label: "5+ días por semana", value: "alta" },

  {

      { label: "Cápsulas", value: "capsulas" },

  {
    id: "adherence",

    type: "single",
    options: [
      { label: "Bajo (quiero algo muy simple)", value: "bajo" },
      { label: "Moderado", value: "moderado" },
      { label: "Alto (puedo seguir plan completo)", value: "alto" },
    ],
  },
];

function getOptionLabel(questionId: string, value: string): string {
  const question = QUESTIONS.find((item) => item.id === questionId);
  if (!question) return value;
  const option = question.options.find((item) => item.value === value);
  return option?.label || value;
}

export default function SmartSearchPage() {
  const [products, setProducts] = useState<Array<Product>>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [step, setStep] = useState(0);
  const [answers, setAnswers] = useState<Answers>({});
  const [showResults, setShowResults] = useState(false);
  const [isAnalyzing, setIsAnalyzing] = useState(false);
  const [recommendations, setRecommendations] = useState<Array<Product>>([]);
  const [protocolBlocks, setProtocolBlocks] = useState<Array<{ title: string; text: string }>>([]);
  const [analysisStage, setAnalysisStage] = useState(0);

  useEffect(() => {
    const loadData = async () => {
      try {
        const productData = await ProductService.getAllProducts();
        setProducts(productData);
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("Error loading products:", error);
      } finally {
        setLoading(false);
      }
    };

    loadData();
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isAnalyzing) return;

    const timer = setInterval(() => {
      setAnalysisStage((prev) => (prev < 2 ? prev + 1 : prev));
    }, 500);

    return () => clearInterval(timer);
  }, [isAnalyzing]);

  const visibleQuestions = useMemo(
    () => QUESTIONS.filter((question) => (question.showIf ? question.showIf(answers) : true)),
    [answers],
  );

  useEffect(() => {
    if (step >= visibleQuestions.length) {
      setStep(Math.max(0, visibleQuestions.length - 1));
    }
  }, [step, visibleQuestions.length]);

  const currentQuestion = visibleQuestions[step];
  const totalSteps = visibleQuestions.length;
  const currentStepNumber = step + 1;

  const canContinue = useMemo(() => {
    const value = answers[currentQuestion.id];
    if (!value) return false;
    if (currentQuestion.type === "single") return typeof value === "string" && value.length > 0;
    if (!Array.isArray(value)) return false;
    if (currentQuestion.minSelection) return value.length >= currentQuestion.minSelection;
    return value.length > 0;
  }, [answers, currentQuestion]);

  const handleOptionSelect = (value: string) => {
    if (currentQuestion.type === "single") {
      const updated = { ...answers, [currentQuestion.id]: value };
      setAnswers(updated);
      if (step < visibleQuestions.length - 1) {
        setStep((prev) => prev + 1);
      } else {
        void finishSearch(updated);
      }
      return;
    }

    const val = answers[currentQuestion.id];
    const current = Array.isArray(val) ? val : [];
    let nextValues = current.includes(value)
      ? current.filter((entry) => entry !== value)
      : [...current, value];

    if (currentQuestion.id === "symptoms") {
      if (value === "ninguno") {
        nextValues = ["ninguno"];
      } else {
        nextValues = nextValues.filter((entry) => entry !== "ninguno");
      }
    }

    if (currentQuestion.id === "secondary_goals" && nextValues.length > 3) {
      nextValues = nextValues.slice(nextValues.length - 3);
    }

    setAnswers((prev) => ({ ...prev, [currentQuestion.id]: nextValues }));
  };

  const goNext = () => {
    if (!canContinue) return;
    if (step < visibleQuestions.length - 1) {
      setStep((prev) => prev + 1);
      return;
    }
    void finishSearch(answers);
  };

  const goBack = () => {
    setStep((prev) => Math.max(0, prev - 1));
  };

  const finishSearch = async (finalAnswers: Answers) => {
    setIsAnalyzing(true);
    setAnalysisStage(0);

    const goalValues = [
      typeof finalAnswers.main_goal === "string" ? finalAnswers.main_goal : "",
      ...(Array.isArray(finalAnswers.secondary_goals) ? finalAnswers.secondary_goals : []),
    ].filter(Boolean);

    const symptomValues = (Array.isArray(finalAnswers.symptoms) ? finalAnswers.symptoms : []).filter(
      (entry) => entry !== "ninguno",
    );

    try {
      const response = await fetch("/api/recommend", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          symptoms: symptomValues,
          goals: goalValues,
          answers: finalAnswers,
        }),
      });

      if (response.ok) {
        const data = await response.json();
        setRecommendations(Array.isArray(data?.products) ? data.products.slice(0, 3) : []);
        setProtocolBlocks(Array.isArray(data?.blocks) ? data.blocks.slice(0, 3) : []);
      } else {
        setRecommendations(products.slice(0, 3));
        setProtocolBlocks([]);
      }
    } catch {
      setRecommendations(products.slice(0, 3));
      setProtocolBlocks([]);
    } finally {
      setTimeout(() => {
        setIsAnalyzing(false);
        setShowResults(true);
      }, 1000);
    }
  };

  const resetSearch = () => {
    setStep(0);
    setAnswers({});
    setShowResults(false);
    setRecommendations([]);
    setProtocolBlocks([]);
  };

  const profileChips = useMemo(() => {
    const chips: Array<string> = [];

    if (typeof answers.age_range === "string") chips.push(getOptionLabel("age_range", answers.age_range));
    if (typeof answers.profile === "string") chips.push(getOptionLabel("profile", answers.profile));
    if (typeof answers.main_goal === "string") chips.push(getOptionLabel("main_goal", answers.main_goal));

    const secondary = Array.isArray(answers.secondary_goals) ? answers.secondary_goals : [];
    secondary.forEach((item) => chips.push(getOptionLabel("secondary_goals", String(item))));

    return chips;
  }, [answers]);

  if (loading) return null;

  const analysisSteps = ["Validando perfil", "Ajustando objetivos", "Generando plan final"];

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen flex flex-col">
      <main className="flex-1 flex items-center justify-center relative p-6 mt-16 md:mt-0">
        <AnimatePresence mode="wait">
          {isAnalyzing ? (
            <motion.div
              key="analyzing"
              initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1 }}
              exit={{ opacity: 0, scale: 1.05 }}
              transition={{ type: "spring", stiffness: 300, damping: 30, mass: 1 }}
              className="text-center w-full max-w-md"
            >
              <div className="relative w-24 h-24 mx-auto mb-8">
                <motion.div
                  animate={{ rotate: 360 }}
                  transition={{ duration: 3, repeat: Infinity, ease: "linear" }}
                  className="absolute inset-0 border-4 border-muted rounded-full"
                />
                <motion.div
                  animate={{ rotate: 360 }}
                  transition={{ duration: 1.5, repeat: Infinity, ease: "linear" }}
                  className="absolute inset-0 border-4 border-t-primary border-r-transparent border-b-transparent border-l-transparent rounded-full"
                />
                <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center">
                  <Sparkles className="w-8 h-8 text-primary" />
                </div>
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-foreground tracking-tight">Personalizando tu protocolo...</h2>
              <p className="text-muted-foreground mt-3 text-lg">Cruzando edad, objetivos, síntomas y estilo de vida con el catálogo.</p>

              <div className="mt-8 mx-auto w-full max-w-sm space-y-2.5 text-left">
                {analysisSteps.map((item, index) => {
                  const done = index < analysisStage;
                  const current = index === analysisStage;

                  return (
                    <div
                      key={item}
                      className={clsx(
                        "flex items-center gap-3 rounded-lg border px-3 py-2.5 text-sm",
                        done
                          ? "border-success/20 bg-success/10 text-success"
                          : current
                            ? "border-primary/20 bg-primary/10 text-primary"
                            : "border-border bg-card text-muted-foreground",
                      )}
                    >
                      {done ? (
                        <CheckCircle2 className="h-4 w-4 shrink-0" />
                      ) : current ? (
                        <Circle className="h-4 w-4 shrink-0" />
                      ) : (
                        <Circle className="h-4 w-4 shrink-0" />
                      )}
                      <span className="leading-tight">{item}</span>
                    </div>
                  );
                })}
              </div>
            </motion.div>
          ) : !showResults ? (
            <motion.div
              key={currentQuestion.id}
              initial={{ opacity: 0, x: 20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
              exit={{ opacity: 0, x: -20 }}
              transition={{ type: "spring", stiffness: 300, damping: 30, mass: 1 }}
              className="w-full max-w-3xl min-h-[82vh] flex flex-col"
            >
              <div className="mb-5 flex items-center justify-between text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground">
                <span>Progreso personalizado</span>
                <span>
                  Paso {currentStepNumber} de {totalSteps}
                </span>
              </div>

              <div className="mb-8 hidden md:flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
                {visibleQuestions.map((question, index) => {
                  const isDone = index < step;
                  const isCurrent = index === step;

                  return (
                    <div
                      key={question.id}
                      className={clsx(
                        "inline-flex items-center rounded-full border text-xs font-medium transition-colors",
                        isDone && "h-8 w-8 justify-center border-success/20 bg-success/10 text-success",
                        isCurrent && "h-8 gap-2 px-3 border-primary/20 bg-primary/10 text-primary",
                        !isDone && !isCurrent && "h-8 w-8 justify-center border-border bg-card text-muted-foreground",
                      )}
                    >
                      {isDone ? (
                        <CheckCircle2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                      ) : isCurrent ? (
                        <span className="text-[10px] font-semibold">{index + 1}</span>
                      ) : (
                        <span className="text-[10px] font-semibold">{index + 1}</span>
                      )}
                      {isCurrent && <span className="whitespace-nowrap">{question.title}</span>}
                    </div>
                  );
                })}
              </div>

              <div className="w-full bg-muted h-1.5 rounded-full mb-8 md:mb-12 overflow-hidden">
                <motion.div
                  initial={{ width: `${((step + 1) / visibleQuestions.length) * 100}%` }}
                  animate={{ width: `${((step + 1) / visibleQuestions.length) * 100}%` }}
                  transition={{ duration: 0.4 }}
                  className="h-full bg-primary rounded-full"
                />
              </div>

              <div className="space-y-2 mb-6 text-center">
                <h1 className="text-xl sm:text-2xl md:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tighter text-foreground">{currentQuestion.title}</h1>
                {currentQuestion.subtitle && <p className="text-base md:text-lg text-muted-foreground">{currentQuestion.subtitle}</p>}
              </div>

              <div className="grid gap-2.5 grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 flex-1 content-start">
                {currentQuestion.options.map((option) => {
                  const selectedValue = answers[currentQuestion.id];
                  const isSelected = Array.isArray(selectedValue)
                    ? selectedValue.includes(option.value)
                    : selectedValue === option.value;

                  const Icon = ICON_MAP[option.value] || Circle;

                  return (
                    <button
                      key={option.value}
                      onClick={() => handleOptionSelect(option.value)}
                      className={clsx(
                        "relative p-4 md:p-5 min-h-18 rounded-2xl border-2 text-left transition-all duration-300 group hover:shadow-lg flex items-center gap-3 touch-manipulation",
                        isSelected ? "border-primary bg-primary text-primary-foreground" : "border-border bg-card hover:border-input",
                      )}
                    >
                      <div className={clsx("p-2.5 rounded-full shrink-0", isSelected ? "bg-white/20" : "bg-muted group-hover:bg-muted/80")}>
                        <Icon className={clsx("w-5 h-5", isSelected ? "text-primary-foreground" : "text-muted-foreground")} />
                      </div>

                      <div className="flex-1">
                        <div className={clsx("font-bold text-base md:text-lg mb-0.5", isSelected ? "text-primary-foreground" : "text-foreground")}>{option.label}</div>
                        {option.description && (
                          <div className={clsx("text-xs opacity-90 font-medium leading-tight", isSelected ? "text-primary-foreground/80" : "text-muted-foreground")}>
                            {option.description}
                          </div>
                        )}
                      </div>

                      <div className="shrink-0 self-center">
                        {isSelected ? <CheckCircle2 className="w-6 h-6 text-primary-foreground" /> : <Circle className="w-6 h-6 text-muted-foreground/30" />}
                      </div>
                    </button>
                  );
                })}
              </div>

              {currentQuestion.type === "multiple" && (
                <div className="sticky bottom-0 mt-4 z-20 bg-linear-to-t from-background via-background/95 to-transparent pb-6 pt-6 px-4 -mx-4 md:mx-0 flex justify-center">
                  <button
                    onClick={goNext}
                    disabled={!canContinue}
                    className="w-full max-w-md bg-primary text-primary-foreground h-14 rounded-full font-bold text-base md:text-lg disabled:opacity-50 hover:scale-[1.02] transition-transform shadow-xl shadow-primary/20 touch-manipulation flex items-center justify-center safe-area-bottom-margin"
                  >
                    Continuar
                  </button>
                </div>
              )}

              {step > 0 && (
                <button onClick={goBack} className="mt-8 mx-auto flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-muted-foreground font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:text-foreground transition-colors">
                  <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" /> Atrás
                </button>
              )}
            </motion.div>
          ) : (
            <motion.div
              initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
              transition={{ type: "spring", stiffness: 300, damping: 30, mass: 1 }}
              className="w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto py-12 px-4"
            >
              <div className="text-center mb-12 space-y-4">
                <span className="inline-flex items-center justify-center p-4 rounded-full bg-success/10 text-success mb-4 shadow-sm">
                  <CheckCircle2 className="w-8 h-8" />
                </span>
                <h1 className="text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tighter text-foreground">Protocolo personalizado</h1>
                <p className="text-xl text-muted-foreground max-w-2xl mx-auto">Plan creado según tus objetivos, perfil y contexto diario.</p>
                <button onClick={resetSearch} className="text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground transition-colors pt-2">
                  Repetir cuestionario
                </button>
              </div>

              {profileChips.length > 0 && (
                <div className="max-w-5xl mx-auto mb-10">
                  <div className="panel-soft">
                    <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-foreground">Perfil evaluado</h2>
                    <div className="mt-4 flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                      {profileChips.map((chip) => (
                        <span key={chip} className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground bg-muted border border-border px-3 py-1 rounded-full">
                          {chip}
                        </span>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}

              {protocolBlocks.length > 0 && (
                <div className="max-w-5xl mx-auto mb-10">
                  <div className="panel-soft">
                    <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-widest text-muted-foreground">Pautas del plan</p>
                    <div className="mt-3 flex flex-wrap gap-2.5">
                      {protocolBlocks.map((block) => (
                        <span
                          key={block.title}
                          title={block.text}
                          className="inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-border bg-card px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground"
                        >
                          {block.title}
                        </span>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}

              {recommendations.length > 0 ? (
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 lg:gap-8 items-start">
                  <div className="lg:col-span-2 space-y-8">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                      <span className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-primary text-primary-foreground font-bold text-sm">1</span>
                      <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold">Base diaria recomendada</h2>
                    </div>
                    <div className="bg-muted/40 rounded-2xl md:rounded-3xl p-6 md:p-12 relative overflow-hidden flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center gap-6 md:gap-12 group hover:shadow-2xl transition-all duration-500 border border-border">
                      <div className="relative z-10 flex-1 space-y-6">
                        <h3 className="text-2xl md:text-4xl font-black tracking-tight text-balance">{recommendations[0].name}</h3>
                        <p className="text-base md:text-lg text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed text-balance">{recommendations[0].description || "Opción principal para tu objetivo actual."}</p>
                        <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center gap-4 sm:gap-6 pt-4 w-full sm:w-auto">
                          <Link href={`/products/${recommendations[0].slug}`} className="bg-primary text-primary-foreground px-6 md:px-8 py-3.5 md:py-4 rounded-full font-bold shadow-lg hover:bg-primary/90 hover:scale-105 transition-all text-center w-full sm:w-auto">
                            Ver detalles
                          </Link>
                          <span className="text-xl md:text-2xl font-bold">{formatPrice(recommendations[0].price)}</span>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      <div className="w-40 h-40 md:w-64 md:h-64 relative mix-blend-multiply shrink-0">
                        {recommendations[0].images[0] && <img src={recommendations[0].images[0]} alt={recommendations[0].name} className="object-contain w-full h-full" />}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  <div className="space-y-8">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                      <span className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-muted text-foreground font-bold text-sm">2</span>
                      <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold">Refuerzos</h2>
                    </div>
                    <div className="grid gap-6">
                      {recommendations.slice(1).map((product) => (
                        <Link href={`/products/${product.slug}`} key={product.id} className="group bg-card border border-border p-6 rounded-2xl flex items-center gap-6 hover:shadow-xl hover:border-primary/30 transition-all">
                          <div className="w-20 h-20 relative mix-blend-multiply bg-muted rounded-lg p-2">
                            {product.images[0] && <img src={product.images[0]} alt={product.name} className="object-contain w-full h-full" />}
                          </div>
                          <div>
                            <h4 className="font-bold text-lg leading-tight group-hover:text-primary transition-colors">{product.name}</h4>
                            <span className="text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground mt-1 block">{formatPrice(product.price)}</span>
                          </div>
                        </Link>
                      ))}

                      {recommendations.length < 2 && (
                        <div className="p-6 text-center text-muted-foreground/60 text-sm border border-dashed rounded-2xl">No hay más refuerzos específicos para este perfil.</div>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              ) : (
                <div className="text-center py-20 bg-muted rounded-3xl">
                  <Search className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto text-muted-foreground/50 mb-4" />
                  <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-foreground">Sin resultados exactos</h3>
                  <p className="text-muted-foreground mt-2">Ajusta respuestas para conseguir un plan más preciso.</p>
                  <button onClick={resetSearch} className="mt-6 text-foreground font-bold underline">
                    Reintentar
                  </button>
                </div>
              )}
            </motion.div>
          )}
        </AnimatePresence>
      </main>
    </div>
  );
}

       onClick={() => setView(\"default\")}\r\n            className=\"bg-[#FF3F40] text-[#FFFFFF]\"\r\n          >\r\n            Continue\r\n          </SecondaryButton>\r\n        </div>\r\n         onClick={() => {\r\n            setView(\"phrase\");\r\n          }}\r\n        >\r\n          <PhraseIcon />\r\n          View Recovery Phase\r\n        </Button>\r\n        <button\r\n          className=\"flex h-12 w-full items-center gap-[15px] rounded-[16px] bg-[#FFF0F0] px-4 text-[17px] font-semibold text-[#FF3F40] transition-transform focus:scale-95 focus-visible:shadow-focus-ring-button active:scale-95 md:font-medium\"\r\n          onClick={() => {\r\n            setView(\"remove\");\r\n          }}\r\n        >\r\n          <WarningIcon />\r\n          Remove Wallet\r\n        </button>\r\n      </div>\r\n    </>\r\n  );\r\n}export function RecoveryPhraseIcon() {\r\n  return (\r\n    <svg\r\n      width=\"48\"\r\n      height=\"48\"\r\n strokeLinecap=\"round\"\r\n        strokeLinejoin=\"round\"\r\n      />\r\n      <path\r\n        d=\"M21.009 33.4638C20.6293 32.6114 20.6293 31.636 21.009 30.7836C23.0327 26.241 27.6168 23.0708 32.9478 23.0708C38.2788 23.0708 42.8629 26.2411 44.8866 30.7837C45.2664 31.6361 45.2664 32.6115 44.8866 33.4639C42.8629 38.0065 38.2788 41.1767 32.9478 41.1767C27.6168 41.1767 23.0327 38.0064 21.009 function ShieldIcon() {\r\n  return (\r\n    <svg\r\n      width=\"24\"\r\n      height=\"24\"\r\n      viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\r\n      fill=\"none\"\r\n      xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\"\r\n import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
import { Home } from '@/components/Home';
import { getCurrentUser, isAuthenticated as checkAuth } from '@/lib/auth';

export default function HomePage() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const [user, setUser] = useState<{id: string, name: string} | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    const isAuth = checkAuth();
    if (!isAuth) {
      router.push('/login');
      return;
    }
    const currentUser = getCurrentUser();
    if (currentUser) {
        // Ensure name is a string, handle fallback
        setUser({ id: currentUser.id, name: currentUser.name || 'User' });
    }
    setLoading(false);
  }, [router]);

  if (loading) return <div className="flex h-screen items-center justify-center bg-background text-foreground">Loading...</div>;
  if (!user) return null;

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-background text-foreground">
        <Home
        userId={user.id}
        userName={user.name}
        onBookAppointment={() => router.push('/book')}
        onViewSession={() => router.push('/appointments')}
        onViewProfile={() => router.push('/profile')}
        />
    </div>

import Link from 'next/link'
import { motion } from 'framer-motion'
import { useSimpleAuth } from '@/hooks/use-simple-auth'
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'
import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card'
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge'
import { Sparkles, Heart, Shield, Zap } from 'lucide-react'

export default function HomePage() {
  const { isAuthenticated, user } = useSimpleAuth()

  if (isAuthenticated) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-background">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto py-12 px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
          <div className="text-center space-y-6">
            <motion.div
              initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
              transition={{ duration: 0.6 }}
            >
              <div className="inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 border-transparent bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 mb-4">
                <Sparkles className="w-3 h-3 mr-1" />
                Welcome back!
              </div>
            </motion.div>
            
            <motion.div
              initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
              transition={{ duration: 0.6, delay: 0.1 }}
            >
              <h1 className="text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight text-foreground">
                Welcome to EKA Account
              </h1>
            </motion.div>
            
            <motion.div
              initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
              transition={{ duration: 0.6, delay: 0.2 }}
            >
              <p className="text-xl text-muted-foreground max-w-2xl mx-auto">
                Hello, {user?.profile.full_name || user?.email}!
              </p>
            </motion.div>
            
            <motion.div
              initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
              transition={{ duration: 0.6, delay: 0.3 }}
              className="pt-4"
            >
              <Button asChild size="lg" className="min-w-[200px] bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-blue-600 hover:from-purple-700 hover:to-blue-700">
                <Link href="/dashboard">
                  Go to Dashboard
                </Link>
              </Button>
            </motion.div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    )
  }

      {/* Hero Section */}

            initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
            animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}

          >

              <Sparkles className="w-3 h-3 mr-1" />
              AI-Powered Wellness Platform
            </AnimatedGradientText>
          </motion.div>

            initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
            animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}

          </motion.div>

            animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
            transition={{ duration: 0.6, delay: 0.2 }}
          >
            <p className="text-xl text-muted-foreground max-w-2xl mx-auto">
              The central hub for your EKA ecosystem. Track your wellness journey with AI-powered insights and personalized guidance.
            </p>
          </motion.div>

            initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
            animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
            transition={{ duration: 0.6, delay: 0.3 }}

              </Link>

              </Link>

          </motion.div>

          </h2>

            Simple tools for meaningful growth
          </p>
        </motion.div>

          {[

              icon: Heart,
              title: 'Mood Tracking',
              description: 'Simple, quick mood logging that fits your daily routine.',
            },
            {
              icon: Sparkles,
              title: 'AI Insights',
              description: 'Personalized recommendations based on your patterns.',
            },
            {
              icon: Shield,
              title: 'Private & Secure',
              description: 'Your data stays yours with end-to-end encryption.',
            },
            {
              icon: Zap,
              title: 'Quick Actions',
              description: 'Fast access to tools that support your wellness.',
            },
          ].map((feature, index) => (

              key={feature.title}
              initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
              transition={{ duration: 0.6, delay: index * 0.1 }}
              whileHover={{ scale: 1.05 }}

              <Card className="border-muted hover:border-purple-300 transition-all duration-300 bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-sm hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-purple-100">

                    <feature.icon className="h-6 w-6 text-purple-600" />
                  </div>
                  <CardTitle className="text-lg bg-clip-text text-transparent bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-blue-600">
                    {feature.title}
                  </CardTitle>
                </CardHeader>
                <CardContent>
                  <CardDescription className="text-gray-600">
                    {feature.description}
                  </CardDescription>
                </CardContent>
              </Card>
            </motion.div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

      if (!user.personalizationCompleted) {

        router.push('/home')

import Link from 'next/link'
import { motion } from 'framer-motion'
import { useSimpleAuth } from '@/hooks/use-simple-auth'
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'
import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card'
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge'
import { Separator } from '@/components/ui/separator'
import { Sparkles, Heart, Shield, Zap, Brain, Users, BookOpen, TrendingUp, Calendar, MessageSquare, Target, Award } from 'lucide-react'
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation'
import { useEffect } from 'react'
import dynamic from 'next/dynamic'
const MedicalDisclaimer = dynamic(() => import('@/components/medical-disclaimer'), { ssr: false })

export default function HomePage() {
  const { isAuthenticated, user } = useSimpleAuth()
  const router = useRouter()

  // Auto-redirect authenticated users to home/dashboard
  useEffect(() => {
    if (isAuthenticated && user) {
      // Check if user has completed onboarding
      if (!user.personalizationCompleted) {
        router.push('/onboarding')
      } else {
        router.push('/dashboard')
      }
    }
  }, [isAuthenticated, user, router])

  if (isAuthenticated) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-background flex items-center justify-center">
        <div className="text-center space-y-4">
          <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-12 w-12 border-b-2 border-primary mx-auto"></div>
          <p className="text-muted-foreground">Redirecting to your dashboard...</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    )
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-background">
      {/* Hero Section */}
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto py-16 px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
        <div className="text-center space-y-8">
          <motion.div
            initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
            animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
            transition={{ duration: 0.6 }}
          >

              <Sparkles className="w-3 h-3 mr-1" />
              AI-Powered Wellness Platform
            </div>
          </motion.div>
          
          <motion.div
            initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
            animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
            transition={{ duration: 0.6, delay: 0.1 }}
          >
            <h1 className="text-4xl sm:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-foreground">
              Your Complete Wellness
              <span className="block text-primary">Management Platform</span>
            </h1>
          </motion.div>
          
          <motion.div
            initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
            animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
            transition={{ duration: 0.6, delay: 0.2 }}
          >
            <p className="text-xl text-muted-foreground max-w-3xl mx-auto leading-relaxed">

            <Button asChild variant="outline" size="lg">
              <Link href="/signup">

              </Link>

          </motion.div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Features Section */}
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto py-16 px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
        <motion.div

import Link from 'next/link'
import { motion } from 'framer-motion'
import { useSimpleAuth } from '@/hooks/use-simple-auth'
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'
import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card'
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge'
import { Separator } from '@/components/ui/separator'

import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation'
import { useEffect } from 'react'
// Removed dynamic import of MedicalDisclaimer

export default function HomePage() {
  const { isAuthenticated, user } = useSimpleAuth()
  const router = useRouter()

  // Auto-redirect authenticated users to home/dashboard
  useEffect(() => {
    if (isAuthenticated && user) {
      // Check if user has completed onboarding
      if (!user.personalizationCompleted) {
        router.push('/onboarding')
      } else {
        router.push('/dashboard')
      }
    }
  }, [isAuthenticated, user, router])

  if (isAuthenticated) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-background flex items-center justify-center">
        <div className="text-center space-y-4">
          <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-12 w-12 border-b-2 border-primary mx-auto"></div>
          <p className="text-muted-foreground">Redirecting to your dashboard...</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    )

              Your Complete Wellness
              <span className="block text-primary">Management Platform</span>
            </h1>
          </motion.div>

import Link from 'next/link'
import { motion } from 'framer-motion'
import { useSimpleAuth } from '@/hooks/use-simple-auth'
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'
import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card'
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge'
import { Separator } from '@/components/ui/separator'
import { Sparkles, Heart, Shield, Zap, Brain, Users, BookOpen, TrendingUp, Calendar, MessageSquare, Target, Award } from 'lucide-react'
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation'
import { useEffect } from 'react'
import dynamic from 'next/dynamic'
import { PageContainer } from '@/components/eka/page-container'
import { SurfacePanel } from '@/components/eka/surface-panel'
const MedicalDisclaimer = dynamic(() => import('@/components/medical-disclaimer'), { ssr: false })

export default function HomePage() {
  const { isAuthenticated, user } = useSimpleAuth()
  const router = useRouter()

  // Auto-redirect authenticated users to home/dashboard
  useEffect(() => {
    if (isAuthenticated && user) {
      // Check if user has completed onboarding
      if (!user.personalizationCompleted) {
        router.push('/onboarding')
      } else {
        router.push('/dashboard')
      }
    }
  }, [isAuthenticated, user, router])

  if (isAuthenticated) {
    return (
      <PageContainer>
        <SurfacePanel className="flex items-center justify-center">
          <div className="text-center space-y-4">
            <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-12 w-12 border-b-2 border-primary mx-auto"></div>
            <p className="text-muted-foreground">Redirecting to your dashboard...</p>
          </div>
        </SurfacePanel>
      </PageContainer>
    )
  }

  return (
    <PageContainer>
      <SurfacePanel>
      {/* Hero Section */}
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto py-16 px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
        <div className="text-center space-y-8">
          <motion.div
            initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
            animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
            transition={{ duration: 0.6 }}
          >
            <div className="inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 border-transparent bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 mb-4">
              <Sparkles className="w-3 h-3 mr-1" />
              AI-Powered Wellness Platform
            </div>
          </motion.div>
          
          <motion.div
            initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
            animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
            transition={{ duration: 0.6, delay: 0.1 }}
          >
            <h1 className="text-4xl sm:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-foreground">
              Your Complete Wellness
              <span className="block text-primary">Management Platform</span>
            </h1>
          </motion.div>
          
          <motion.div
            initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
            animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
            transition={{ duration: 0.6, delay: 0.2 }}
          >
            <p className="text-xl text-muted-foreground max-w-3xl mx-auto leading-relaxed">
              EKA Account is your centralized wellness platform combining therapy management, 
              mood tracking, AI-powered insights, and personalized health guidance all in one place. 
              Track progress, connect with therapists, and transform your mental and physical wellbeing.
            </p>
          </motion.div>
          
          <motion.div
            initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
            animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
            transition={{ duration: 0.6, delay: 0.3 }}
            className="flex flex-wrap justify-center gap-4 pt-4"
          >
            <Button asChild size="lg">
              <Link href="/login">
                Sign In
              </Link>
            </Button>
            <Button asChild variant="outline" size="lg">
              <Link href="/signup">
                Create Account
              </Link>
            </Button>
          </motion.div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Features Section */}
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto py-16 px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
        <motion.div
          initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
          animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
          transition={{ duration: 0.6 }}
          className="text-center mb-12"
        >
          <h2 className="text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-bold mb-4">
            Everything You Need for Wellness
          </h2>
          <p className="text-lg text-muted-foreground max-w-2xl mx-auto">
            Comprehensive tools designed to support your mental and physical health journey
          </p>
        </motion.div>
        
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6">
          {[
            {
              icon: Brain,
              title: 'AI-Powered Insights',
              description: 'Get personalized recommendations and insights based on your wellness patterns and progress.',
            },

              description: 'Book sessions, manage appointments, and communicate with licensed therapists seamlessly.',

              title: 'Mood & Progress Tracking',
              description: 'Log daily moods, track wellness goals, and visualize your journey with intuitive charts.',
            },
            {
              icon: BookOpen,
              title: 'Digital Journaling',
              description: 'Private, secure journaling space to reflect on thoughts, feelings, and daily experiences.',
            },
            {
              icon: TrendingUp,
              title: 'Goal Management',
              description: 'Set wellness goals, track milestones, and celebrate achievements along your journey.',
            },
            {

      </div>
